name: John James
subject: This We’ll Defend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan
body:
| | | Friend, **_This we’ll defend. _** It’s the U.S. Army motto, and I took that message to heart as I put on my flight suit and prepared for takeoff on my missions. _**It’s also something more than a few members of Congress could stand to hear.**_ When I first got to Congress, I made the same promises that I made when I joined the Army - that I would serve, protect, and defend our Constitution and our country. That’s what legislators are supposed to do, but too many have missed the mark. Most of them have never served anyone but special interests and their own selfish needs. They’ve never spent a day in combat, and they could care less about our troops and our veterans. _But that ignorance stops with me. _ **I know that freedom isn’t free because I saw men and women in battle make the ultimate sacrifice. Now, I won’t let the radical Left trample over our freedoms and try to tell us that their sacrifices are in vain. ** **[I’m working to bring Army values to Congress, but right now, I’m in one of the closest races in America, and I need your help. Can you pitch in now to re-elect a freedom-loving, battle-tested veteran?](http://links.jjforcongress.com/u/click?_t=f784024d18db4d2d88c26e9627b85cc7&_m=bef75f9ac5ee4d208088b453aeff187a&_e=zcuOkYq0jY1f1AQf4BrfrtzDbCaqTxu_Ww2YpN6RiG0TL7QV152PhtQHVIz3v88x-8VFK3BL71IJWFqohRPBO63CocjHN3WQx3yzIt_8JDkfJ_cZ4JgivuEkaVyBJpfIgBDi70P5tb8F5p7vcafhPTW_HPfIzQVBepYFVzYiigAy4XXoQidisM6CWfTgXYn9WL8mwNmmXIriMLzdFjr4JU2u1JBQaADFdXvB7s9eWrZq-IVRql0f1HsBcvAOl-DdzYsKqmPzWEH8aQIp58T4iXdM0iA7deTMYkCQmgJWiDeZQ3sP8HBGdVjGLGhdUiVwYvu1J9MQ2hLYIIp1n-o6gKMIcWE2_NmFaYJS75kpjr0%3D)** ****
---
[**PITCH IN NOW**](http://links.jjforcongress.com/u/click?_t=f784024d18db4d2d88c26e9627b85cc7&_m=bef75f9ac5ee4d208088b453aeff187a&_e=zcuOkYq0jY1f1AQf4BrfrtzDbCaqTxu_Ww2YpN6RiG0TL7QV152PhtQHVIz3v88x-8VFK3BL71IJWFqohRPBO63CocjHN3WQx3yzIt_8JDkfJ_cZ4JgivuEkaVyBJpfIgBDi70P5tb8F5p7vcafhPTW_HPfIzQVBepYFVzYiigAy4XXoQidisM6CWfTgXYn9WL8mwNmmXIriMLzdFjr4JV7UaA2NxfxBXakkyVjj_jcF12nRIVARarDEGDMvwE4x7Cb67Gz-R2UUMEqdaOS2_rL_74aHRPZfNkYJdeE6p0RQuNkY0d13M2hKnLZaNQP5FRBMkSBnZOmq81cp6-0ABWAN80qCsI8heKAp9ZpUEQo%3D)
---
I believe that we are the greatest country on Earth - but we’re running out of time to defend that title. The radical Left wants to remake history in their woke image with America as the enemy, and they’re brainwashing our kids to lead the charge. **I didn’t fly into combat zones for this country just to watch the Left try to destroy it. ** **[I know it’s not too late to save America, but it’s going to take every patriot doing their part. ](http://links.jjforcongress.com/u/click?_t=f784024d18db4d2d88c26e9627b85cc7&_m=bef75f9ac5ee4d208088b453aeff187a&_e=zcuOkYq0jY1f1AQf4BrfrtzDbCaqTxu_Ww2YpN6RiG0TL7QV152PhtQHVIz3v88x-8VFK3BL71IJWFqohRPBO63CocjHN3WQx3yzIt_8JDkfJ_cZ4JgivuEkaVyBJpfIgBDi70P5tb8F5p7vcafhPTW_HPfIzQVBepYFVzYiigAy4XXoQidisM6CWfTgXYn9WL8mwNmmXIriMLzdFjr4JTbH_3fP8Kcu2c6udDMVdp9Es3kLm2VmPCih3NuTMyTusXm6YrsRG7eqxGbiscIzeW3lgxObN8sMc7-wuXAGH7_DnZfoGRSCXK-o7NPUa_ak44nEGlpIiXdU-r9zXK8n2qESzXpXSztxqWggamrKjgU%3D)******

body:
An Update on our campaign

| [ ](https://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=50637689fa8947f69407dad32e959c0c&_e=gIGhuO6BNJHX7Y1GVRGHYQTuTDtQSU1XH_QLU68RhQcvk7h9DbN1ynK5xiAR69qZ4jf2I1-BmEKWacRzOvubGjo1nmBhoeQPIhIu-Cuu5aNRA1FYGRSsYKJ63QV5_CW16JZMrP_m7iWKM7Xn1491En0eMT5Pg72Y2512SuUh8ec4C-toPbMayGNPZVvb0shz87na6DIxChpJf-c8BWWhMvom56_3sMHqTEfHmsvvqxqWUl6VbkvJGDuXA_9vlfa0beBrXbIlQrWWFojgPjI_NgIKMDRRlg6MbKoxNvlJDYQLHx28u61CPfQ-oQumujCk6gI9KA91QFpK0BCxhJyJF4uh-mVTr1GtdYDCl_wzMZ9UrJD5UV0t7V0l4sbJeTo_5qgpn6UGKKrTAgbvDCJoBKLwokBrL7Ft3XN0SMGRfis%3D)

AN OFFICIAL CAMPAIGN UPDATE FROM THE DESK OF KARI LAKE
Fellow American,

As one of my top supporters, I wanted to give you an update about recent developments in our Arizona Senate campaign.

**First:** Independent Senator Kyrsten Sinema dropped out, leaving the race a one-on-one contest between myself and radical leftist Ruben Gallego.

**Then:** Left-wing donors and activist groups donated **over $1 million** to Gallego's campaign in just 24 hours.

**Now:** I'm launching a fundraising blitz to fight back and make sure we have the resources we need to win this race, flip the Senate, and save America.

| [**CHIP IN NOW TO HELP ME FIGHT BACK** ](https://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=50637689fa8947f69407dad32e959c0c&_e=gIGhuO6BNJHX7Y1GVRGHYQTuTDtQSU1XH_QLU68RhQcvk7h9DbN1ynK5xiAR69qZ4jf2I1-BmEKWacRzOvubGjo1nmBhoeQPIhIu-Cuu5aNRA1FYGRSsYKJ63QV5_CW16JZMrP_m7iWKM7Xn1491En0eMT5Pg72Y2512SuUh8ec4C-toPbMayGNPZVvb0shz87na6DIxChpJf-c8BWWhMvom56_3sMHqTEfHmsvvqxqWUl6VbkvJGDuXA_9vlfa0uUTW_X5EqpD_5S35yJ4IPBI841DfXWBftl9JVa7Xb8oCblBFpqithngZ5hA7Isig1X_8jjP26RrQ0kDBax5zkQS2gTP6IYj8PYBhq0ABC4lXcnpT_n1yEBAGZY9N96q37mHY7Kg3cMRAOCcWw4lggI4PAb-GmhXqr1PcTJgJFTk%3D)
---

The road to the Senate majority goes through Arizona. There's simply no way for Republicans to flip the Senate unless we win here. That means if we fall short, we can say goodbye to a secure border, a strong economy, and safe streets.

The good news is polling shows we have the lead. The bad news is with my opponent's massive windfall of cash, and the fake news doing his bidding, our momentum could stall if we don't act fast.

I don't have millionaire liberals from New York and California bankrolling my campaign. I'm relying on grassroots conservative patriots who are sick and tired of what Joe Biden and his cronies have done to our great country. If everyone reading this email chipped in just $20, we'd easily match Gallego's fundraising haul. **I know the stakes. I know that failure is not an option.** That's why I'm putting everything on the line to win. I just need you to join me. **[Can I count on you?](https://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=50637689fa8947f69407dad32e959c0c&_e=gIGhuO6BNJHX7Y1GVRGHYQTuTDtQSU1XH_QLU68RhQcvk7h9DbN1ynK5xiAR69qZ4jf2I1-BmEKWacRzOvubGjo1nmBhoeQPIhIu-Cuu5aNRA1FYGRSsYKJ63QV5_CW16JZMrP_m7iWKM7Xn1491En0eMT5Pg72Y2512SuUh8ec4C-toPbMayGNPZVvb0shz87na6DIxChpJf-c8BWWhMuKNvjCkiY0erFQ4BE-bJzSKzmiwZ2goWduBsf4aVEEx_SlzEckmNVf949nsxVAIOflgwkBMG2BS69CmBrEqo97g57HjGJ-UzqEcVEXVhVUVvcO9fxgWVxwFjsQoSQbawI0zsRZFyJCg8da3N6qNI_2PCYrOqNk71XJSxApw20CZzXTe37la8cgXqxUrvkHM3g%3D%3D)**

Chip in here for a better future for our families, and for our nation. **[CLICK HERE](https://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=50637689fa8947f69407dad32e959c0c&_e=gIGhuO6BNJHX7Y1GVRGHYQTuTDtQSU1XH_QLU68RhQcvk7h9DbN1ynK5xiAR69qZ4jf2I1-BmEKWacRzOvubGjo1nmBhoeQPIhIu-Cuu5aNRA1FYGRSsYKJ63QV5_CW16JZMrP_m7iWKM7Xn1491En0eMT5Pg72Y2512SuUh8ec4C-toPbMayGNPZVvb0shz87na6DIxChpJf-c8BWWhMuKNvjCkiY0erFQ4BE-bJzSKzmiwZ2goWduBsf4aVEExcYfUjEj4TpsOjZ2mTDyyu269Ik0UXIyiUvl7GdEVLcA6qxuZdVr0uHXp9fg5lhwI9c3PmHOaMyoiN1jv3hB5nW-DufZVrUhI3yh97E4AJuMoMjkkQxTZkE7krzalVeMdy5Q8h1rKkRsgaZc8Mtbd6A%3D%3D)**

Thank you for your support,

[](https://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=50637689fa8947f69407dad32e959c0c&_e=gIGhuO6BNJHX7Y1GVRGHYQTuTDtQSU1XH_QLU68RhQcvk7h9DbN1ynK5xiAR69qZ4jf2I1-BmEKWacRzOvubGjo1nmBhoeQPIhIu-Cuu5aNRA1FYGRSsYKJ63QV5_CW16JZMrP_m7iWKM7Xn1491En0eMT5Pg72Y2512SuUh8ec4C-toPbMayGNPZVvb0shz87na6DIxChpJf-c8BWWhMvom56_3sMHqTEfHmsvvqxqWUl6VbkvJGDuXA_9vlfa0QWmB_0TdUSYZ8MZnY8pMTGsFhmCEI1PGyrfQrMy-wqCr_TfhCo7piOnZ7AZ6--WQfVF9qAPugCwItRuDwnH1LtSfvwaUOZ8hX62mryXkRNRQ7QZhIh7gwnepZS7HNQwMLifQOU_Bwbrc0tQ5xbHotTmXJGWSugMH0EkViO7toZo%3D)

body:
If you have been waiting for the absolute perfect time... | | |
---
Peter -- If you have been waiting for the absolute perfect time to make your first online donation to President Biden's reelection campaign, we are here to tell you that TODAY is that day. Why today? There are the obvious reasons: defense of democracy, abortion access, protecting the Affordable Care Act, and not letting Trump back into the White House for four more years of division and destruction. But there's also the practical reason: We have very real fundraising goals we need to reach in order to win. These are not arbitrary goals. They are numbers we must reach to fund a campaign that can beat what Trump and the outside groups are spending to beat us. And the fact is, almost all of our donations come in response to emails like this. The President doesn't expect anyone to give to every email we send. But right now we're in danger of falling behind on our goals for May, so he's really hoping you'll give to this one. What do you say? [**Can President Biden count on you to use this link to contribute $25, or whatever you can afford today, to his reelection campaign? clean_body: If you have been waiting for the absolute perfect time... | | | Peter -- If you have been waiting for the absolute perfect time to make your first online donation to President Biden's reelection campaign, we are here to tell you that TODAY is that day. Why today? There are the obvious reasons: defense of democracy, abortion access, protecting the Affordable Care Act, and not letting Trump back into the White House for four more years of division and destruction. But there's also the practical reason: We have very real fundraising goals we need to reach in order to win. These are not arbitrary goals. They are numbers we must reach to fund a campaign that can beat what Trump and the outside groups are spending to beat us. And the fact is, almost all of our donations come in response to emails like this. The President doesn't expect anyone to give to every email we send. But right now we're in danger of falling behind on our goals for May, so he's really hoping you'll give to this one. name: Ruben Gallego for Senate
subject: ☀️ To all of Ruben Gallego’s supporters, please do not click away from this important message ☀️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
We have some critical news so we'll get straight to the point:
☀️ To all of Ruben Gallego’s supporters,

**Please don’t click away.** We have some critical news so we'll get straight to the point: Senator Sinema will not run for re-election.

That means it's Ruben vs. Kari Lake, and we're asking for your financial support to make sure we have the resources to win.

If everyone reading this donated even $10, we would not only have a huge number of donations, but we probably wouldn't have to ask again for weeks.

But not everyone gives. So we’re relying on people who understand how important this race is, and how important keeping Kari Lake out of the Senate is, to chip in today.

Ruben doesn’t do a ton of big-dollar fundraisers. This campaign is sustained by the donations of only 5% of Ruben’s supporters. Without those donations, big or small, we couldn’t run a winning campaign.

That’s why we need your help. We are passionate about our fundraising model, because at its core, this campaign is powered by you.

Our average donation is $27. Many donors give less. Some give more. All that matters is that you’re choosing to power this campaign today.

[_If Ruben winning this race and keeping Kari Lake out of the Senate seems worth $10 to you, we’re humbly asking you to take a minute to secure the future of this campaign by making a donation to split between Ruben and Upset The Setup. clean_body: We have some critical news so we'll get straight to the point: ☀️ To all of Ruben Gallego’s supporters, Please don’t click away. We have some critical news so we'll get straight to the point: Senator Sinema will not run for re-election. That means it's Ruben vs. Kari Lake, and we're asking for your financial support to make sure we have the resources to win. If everyone reading this donated even $10, we would not only have a huge number of donations, but we probably wouldn't have to ask again for weeks. But not everyone gives. So we’re relying on people who understand how important this race is, and how important keeping Kari Lake out of the Senate is, to chip in today. Ruben doesn’t do a ton of big-dollar fundraisers. This campaign is sustained by the donations of only 5% of Ruben’s supporters. Without those donations, big or small, we couldn’t run a winning campaign. That’s why we need your help. We are passionate about our fundraising model, because at its core, this campaign is powered by you. Our average donation is $27. Many donors give less. Some give more. All that matters is that you’re choosing to power this campaign today. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = 🙏 We are asking, humbly: please make your donation today. It’d mean a lot. subject: I’m asking you personally
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is important

Friend, it’s Janelle. I know your inbox is full of messages like this right now, but there has truly never been a more important time on the Bynum for Congress campaign. My team’s first big deadline of the general election is coming up at midnight tonight. **We set an ambitious goal for 1,000 grassroots supporters to become Founding Donors before time runs out — but with just 6 hours left to go, we’re still 57 short of where we need to be.** Look, in 2022, Republican mega-donors spent every penny they could to flip this seat red — _and it worked._ This November, I know we can win it back — but I need you with me. That’s why I’m asking you personally to help close the gap. **Please, this is your last chance to become a 2024 Founding Donor before our deadline expires. You can chip in at the secure link below:** **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bynumq22024?refcode=FoundingDonor](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85644347/475436422/476240567?refcode=em_fr_2024.05.25_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=10&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjYwNWUzNTEtZmIxYS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gwgV8JNXxu_1HZ3wtgQGv2E23DqSCSv1GP5FfsuTK2I=)** Thank you, _Janelle_

I need your help to compete with Rick Scott's massive fortune

---

So I'm counting on a massive surge in grassroots fundraising to meet this critical goal. clean_body: I need your help to compete with Rick Scott's massive fortune | | | Here's the deal, friend: I've got a little more than 2 days left to close the $81,519 shortfall to my last $600,000 fundraising goal before we head into end-of-month. My race will likely decide Senate control, and now that Rick Scott is running for Senate Republican leader, it could also decide who the next Senate majority leader is. But I'm still statistically tied with Rick Scott in the polls, so I have to ask: = | | = With his abysmal 35% approval among Floridians — less than both Marco Rubio and Ron DeSantis — experts at CNN report that out-of-touch GOP Senator Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable GOP senators on the ballot. But you need to understand that he won't go down without a fight: It cost $64 MILLION of his own money to eke out a 10,033-vote win last time, and now he's writing checks for millions to buy Florida's seat again. So I'm counting on a massive surge in grassroots fundraising to meet this critical goal. Compete with his attack ad spending, and keep my own ads on the air —= | | = Just $5 to help me run ads to fight back against Scott’s lies. Just $5 to help me keep building an incredible staff. Just $5 to help me travel and meet voters across the Sunshine State. Just $5 to help me turn out the vote in blue districts, register new voters, and get my message out to the swing voters who will make or break this election. Just $5 from you could be enough to beat Rick Scott and save our Senate majority. If we flip Florida, the Senate is virtually guaranteed to stay blue. But that only happens if we have the resources to keep up the fight against his fortune. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for your generous support — it's more powerful than you think. Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

Donald Trump canceled his visit to Arizona, which **marks the third time** he has done so in the past two years. _Looks like running a campaign and fighting off felony convictions for the Big Lie can put a dent in the travel budget._
While Trump is choosing to avoid Arizonans, our team has been hard at work. We have connected with voters across the state, showing everyday folks that the issues that impact them every day are central to Democrats' priorities.
President Biden has visited the state three times already, and he’s laser-focused on the issues that matter most to our voters. Despite the chaos that MAGA Republicans have caused, President Biden and Democrats in Congress have created jobs, worked to protect reproductive health care, and lowered the cost of prescription drugs.

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: There is no time for games or gimmicks.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Lara Trump, Mike Johnson, Steve Scalise, John Kennedy, and Donald Trump Jr. all reached out to you personally. Now I’m personally asking you to step up before the deadline.

| |

---
| | | I was worried when we barely won the House in 2022...

I was really worried when we lost the NY Special Election...

I was even more worried when we dropped to a ONE-SEAT Majority last month...

Now come to find out Democrats have $76 MILLION ready to unleash against us...

**This is officially an emergency situation for Conservatives everywhere.** On top of our ever-shrinking House Majority, we're also barreling toward our all-important May deadline - and I don't want Conservatives to lose!

_**[There is no time for games or gimmicks. I'm rushing to you - in the final hours we have left - to pitch in at least ten or twenty bucks before our key deadline.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrci4sfsm9dv45fse4b83t6fpp1lvrl0k2en47vg_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti6ao75cjh2bs "There is no time for games or gimmicks. I’m rushing to you – in the final hours we have left – to pitch in at least ten or twenty bucks before our key deadline.")**_

Do not forget this:

_Our Conservative House Majority is the only thing standing in the way of Joe Biden taking full control and ramming through anything he wants._

That includes PACKING the Supreme Court, RAISING your taxes, GUTTING voter ID, CENSORING Conservatives, and GREENLIGHTING mass amnesty...

**And our House Majority firewall is hanging on by a thread. **

We have until 11:59 PM on 5/31/2024 to hit our goal. After that, our fundraising numbers go public and nothing we can do will change it. If we fail and come up short, the consequences would be unimaginable.

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zccstph7uo2k2o50apenrtcq25j61en5k8824d50_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti6ao75cjh2bs "Newt Gingrich")

We need your help and we need it right here and right now. That's why Lara Trump, Mike Johnson, Steve Scalise, John Kennedy, and Donald Trump Jr. all reached out to you personally.

_**[Now I'm personally asking you to step up before the deadline.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziq1safd0cjd4mqn5quqbh0nsqhnftcom4imvt6g_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti6ao75cjh2bs "Now I’m personally asking you to step up before the deadline. ")**_

Thank you. God bless you. And God bless America.

_- Newt Gingrich_

name: Kevin Sorbo
subject: Help me defeat a woke giant
body:
Who is this giant? None other than Scholastic Book Fairs.

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zju5blepsgb0gbjhm50jk29tet0l549nql1rlkj0_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti6ao75cph2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")
Friend,

There once was a giant who, for the most part, did a good job. This giant would carry books to every school in America. Children loved it when the giant would come to school. It meant kids would get to read new stories that would stay with them forever.

**_Who is this giant? None other than Scholastic Book Fairs_.**

Scholastic turned a once nostalgic school event into a week that which parents keep their kids home from school. Books are riddled with explicit content and material that’s simply not age-appropriate for students.

Let me introduce you to **SkyTree Book Fairs**.

SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values. They provide kids with books like my own, _The Test of Lionhood_.

Here’s how you can help me slay the Scholastic giant:

[I told my friends at SkyTree that I would help them raise $50,000 toward book fairs in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward SkyTree?](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z5pkpf2qvh26r2ethrhub2cks8uvo0g128aeoge8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti6ao75cph2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zc3lhqinf1idoqnah96qfdmi3nqkrpss2ilo1kn8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti6ao75cph2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z65nnr4ao2pqpo24ioomoac8cj1sbim2pgts7pi8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti6ao75cph2bs)

name: HIllsdale College via American Action News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmd2id31f40pdkkgr677ib5ruikbtf55otke21s8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti66pr6c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zre49uhb6sccjg1b256rd60mjfnlss4foc83bmm0_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti66pr6c1h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztt7htmpt1n5m9cbp5hs9n506m39mmehba5q4sno_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti66pr6c1h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

---

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Do you know about Joe Biden’s Executive Order 14019?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
URGENT: Biden’s new Executive Order 14019 will turn Federal government agencies to act as Biden’s personal “Get-Out-The-Vote” machine.

|
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zea6c4jgtrqe4ktrfahp1p77in3vnehvfb91b7q8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti6epr0cdh2bs)
Friend,

**URGENT: Biden’s new Executive Order 14019 will turn Federal government agencies to act as Biden’s personal “Get-Out-The-Vote” machine.**

While courts may take up the case, here’s what I fear the most...

Republicans in Congress do not have the willpower to stop this unprecedented and unconstitutional use of our government to interfere with our elections in 2024. Republicans are already behind the Democratic machine to turn out votes, and this will only increase their efforts.

No wonder Biden and his campaign are “increasingly confident” they will win despite bad polling and collapsing approval numbers.

I’m not going to sit aside and do nothing. And neither should you.

Here’s my solution:

**I am directing Turning Point PAC to fund the largest ballot-chasing army ever in key electoral states. The success of this operation will determine the White House and help elect President Donald J. Trump.**

Here’s how you can help:

[As a personal favor to me, can you send an urgent donation today of $20.24, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 to fund ballot chasing in key states? Please select an amount below to donate:](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zht2r74ma7f0m4lk0ctvjar9kd07ori8k6hmmb3o_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti6epr0cdh2bs)

[$250](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zeh4uva4pcj8b9sepuu3uls9jrui0umuqqisteeg_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti6epr0cdh2bs)

[$500](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zru2v9brrhnfaepajr66rtb2vr97m4bg1eosfl6g_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti6epr0cdh2bs)

[$1,000](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgfv4vfa332f9r4e2q3fa8i4k3mb0h41mf26l2u0_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti6epr0cdh2bs)

We need to win in November. This isn’t a football game. This is for our civilization.

Thank you,

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g. corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidate and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

subject: There is no time for games or gimmicks.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Lara Trump, Mike Johnson, Steve Scalise, John Kennedy, and Donald Trump Jr. all reached out to you personally. Now I’m personally asking you to step up before the deadline.

| |

---
| | | I was worried when we barely won the House in 2022...

I was really worried when we lost the NY Special Election...

I was even more worried when we dropped to a ONE-SEAT Majority last month...

Now come to find out Democrats have $76 MILLION ready to unleash against us...

**This is officially an emergency situation for Conservatives everywhere.** On top of our ever-shrinking House Majority, we're also barreling toward our all-important May deadline - and I don't want Conservatives to lose!

_**[There is no time for games or gimmicks. I'm rushing to you - in the final hours we have left - to pitch in at least ten or twenty bucks before our key deadline.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znn59bgq0t5cb8l0p22uku10ek3or7g4n43io5o8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti6epr2c9h2bs "There is no time for games or gimmicks. I’m rushing to you – in the final hours we have left – to pitch in at least ten or twenty bucks before our key deadline.")**_

Do not forget this:

_Our Conservative House Majority is the only thing standing in the way of Joe Biden taking full control and ramming through anything he wants._

That includes PACKING the Supreme Court, RAISING your taxes, GUTTING voter ID, CENSORING Conservatives, and GREENLIGHTING mass amnesty...

**And our House Majority firewall is hanging on by a thread. **

We have until 11:59 PM on 5/31/2024 to hit our goal. After that, our fundraising numbers go public and nothing we can do will change it. If we fail and come up short, the consequences would be unimaginable.

name: Kevin Sorbo
subject: Help me defeat a woke giant
body:
Who is this giant? None other than Scholastic Book Fairs.

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zptdrokc2tkh0eak0ojklqjr05tu8kgs87iiicdo_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti6eo73cdh2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")
Friend,

There once was a giant who, for the most part, did a good job. This giant would carry books to every school in America. Children loved it when the giant would come to school. It meant kids would get to read new stories that would stay with them forever.

**_Who is this giant? None other than Scholastic Book Fairs_.**

Scholastic turned a once nostalgic school event into a week that which parents keep their kids home from school. Books are riddled with explicit content and material that’s simply not age-appropriate for students.

Let me introduce you to **SkyTree Book Fairs**.

SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values. They provide kids with books like my own, _The Test of Lionhood_.

Here’s how you can help me slay the Scholastic giant:

[I told my friends at SkyTree that I would help them raise $50,000 toward book fairs in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward SkyTree?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpie2eqnht6u8al7hocoe5j865p8775u1m1s1re8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti6eo73cdh2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1v08i3q9i9jn435gikjtu3gjif0gr4o8dgpr9uo_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti6eo73cdh2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7vpdhh7a6o6pstofqapg0d328j96bl0f0n79nb8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti6eo73cdh2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp5prrsi0ut048ts5gr8q3or4c0ko8oc586hl998_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti6eo73cdh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0gb02d06risls61vcvpd857lvvvmks4ai0fsfj8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti6eo73cdh2bs)
This is how we turn the tide in our culture. We will uproot evil and plant the seeds of truth, goodness, and beauty.

No more whining or complaining about our culture.

With SkyTree Book Fairs, we are focusing on offering a solution to the problem. It's time to act.

And the best part?

SkyTree Book Fairs already has 800+ requests from schools! SkyTree is swamped with requests to provide book fairs at schools. Parents and schools desperately want alternatives to the woke nonsense that plagues our society.

Please stand with me in supporting SkyTree Book Fairs by making a donation of $250, $100, $35, $10, or any amount you can generously contribute. [Donate $10](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp4l0lq3isp2h7ds03co6sm1j2i6fb1r9rhe2a3o_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti6eo73cdh2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6bigu5br8g60s13k4251dr1m9317a5lfo56pfv0_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti6eo73cdh2bs)

Kevin Sorbo

Friend,

The modern Democratic Party is the Party of **_[cultural Marxists, radical anti-Semites, and Hamas sympathizers.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zlapclped14qshqv4iv3gabvlctd41uc0lol8vp0_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti69ob6c1h2bs)_****_ _** We CANNOT allow them to maintain their grip on power in Washington.

Battleground states like _**[Arizona, Ohio, and my home state of Texas](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zpsj98fjenktaideqbfhr86tk19qfvkk5fdh4su8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti69ob6c1h2bs)**_ are going to be ground zero in our fight to take back the Senate Majority from the far-Left. In order to win these states, we need accurate, up-to-date voter information from grassroots patriots like you.
That's why I'm inviting you to participate in the [2024 SENATE BATTLEGROUND ASSESSMENT.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zpvojj4cgfukcqa8id2rvlrireu5mdiptc2b9bmg_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cti69ob6c1h2bs)

name: Kevin Sorbo
subject: Help me defeat a woke giant
body:
Who is this giant? None other than Scholastic Book Fairs.

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7m3dnghrickciladcv8ekrjkktd5m4hno5in24g_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cth60pj2c9h2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")
Friend,

There once was a giant who, for the most part, did a good job. This giant would carry books to every school in America. Children loved it when the giant would come to school. It meant kids would get to read new stories that would stay with them forever.

**_Who is this giant? None other than Scholastic Book Fairs_.**

Scholastic turned a once nostalgic school event into a week that which parents keep their kids home from school. Books are riddled with explicit content and material that’s simply not age-appropriate for students.

Let me introduce you to **SkyTree Book Fairs**.

SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values. They provide kids with books like my own, _The Test of Lionhood_.

Here’s how you can help me slay the Scholastic giant:

[I told my friends at SkyTree that I would help them raise $50,000 toward book fairs in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward SkyTree?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm7n9mlj0cqeo0f084hkks1ncsp9bb21jqsa1h98_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cth60pj2c9h2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3d61s2e8ph0qa25bc51ts9o1hci3amcigm07rg0_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cth60pj2c9h2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeo2hvj9608grobrfdoqs8ckcd7ds047ohg5ahfo_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cth60pj2c9h2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk79l1clcg9kb0eg6u4s8mm5k0n9arsnf4kji5do_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cth60pj2c9h2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqdcv7jlms1used9upujj2jn7tj5qu15ga4j7m48_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cth60pj2c9h2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh09042c6ho371uq7br0th5cb75vnejvono754i0_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cth60pj2c9h2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj74ki4tcaucnholtic1ngj60gva4ucj1icp40b8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cth60pj2c9h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zopr4u8vo15unri5dul188cl0tii2jl2kskmagl8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cth60pj2c9h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zek95534klh9fv2f8k0ke0lo0kg5fd714iifu3i0_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cth60pj2c9h2bs)
This is how we turn the tide in our culture. We will uproot evil and plant the seeds of truth, goodness, and beauty.

No more whining or complaining about our culture.

With SkyTree Book Fairs, we are focusing on offering a solution to the problem. It's time to act.

And the best part?

SkyTree Book Fairs already has 800+ requests from schools! SkyTree is swamped with requests to provide book fairs at schools. Parents and schools desperately want alternatives to the woke nonsense that plagues our society.

Please stand with me in supporting SkyTree Book Fairs by making a donation of $250, $100, $35, $10, or any amount you can generously contribute. [Donate $10](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1pmpgcpkgq5rtf2rb880re1sufjisahcfhtt63o_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cth60pj2c9h2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq397b6v64tdqnneqo7vkqkuc20jdgqqq35kjs1o_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cth60pj2c9h2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0n1rel124lqas34381r1b55ehopctk03chq9ohg_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cth60pj2c9h2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znv5fgukktcl2m4eeak8r4mjhlaptc55dvevpbj0_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cth60pj2c9h2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg9tmjueiemltsk1vmdsm2unl2kevdjb01mgug68_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cth60pj2c9h2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z54esba3fkjbgsjm92rrnramgjsmn6fq6g3tmfr0_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cth60pj2c9h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeg66b0n5jt91f6cj111nbosjj41oa6chqi9c36g_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cth60pj2c9h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm27oskk321gkba1pkfqda6li9lri7hqola4f28o_rp22sh2s8i6ep33cth60pj2c9h2bs)
I thought I’d share some photos of recent SkyTree book fairs with you. They are already in schools and may be coming to a school near you. Kevin Sorbo

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: A Special Message from Babylon Bee CEO Seth Dillon
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger._J-1xxJzAfxv7edA)
---
|
---
Friends, Not long ago, Elon Musk bought Twitter, changed his bio to Chief Twit, and sent me a DM that said: "Do you want the Babylon Bee restored? There will be no censorship of humor."
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
| | We've been trying to think of a joke worth $44 billion ever since. But as resourceful and committed to free speech as he is, Musk is still just one man, and X is just one platform. Censorship remains the law of the land on virtually every other social media site run by Big Tech. X is a welcome but rare exception. Just a couple of months ago, I was notified that the conservative David Horowitz Freedom Center was permanently suspended by Vimeo for posting a talk I'd given about censorship. Just think about the irony of that for a second. As if they wanted to make my point for me more emphatically than I ever could, **they censored my talk about censorship. ** **It 's clear to us that what the censors want is submission. **They want unquestioning conformity. They want us to give up and start fighting. Stop telling jokes. Stop telling the truth. They want to raise the cost of speaking freely so high that we'd rather just keep our mouths shut to avoid all the hassle and penalties. They're asking us if we're willing to silence ourselves just to make things easier.** ****Our answer to that is NO. The truth is worth it. Free speech is worth more than whatever they can take from us.**** ** Of course, that's easier said than done. Standing against the censorious Left takes resources. I can tell you right now, The Babylon Bee would not have been able to take the stand that we did against Twitter if it hadn't been for the support of our subscribers.** ** That's our safety net. That's what gives us the confidence to fight back against big tech without being afraid of them putting us out of business. They can hurt us. Sure, they can reduce our reach and smear us in the media, but they can't shut us down. We have our supporters to thank for that. **I hope you'll consider joining the fight by****[**becoming a paid subscriber to the Babylon Bee.**](http://trk.libertyledger._O3RXc0swNwnDg)**** ** But don't just support us. Support defenders of freedom wherever you find them. Subscribe to X Premium to support Elon. Ditch Disney and subscribe to the Daily Wire. Back anyone bold enough to say what's true, even if it comes at a cost. Especially if it comes at a cost. They'll be that much more fearless and that much harder to stop if they have a whole army of freedom-loving subscribers at their backs.
---
[**YES, I'LL STAND WITH THE BEE**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
Thanks for standing with us. We will continue to stand with you. Sincerely,Seth Dillon
CEO, The Babylon Bee
---
|
---
_Copyright(C) 2024 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved._
**Our mailing address is:**
The Babylon Bee, LLC
PO Box 546
Jupiter, FL 33468
---
Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.libertyledger.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MTQ3LWNmYmU4ZjJlOWY0YjQwNDE4ZDgxODU0ODFjNTkxYTI4IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/arZzlINVOt1C7J3aRKhjBw) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Their rise and fall
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsCR0rTWNz
We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and
powerful emperors.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osCR0rTWNz

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

We
generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and
powerful emperors.

But
overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of
imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through
a far different form of government.

Did you
know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his
Empire from the Roman Republic?

The story
of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes
in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the
Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating
narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the
perils of success.

To help
tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently
released our free online course, "The Rise and Fall of the Roman
Republic."

You can
now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the
Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or
more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of
liberty.

And, for
a limited time, we'll also send you a free color map of the Roman
world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper.
This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will
illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.

Simply
use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of "The Rise and
Fall of the Roman Republic," along with the companion map today:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63215107:sCR0rTWNz:m:3:2627245898:36686625AAF4F0527335F1DDC57DB016:r

Learning
the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary
to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way.
That's why we produced "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"
and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Before I
go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future
generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale
College!

Best
regards,

Kyle
Murnen, '09
Director
of Online Learning
Hillsdale
College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isCR0rTWNz

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osCR0rTWNz

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Rick Scott could be our next Senate leader
body:
when I saw this news, I was sick to my stomach:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T23bbb42f-41a2-49eb-8634-7ae36f09fdb9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| | | Peter, when I saw this news, I was sick to my stomach: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3da34f17-3799-443b-a967-8b7ff8ca1432/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This means my race to retire Rick Scott could decide BOTH the Senate majority and the majority leader. If we thought the current GOP Senate leadership was bad, we really don't want the guy whose agenda was too extreme for Mitch McConnell to take his place. He already laid out his plan for the country: ❌Pass a national abortion ban ❌End Medicare and Social Security ❌Raise taxes on the middle class Now more than ever, it is vital that we kick him to the curb this November. [So please, Peter, we need to raise $250,000 by midnight to make sure this nightmare won't come true. I'm counting on you to do your part before 11:59 p.m. and split $19 or anything you can between Blue Amp Action and my campaign to help me flip Florida blue, defend our Democratic majority, and block a Rick Scott-led Senate.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfc876f60-cb21-40dd-b5db-dc08c9202c17/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf6a84b65-dfb2-4102-8e5e-88d2d5c89918/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Make no mistake: Mitch McConnell's time as Senate GOP leader was one of the worst things to ever happen to the Senate. It will take years for our country and our democracy to fully recover from his decades of corruption, cronyism, extremism, and obstruction. But Rick Scott as Senate GOP leader would be much, much worse. He oversaw one of the biggest Medicare frauds in U.S. history and used the money to buy his seat. Then he wrote the plan to raise taxes on working families and end Medicare and Social Security. THEN, he co-sponsored a nationwide ban on abortions that could send doctors to prison. All that destruction and he's only been in the Senate for a single term. Imagine what he could do as GOP Leader. In short — Rick Scott shouldn't be allowed to step foot in the U.S. Senate, let alone lead the GOP caucus, whether they have the majority or not. But with McConnell out of the way, Scott is under the impression that this will be an easy win. I need your help to prove him wrong. [This is a make-or-break moment not just for my campaign but for our entire country. My team set a $250,000 emergency fundraising goal to make sure we never see a Rick Scott-led Senate, and it will take each and every one of us doing our part to hit it. I'm hoping I can count on you to split just $10 between Blue Amp Action and my campaign to make sure we don't fall short so we can defeat Rick Scott.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T75434308-8062-46ff-b9e6-a913d93ef999/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb8de9c7-a84e-40f6-8bad-0a1b1f25abae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Let's do this. Debbie Mucarsel-Powell

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: The key to Lincoln's rhetorical success
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7ooYuD_m4YW1GQUzgi68iA~~/AARclAA~)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: There is no time for games or gimmicks.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Lara Trump, Mike Johnson, Steve Scalise, John Kennedy, and Donald Trump Jr. all reached out to you personally. Now I'm personally asking you to step up before the deadline.

| |

---
| | | I was worried when we barely won the House in 2022...

I was really worried when we lost the NY Special Election...

I was even more worried when we dropped to a ONE-SEAT Majority last month...

Now come to find out Democrats have $76 MILLION ready to unleash against us...

**This is officially an emergency situation for Conservatives everywhere.** On top of our ever-shrinking House Majority, we're also barreling toward our all-important May deadline - and I don't want Conservatives to lose!

_**[There is no time for games or gimmicks. I'm rushing to you - in the final hours we have left - to pitch in at least ten or twenty bucks before our key deadline.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8c9d5bb1a5aa491d81f90150957cc1fd&_e=KgoeJVUqogvijNlPSJqq2qS57tm6uUzIlLuLt2RmPEDLt4YNlZojdCPG4NUffyH1unBL8PE9YPO5VlGVi7_saiu564nC8g6_1eUipkJb_xnGixg2ewNDtuP4pjyu9Gdd_ETplsEQF22NjPjrLFfJZpPO9lcYtvqXc4GpKGmmBUugYkypcUwg8ZBqOLJcVV80vD4wvpFDFwf5opMd5FOnDhURRUzzkkUINfgEZh1jrqTfZHti7sTUCOxtjQoP-TMHu8p3M2qqnx2h6HWbyYoiT-fANehdGYice8JNNNdw7DTYgCCcJ-5igR2zlguE6vo1f28E0DgUL_6QE98h_wh9rPw1_o0PDnv8fcKkUQOJJV3UN2U2y7pLmn43TOcDUWGOxEpnwpIKhwCkxeaUoIXHlLHKG9n2chr8EWCYS8WQ6rS8fDiPH28W3DaBo4XT9939 "There is no time for games or gimmicks. I’m rushing to you – in the final hours we have left – to pitch in at least ten or twenty bucks before our key deadline.")**_

Do not forget this:

_Our Conservative House Majority is the only thing standing in the way of Joe Biden taking full control and ramming through anything he wants._

That includes PACKING the Supreme Court, RAISING your taxes, GUTTING voter ID, CENSORING Conservatives, and GREENLIGHTING mass amnesty...

**And our House Majority firewall is hanging on by a thread. **

We have until 11:59 PM on 5/31/2024 to hit our goal. After that, our fundraising numbers go public and nothing we can do will change it. If we fail and come up short, the consequences would be unimaginable.

This is officially an emergency situation for Conservatives everywhere. On top of our ever-shrinking House Majority, we're also barreling toward our all-important May deadline - and I don't want Conservatives to lose! "There is no time for games or gimmicks. I’m rushing to you – in the final hours we have left – to pitch in at least ten or twenty bucks before our key deadline." Do not forget this: Our Conservative House Majority is the only thing standing in the way of Joe Biden taking full control and ramming through anything he wants. That includes PACKING the Supreme Court, RAISING your taxes, GUTTING voter ID, CENSORING Conservatives, and GREENLIGHTING mass amnesty... And our House Majority firewall is hanging on by a thread. name: Charlie Kirk
subject: URGENT: Biden’s Illegal Executive Order
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
[Unsubscribe]({{unsubscribeMessageTypeUrl}})
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63215191:W_R7ATWNN:m:1:2625680565:712568D87EC753721D38D5607CC6D681:r)

Friend,

**URGENT: Biden's new Executive Order 14019 will turn Federal government agencies to act as Biden's personal "Get-Out-The-Vote" machine.**

While courts may take up the case, here's what I fear the most...

Republicans in Congress do not have the willpower to stop this unprecedented and unconstitutional use of our government to interfere with our elections in 2024. Republicans are already behind the Democratic machine to turn out votes, and this will only increase their efforts.

No wonder Biden and his campaign are "increasingly confident" they will win despite bad polling and collapsing approval numbers.

I'm not going to sit aside and do nothing. And neither should you.

Here's my solution:

**I am directing Turning Point PAC to fund the largest ballot-chasing army ever in key electoral states. The success of this operation will determine the White House and help elect President Donald J. Trump.**

Here's how you can help:

[As a personal favor to me, can you send an urgent donation today of $20.24, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 to fund ballot chasing in key states? name: Stephanie Mohr
subject: Stand with police
body:
I'm asking you to sign this Emergency Pardon Petition because right now a decorated police officer is sitting in prison for doing his job.

| |
---
| |
---
Dear Fellow Patriot, As a wrongly accused police officer who was pardoned by President Trump, I'm asking you to sign this **[**Emergency Pardon Petition**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=230efe689c034860b3941f858e0c9e1e&_e=nZGR_0RwXCQrzoGZ0uwOZrPfW0UQbYBcu-fdQMsmZ4BKLnbOFkdgbsKT9a2X0OchsR3NvD0yxffb2KC2CPT8X4pbWRa37vlG2RANZ2prMN3gMWponLTs5VWAK8UicW5bH7EeHcWZu5b3pgCy6sFWAbOX67o1k9tstOkFyOmp65RiS-6CBY8rbRfp8gQM77sKW1R9tYcJmYkcuiL9WMXx33KLlytLo7ZUS55HI5EhVkctzyuEOhsHHyXB5LxEivL8u_FV_MSWZOtfA36vAexdBfBmQTzeQD9BiDcFljnZG5XtoGGjztUBCl3GO8bjbFfp5hrU4Yyi9k1EsmHKd9XYDwkksZh1ZIO1joFmRLPN1vSB3g2lfW2x1SCOkHcl12Ev)** because right now a decorated police officer is sitting in prison for doing his job. On December 3, 2019, the Kansas City Police Department observed a red pick-up truck chasing another vehicle through the city streets. Officers unsuccessfully attempted to catch the truck - and involved the department's helicopter to track it. The chopper tracked the car to the backyard of a home - and Detective Eric DeValkenaere and his partner were the first to arrive at the scene. Eric approached the passenger side of the pick-up and his partner approached the driver's side, both shouting commands at the driver to STOP and SHOW HIS HANDS. Eric saw the suspect reach toward his waistband and grab a handgun, pointing it directly at his partner. Fearing the suspect would shoot, Eric discharged his firearm four times into the windshield of the pick-up as it continued driving into the garage. When officers entered the garage, they found the suspect deceased with his arm hanging out of the window and his .45 semi-automatic pistol on the ground. (A weapon they would later learn was stolen.) No doubt Eric saved his partner's life that afternoon - and probably his own. **But instead of receiving an award for his heroic actions, Eric DeValkenaere was charged with Involuntary Manslaughter and Armed Criminal Action by a District Attorney desperately trying to hold onto her elected seat on the bench.** Worse, the Missouri Supreme Court just declined to take Eric's case - exhausting his options through the justice system. _Even though the Missouri Attorney General agreed Eric is innocent, woke anti-cop prosecutors and the defund the police mob somehow still won!_ **A pardon from Missouri Governor Mike Parson is one of Eric 's last remaining options for freedom.** **[Now you know why I'm asking you to follow this link to sign the Emergency Pardon Petition right away.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=230efe689c034860b3941f858e0c9e1e&_e=nZGR_0RwXCQrzoGZ0uwOZrPfW0UQbYBcu-fdQMsmZ4BKLnbOFkdgbsKT9a2X0OchsR3NvD0yxffb2KC2CPT8X4pbWRa37vlG2RANZ2prMN3gMWponLTs5VWAK8UicW5bH7EeHcWZu5b3pgCy6sFWAbOX67o1k9tstOkFyOmp65RiS-6CBY8rbRfp8gQM77sKW1R9tYcJmYkcuiL9WMXx3xfF88wReb3V61KGG_wJ3CojDWOFf63G6r9JMbQ0Z9E6dElirWdb4Xhr2uxfRIG9jVg8XSFQfRkD39OqddxNerV_3x3I8qUuMFJORzSmGw5222MOjMbqbX2sdZ128IGijdIe9c0MdGwBfGlI1hhKCmbQyRHMshE8XbdyvXopI8bi)** My name is Stephanie Mohr and I'm proud to be on the Board of Directors for the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund - a non-profit organization that supports and defends wrongly accused officers like Eric. Over the last few years, LELDF has helped many men and women in blue clear their names and win back their freedom. I am also one of those officers LELDF has helped. You see, I used to be a police officer with the Prince George's County Police Department in Maryland. Then one night I was called to a burglary scene. I did everything by the book - including releasing my canine to apprehend the suspect. We arrested the suspect, an illegal immigrant who was convicted and deported. So, imagine my shock when five years later the U.S. Department of Justice announced it was indicting me for violating the suspect's civil rights by allowing my canine to bite and hold his leg so we could arrest him. And after two trials - in which the government flew in two illegal alien criminals to testify against me - I was convicted. I spent ten years in prison. But I was one of the lucky ones - not only did I have LELDF helping me fund and mount my defense - but they also helped me secure a pardon from President Trump restoring my good name. That's why I can't turn my back on a decorated police officer with a wife and three children at home waiting for him. **And I hope you won 't either.** **[**Will you sign the Emergency Pardon Petition to Missouri Governor Mike Parson right away?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=230efe689c034860b3941f858e0c9e1e&_e=nZGR_0RwXCQrzoGZ0uwOZrPfW0UQbYBcu-fdQMsmZ4BKLnbOFkdgbsKT9a2X0OchsR3NvD0yxffb2KC2CPT8X4pbWRa37vlG2RANZ2prMN3gMWponLTs5VWAK8UicW5bH7EeHcWZu5b3pgCy6sFWAbOX67o1k9tstOkFyOmp65RiS-6CBY8rbRfp8gQM77sKW1R9tYcJmYkcuiL9WMXx37T5F0dQNb92aj3saPm1gyHUjU3aLO0jSTATN8iZmW4AxJLcOQYCByZpEUgMikuDCytX7My3z96FM6zzxwfr_93_jnEeE_FFoaLICIWZY1iMyn3_sEb5i7rf6DY_v39nLkl9-k3oC2tZfEKgk9ucgz4HFGlG8orKCigoVJ4UzkOb)** Eric should have been commended for his service and life-saving actions that day, not convicted and sentenced to years in prison! The reality is we can't get back the last several months Eric has been sitting in prison or the nearly four years this nightmare has been hanging over his head. But with your help today, we can bring Eric home to his wife and three children. **[So please, won't you take just 30 seconds of your time right now to sign the Emergency Pardon Petition to Governor Mike Parson?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=230efe689c034860b3941f858e0c9e1e&_e=nZGR_0RwXCQrzoGZ0uwOZrPfW0UQbYBcu-fdQMsmZ4BKLnbOFkdgbsKT9a2X0OchsR3NvD0yxffb2KC2CPT8X4pbWRa37vlG2RANZ2prMN3gMWponLTs5VWAK8UicW5bH7EeHcWZu5b3pgCy6sFWAbOX67o1k9tstOkFyOmp65RiS-6CBY8rbRfp8gQM77sKW1R9tYcJmYkcuiL9WMXx3x-4LMLu7zx7pU8Xs_lskaYVxHbFBwGr-YlA9w8EEB4guGF0hJ46gH4ApwOpXYVLKTYSx_ROnJpGKgkirbJyiVJSNKjvojSNOCcSFMT2cfS2tctbz95x6gkIOFZXsW1nWeLz5yy6wXeYFTYRxYV5pcDDjKDt2j-RA1WBsSo5lqvL)** After signing the petition, please make a generous donation to LELDF to fund this petition and the legal defenses of eight officers (including Eric) they currently support. Remember, LELDF is able to support wrongly accused and convicted officers like Eric and me because of the generosity of patriots like you. And with a pardon the final option to secure Eric's freedom and restore his good name, I'm begging you to [**sign the Emergency Pardon Petition today**.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=230efe689c034860b3941f858e0c9e1e&_e=nZGR_0RwXCQrzoGZ0uwOZrPfW0UQbYBcu-fdQMsmZ4BKLnbOFkdgbsKT9a2X0OchsR3NvD0yxffb2KC2CPT8X4pbWRa37vlG2RANZ2prMN3gMWponLTs5VWAK8UicW5bH7EeHcWZu5b3pgCy6sFWAbOX67o1k9tstOkFyOmp65RiS-6CBY8rbRfp8gQM77sKW1R9tYcJmYkcuiL9WMXx376jY7usH-ErzGUnyFfSCpYY6RT0D0tOS0a8qabgxVWBn9cZvW8JU3aye1ZsatqFB2XYI7Y1NtJUyWBmP6MHOSfgi3LpP4Tqrfqt4TZt61MkS6xrZvzBcKYFx8PWiqPcJuH4ooHHewpIcM6uoyEJVOJ8C_dnY5U7ZALVqVOta35N) Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Gratefully,
---
---
Stephanie Mohr Director, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund P.S. Without your immediate action, Eric DeValkenaere - a decorated Kansas City Police Detective - will spend the next six years behind bars. His three beautiful children won't have their biggest cheerleader at their graduations, maybe even their weddings. And the only way to get him out is to get Missouri Governor Mike Parson to pardon him. **[Will you please take 30 seconds right now to sign the Emergency Pardon Petition and help me fight for Eric's freedom?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=230efe689c034860b3941f858e0c9e1e&_e=nZGR_0RwXCQrzoGZ0uwOZrPfW0UQbYBcu-fdQMsmZ4BKLnbOFkdgbsKT9a2X0OchsR3NvD0yxffb2KC2CPT8X4pbWRa37vlG2RANZ2prMN3gMWponLTs5VWAK8UicW5bH7EeHcWZu5b3pgCy6sFWAbOX67o1k9tstOkFyOmp65RiS-6CBY8rbRfp8gQM77sKW1R9tYcJmYkcuiL9WMXx35WpJC0-ACwCUMLdEvXesA6eQB-CXOPiInpzIobOLUmgcTkHtlCF1XDkJdCDIGFe2g5PQVXsgE4KZC5T4a_dTP1vtPakc6M9RBNg8CHSC_m4qaL7R_40Ay-XxIH-6MYug8kHJV8UECNNvnEbpPNfCsm32zqnFZyZL5HmxO6VKdtB)** I hope you'll also make a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF. No matter what, please pray for Eric and his heartbroken family.
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=230efe689c034860b3941f858e0c9e1e&_e=nZGR_0RwXCQrzoGZ0uwOZrPfW0UQbYBcu-fdQMsmZ4BKLnbOFkdgbsKT9a2X0OchsR3NvD0yxffb2KC2CPT8X4pbWRa37vlG2RANZ2prMN3gMWponLTs5VWAK8UicW5bH7EeHcWZu5b3pgCy6sFWAbOX67o1k9tstOkFyOmp65RiS-6CBY8rbRfp8gQM77sKW1R9tYcJmYkcuiL9WMXx39-rfzXJBngeZgIE1O6w0OLd2LyVg19p1vOaLGgTWBGauO8OQZSp-dm-WAL27NhICFvuC6295VdEhf87IKdsaUgu_T8cvB62gnZZEQSXS4yV5JhSuQElL73cGWdgypDR_mrrpGd9R6xCex4f-ngUQuySUAuHJ9haouD9-XMPRYLT)
---
| | _More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_

clean_body: I'm asking you to sign this Emergency Pardon Petition because right now a decorated police officer is sitting in prison for doing his job. | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, As a wrongly accused police officer who was pardoned by President Trump, I'm asking you to sign this because right now a decorated police officer is sitting in prison for doing his job. On December 3, 2019, the Kansas City Police Department observed a red pick-up truck chasing another vehicle through the city streets. Officers unsuccessfully attempted to catch the truck - and involved the department's helicopter to track it. The chopper tracked the car to the backyard of a home - and Detective Eric DeValkenaere and his partner were the first to arrive at the scene. Eric approached the passenger side of the pick-up and his partner approached the driver's side, both shouting commands at the driver to STOP and SHOW HIS HANDS. Eric saw the suspect reach toward his waistband and grab a handgun, pointing it directly at his partner. Fearing the suspect would shoot, Eric discharged his firearm four times into the windshield of the pick-up as it continued driving into the garage. When officers entered the garage, they found the suspect deceased with his arm hanging out of the window and his .45 semi-automatic pistol on the ground. (A weapon they would later learn was stolen.) No doubt Eric saved his partner's life that afternoon - and probably his own. But instead of receiving an award for his heroic actions, Eric DeValkenaere was charged with Involuntary Manslaughter and Armed Criminal Action by a District Attorney desperately trying to hold onto her elected seat on the bench. Worse, the Missouri Supreme Court just declined to take Eric's case - exhausting his options through the justice system. Even though the Missouri Attorney General agreed Eric is innocent, woke anti-cop prosecutors and the defund the police mob somehow still won! A pardon from Missouri Governor Mike Parson is one of Eric 's last remaining options for freedom. My name is Stephanie Mohr and I'm proud to be on the Board of Directors for the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund - a non-profit organization that supports and defends wrongly accused officers like Eric. Over the last few years, LELDF has helped many men and women in blue clear their names and win back their freedom. I am also one of those officers LELDF has helped. You see, I used to be a police officer with the Prince George's County Police Department in Maryland. Then one night I was called to a burglary scene. I did everything by the book - including releasing my canine to apprehend the suspect. We arrested the suspect, an illegal immigrant who was convicted and deported. So, imagine my shock when five years later the U.S. Department of Justice announced it was indicting me for violating the suspect's civil rights by allowing my canine to bite and hold his leg so we could arrest him. And after two trials - in which the government flew in two illegal alien criminals to testify against me - I was convicted. I spent ten years in prison. But I was one of the lucky ones - not only did I have LELDF helping me fund and mount my defense - but they also helped me secure a pardon from President Trump restoring my good name. That's why I can't turn my back on a decorated police officer with a wife and three children at home waiting for him. And I hope you won 't either. Eric should have been commended for his service and life-saving actions that day, not convicted and sentenced to years in prison! The reality is we can't get back the last several months Eric has been sitting in prison or the nearly four years this nightmare has been hanging over his head. But with your help today, we can bring Eric home to his wife and three children. After signing the petition, please make a generous donation to LELDF to fund this petition and the legal defenses of eight officers (including Eric) they currently support. Remember, LELDF is able to support wrongly accused and convicted officers like Eric and me because of the generosity of patriots like you. And with a pardon the final option to secure Eric's freedom and restore his good name, I'm begging you to Thank you in advance for your support. | | Gratefully, Stephanie Mohr Director, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund P.S. Without your immediate action, Eric DeValkenaere - a decorated Kansas City Police Detective - will spend the next six years behind bars. His three beautiful children won't have their biggest cheerleader at their graduations, maybe even their weddings. And the only way to get him out is to get Missouri Governor Mike Parson to pardon him. I hope you'll also make a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF. No matter what, please pray for Eric and his heartbroken family. | | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! | | | ---|---|--- (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsC3a1TW8N

I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of
their heroes. For those people-and you may be among them-I'm
thrilled to share a digital
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osC3a1TW8N

Dear
Friend,
I hear
from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their
heroes. For those people-and you may be among them-I'm thrilled
to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you,
absolutely free: "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the
Rich."

"Tax cuts
for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower
tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy
Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the
federal government?

Hoover
Institution Senior Fellow Thomas Sowell takes an empirical
approach in his commentary, "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts
for the Rich."

Sowell
separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses
real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all
actually lead to greater revenue for the government.

As a
friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to
offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of
charge.

Click
here to get your free copy of "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts
for the Rich" now.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, When I saw the results of this poll, I was absolutely STUNNED - President Trump is trailing Joe Biden by just ONE POINT in Virginia. And less than half of Virginians said that they would support Tim Kaine for U.S. Senate. The best part: Biden’s OWN pollster is the one saying all of this. Our movement and our momentum is working, Peter. The commonwealth is sick of career politicians like Joe Biden and Tim Kaine. They’re ready for REAL leadership from political outsiders who will get the job done. I’ve been saying it for months, and now, the experts are finally catching up to us: Virginia is in play. For too long, we’ve been discarded as a throw-away blue state. But now is the time we STAND UP to the DC politicians who have used us as their liberal playground for too long. I believe in this movement, and I believe in our team. Now, it’s time to get to work. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret) | TEXT HUNG TO 21412 Hung Cao: I came to America with little besides the clothes on my back.But with faith, dedication, and hard work, my family and I made it in America. I’m running for Senate to defend the American Dream that gave me everything.The Left is on a war path against the values that make us the greatest country on Earth. I didn’t put my life on the line defending those values in Special Operations in the Navy to let the Left destroy them. We are fueled by grassroots patriots like you. Even just a dollar or two makes all the difference.Thank you for standing with us! | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. **Rick Scott Suggests He Was ‘Persecuted’ Over Giant Medicare Fraud**
---
Pretty rich, isn't it? **Rick Scott thinks extremists like himself and Trump are victims of "political persecution" — and not: **
* The seniors, working families, and more whose health insurance was swindled by his company as he amassed a quarter-billion-dollar fortune.

* The poll workers and local public officials on the frontlines of politically motivated verbal and physical assaults from those who fall for the "Big Lie."

* The women, families, and medical providers whose futures and even _lives_ are in jeopardy from cruel reproductive health care crackdowns he's spent his political career pushing down our throats.

We could go on, but we think it's clear that to rich extremists like Rick Scott, **accountability _must_ feel like persecution when your wealth and privilege have always shielded you from the worst consequences of your actions.**
**But most Americans are not afforded that luxury.**
So if Rick can't deal with the fallout of his corruption, even from a golden parachute flying high above us normal people down here, _he needs a new job_.
Sadly, there's no chance he resigns anytime soon — **so Debbie Mucarsel-Powell needs all the support it'll take for her grassroots campaign to withstand his self-funded attack ads and send him to an early retirement.**
And with 14% left to hit her $600,000 weekly goal, and only hours until the deadline, it's all hands on deck to show Scott what true accountability feels like at the polls.
