name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: B+L Weekly Reads: In a Shocking Twist, Philly's New Mayor is Normal | Exclusive Data + More ⚡🔔
body:
News + editorial to start your week. | | | |
---
| | | Good morning, and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f56b1f3769&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Cherelle Parker is unapologetically normal – much to her critics’ dismay](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=932d1a663c&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Terry Tracy_

Parker’s recent strides in restoring order across the city – from Kensington’s drug encampments to the anti-Israel protests in University City – are not acts of conservative betrayal as some whisper, but are refreshingly actionable policy initiatives, a rarity from the stale halls of Philadelphia City Hall.

If her critics are rattled, it’s because they’ve become unaccustomed to pragmatic leadership in a city now too long marooned by dangerously unqualified, overly dogmatic “progressives” at its helm with lawlessness and societal decay in their wake.

**Why It Matters**. Parker’s new era is transforming both city streets and City Hall’s notoriously ineffectual City Council chambers, where her proposed budget slashes nearly a million dollars from Prevention Point Philadelphia, a non-profit which provides sterile syringes to drug users.

Swatting away critics, Parker defended the cut as a measure of both fiscal and moral prudence. Simply put, Parker supports the program’s merits, wishes the organization well, but makes clear that the city – and its taxpayers – are not picking up the tab.

More recently, Mayor Parker announced that her administration would begin a thirteen week process on June 3rd to clean every street in the city. According to the Inquirer, the city’s director of clean and green initiatives will coordinate a multi-agency effort to collect trash, sweep streets, fill potholes, tow abandoned cars, remove illegal dumping, and fix abandoned properties.

Pick up trash! Fill potholes! Go figure. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ab23951c0a&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Hold the phone!](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=58fa3adc04&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Beth Ann Rosica_
Government overreach is what propelled me into politics, advocacy, and ultimately journalism. As someone who fought to open schools, eliminate mandatory masking, and help pass the constitutional amendment limiting the governor’s powers, I am not a fan of the government interfering in my life or parenting decisions.

So, when I read Senator Ryan Aument’s (R-Lancaster) proposed legislation to restrict cell phones in schools, I had mixed feelings. On the one hand, as a parent to teenagers, I see the daily, negative effects of excessive technology use, and I question whether it is as dangerous for them as drinking alcohol or taking drugs. But as a libertarian committed to the least amount of government possible, I was not completely sold on the concept that the state needed to intervene.

That is, until I read _The Anxious Generation_ , by Jonathan Haidt, published earlier this year. If a genie granted me one wish, I would ask that every parent and educator read this book. The author presents a compelling argument why schools should ban cell phones, in addition to granting more play time.

**Why It Matters**. Many people mistakenly assume that cell phones are already banned or limited in schools. However, the reality is that in most public schools, kids are still accessing their phones even if they are not allowed to. Many schools have rules that phones cannot be used during class, but kids find a way to sneak looking at them, and teachers should not have to sacrifice instructional time to police illicit cell phone use.

According to Haidt, much of the drama, bullying, and violence that occurs in schools stems from social media that is being accessed during the school day. If those issues could be reduced and student mental health improved with an inexpensive simple decision, why would we not do that?

**Quotable**. “Between 2010 and 2015, the social lives of American teens moved largely onto smartphones with continuous access to social media, online video games, and other internet-based activities. This Great Rewiring of Childhood, I argue, is the single largest reason for the tidal wave of adolescent mental illness that began in the early 2010’s.” – Jonathan Haidt, _The Anxious Generation_ **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=917393c9d4&e=b7b3eddce2)**

# **5\. What we're reading**
Martin Gurri’s _The Revolt of the Public_ captured the zeitgeist around the worldwide discontent with elite leadership in the 2010s. This week at _The Free Press_ , Gurri has [an essay continuing that theme](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bc305c60aa&e=b7b3eddce2) into the present day. “The elite dream,” he writes, “is to turn the clock back to the day before the internet was invented,” to once again control what information makes its way to the masses. They will not succeed. “It rarely works. The chaos and contingencies of the digital age allow the normies and their chosen tribunes, the populists, too much room to maneuver. Trump’s rise in the opinion polls would otherwise be inexplicable.”

clean_body: News + editorial to start your week. | | | | | | | Good morning, and welcome to Broad + Liberty 's Weekly Reads. and get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Terry Tracy Parker’s recent strides in restoring order across the city – from Kensington’s drug encampments to the anti-Israel protests in University City – are not acts of conservative betrayal as some whisper, but are refreshingly actionable policy initiatives, a rarity from the stale halls of Philadelphia City Hall. If her critics are rattled, it’s because they’ve become unaccustomed to pragmatic leadership in a city now too long marooned by dangerously unqualified, overly dogmatic “progressives” at its helm with lawlessness and societal decay in their wake. Why It Matters. Parker’s new era is transforming both city streets and City Hall’s notoriously ineffectual City Council chambers, where her proposed budget slashes nearly a million dollars from Prevention Point Philadelphia, a non-profit which provides sterile syringes to drug users. Swatting away critics, Parker defended the cut as a measure of both fiscal and moral prudence. Simply put, Parker supports the program’s merits, wishes the organization well, but makes clear that the city – and its taxpayers – are not picking up the tab. More recently, Mayor Parker announced that her administration would begin a thirteen week process on June 3rd to clean every street in the city. According to the Inquirer, the city’s director of clean and green initiatives will coordinate a multi-agency effort to collect trash, sweep streets, fill potholes, tow abandoned cars, remove illegal dumping, and fix abandoned properties. name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Our big opportunity (Wisconsin)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
New maps in Wisconsin are a huge win for democracy and our fight for free and fair elections.
#
Friend — **We have a big opportunity here in Wisconsin.**
Just a few months ago, Governor Tony Evers signed into law a new set of fair legislative maps for Wisconsin that put both the House and Senate in play for Democrats.
So, we’re launching our _Wisconsin Flip the Legislature Fund_ to help Democrats WIN these crucial races in November.
[**If that’s all you need to hear, rush a contribution using the button below and help us flip the legislature in Wisconsin >>**](?refcode=em240526-1-subs)
Otherwise, please read on.
[DONATE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-wi24.Gg86B2&refcode=em240526-1-subs&t=1&akid=5309%2E196590%2EUf1H1o)
The creation of new state legislature maps in Wisconsin was a huge win for democracy and our fight for free and fair elections.
Republicans have controlled our state legislature since 2011 thanks to their abuse of power and extreme gerrymandering.
They have blocked attempt after attempt to bring fairness to our state elections. But after a decade of hard work, we have finally secured justice.
If we can flip both the House and the Senate this year, Democrats can get to work on long-overdue priorities, from voting rights, to gun violence prevention, and climate action.
I know not everyone reading this is from Wisconsin, but this year’s legislative elections will affect all of us, across the country.
Because we can’t win the White House without Wisconsin, and Republicans have shown time and time again they will use the power of the state legislature to thwart our democracy.
So, what do you say?
[**Chip in to our Wisconsin Flip the Legislature Fund today. Help us fight for our democracy here in Wisconsin.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-wi24.Gg86B2&refcode=em240526-1-subs&t=2&akid=5309%2E196590%2EUf1H1o)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $3](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-wi24.T-f0kC&amount=3&refcode=em240526-1-subs&t=21&akid=5309%2E196590%2EUf1H1o)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-wi24.uo-MX6&refcode=em240526-1-subs&t=22&akid=5309%2E196590%2EUf1H1o)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-wi24.K-boP8&refcode=em240526-1-subs&t=23&akid=5309%2E196590%2EUf1H1o)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-wi24.OKnNa9&refcode=em240526-1-subs&t=24&akid=5309%2E196590%2EUf1H1o)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-wi24.2Fc5SO&refcode=em240526-1-subs&t=25&akid=5309%2E196590%2EUf1H1o)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-wi24.Gg86B2&refcode=em240526-1-subs&t=26&akid=5309%2E196590%2EUf1H1o)
Thank you for your time today, and any helping hand you can lend to our campaign.
Mandela Barnes
The Long Run PAC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=5309%2E196590%2EUf1H1o). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=28&akid=5309%2E196590%2EUf1H1o)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=29&refcode2=5309_196590_Uf1H1o&akid=5309%2E196590%2EUf1H1o)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=30&akid=5309%2E196590%2EUf1H1o)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

| | Dear Friend, I'm thrilled to be the official Republican candidate for Senate in California, and I owe much of my success so far to grassroots donors like you. Our average online donation is $41.65, but [**today I'm reaching out for a special contribution of $6.**](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=11c03086cf884c289b62c3446c9338b4&_e=4iA3NzCS56_8C7KEScCa0jA1n6w4Qt1jPGeB_qbxGRimFeWX2u-_GBGkCtprEKtq5MUfujnv2j9_M0L_HlyetxouB2Zn85H_QjQbYlw-fy_8e4R43RYE0JiuAD6ZgrgWKhxemMHZ7AFkbl8_1CYlGLqYNS-SANeuS2r_KTS-zKL2gUug4SS1MMX3moN2IP3g3B0igzcnT65Sl_wjrC5c7f8dEZlpEkrEO_76KLHOdOaVW3N2fktdkS9JO2eZpOitZuYloOEmu7Gumsz9nj7X1WfEGmBtS-qk1GdKI2bx8GqNulYDAdcQjWsSsugjsvxZG-smRU7R-tUb40X2herOIIX8fAB0i4qx0ohNYfy5o0uOzU-jeXUVhfAMTf021EoZFxGZIikI5YzqYEEgP76jbg%3D%3D) The number 6 holds a special significance for me--it was the number on my jersey every time I took the field to represent Californians during my time with the Dodgers and the Padres. Now, my ball playing days are over, but I'm playing in the most important game of my life. A one vs one Senate race that decides whether we can bring common sense back to California or if we are stuck with six years of Adam Schiff in the Senate. Your $6 contribution may seem small compared to the big money in politics, but just like in team sports, every contribution adds up and together we can accomplish something that none of us could possibly achieve on our own. | [**DONATE $6**](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=11c03086cf884c289b62c3446c9338b4&_e=4iA3NzCS56_8C7KEScCa0jA1n6w4Qt1jPGeB_qbxGRimFeWX2u-_GBGkCtprEKtq5MUfujnv2j9_M0L_HlyetxouB2Zn85H_QjQbYlw-fy_8e4R43RYE0JiuAD6ZgrgWKhxemMHZ7AFkbl8_1CYlGLqYNS-SANeuS2r_KTS-zKL2gUug4SS1MMX3moN2IP3g3B0igzcnT65Sl_wjrC5c7f8dEZlpEkrEO_76KLHOdOZtc2gJ488OL4WAAT1tsem4ojpG_V96gjYC9bfYaLihy7KlqU6n_ZH6DwgdeAmjHv_8o0FLG3GHJYDbWmZU2R3QjXmZ7-jPMpY4UP1yuFJKXaJg_V7HSEqVwZqBf2Y_VLKMa3Tdls7bUMK4TTc_kWL73jZqoJ5zuDcaphbgJP_J_w%3D%3D)

And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808 If you would like to send donation by mail, This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails **

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: They’re spending 20 TIMES more than groups supporting Jamaal Bowman
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Despite being an incumbent, progressive champion Rep. Jamaal Bowman is the
underdog in his June Democratic primary. First, AIPAC’s super PAC United
Democracy Project dropped nearly $2 million in a week's worth of ads
attacking Jamaal and supporting his conservative opponent, George Latimer.

Now, UDP is up to $5.9 million in reserved ad spending in New York’s 16th
congressional district — the most they’ve EVER spent in a single race.

With help from AIPAC’s Republican megadonors and other dark money groups,
outside spending for Latimer is now over 20 times more than the amount
being spent in support of Jamaal. That’s a problem.

Between now and the June 25th primary, AIPAC’s network will flood the
airwaves of NY-16 with lies and misinformation to smear Jamaal while
claiming Latimer will fight MAGA extremists as he takes money from them.

Latimer may have a bigger war chest thanks to AIPAC’s right-wing
millionaire and billionaire donors, but we have you: the people.

We overcame the odds to elect Jamaal and other members of the Squad
before, and we can do it again this June if enough people chip in what
they can when they can.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240526.IgzY0v&refcode=em20240526-34982&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=34982%2E1203867%2EfF1NIg ]Will you rush $5 now to fuel Justice Democrats’ work to
re-elect Jamaal and reject AIPAC at the ballot box next month? Time is
running out, and we can’t do this without you!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240526.IgzY0v&refcode=em20240526-34982&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1020&akid=34982%2E1203867%2EfF1NIg ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240526-34982-footer&t=1021&refcode2=34982_1203867_fF1NIg&akid=34982%2E1203867%2EfF1NIg

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=34982%2E1203867%2EfF1NIg

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603

Friend, since becoming the Democratic nominee for Senate here in Maryland, we’ve received thousands of grassroots donations from folks who are ready to do whatever it takes to defeat Larry Hogan and keep this seat blue.

_But here’s the thing, friend:__**The GOP is celebrating, too.**_

Hogan is Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate for this race, and it’s going to be incredibly difficult to defeat him and the dark money super PACs behind his campaign.
**[Whoever capitalizes on this momentum right now will have a huge advantage in the weeks and months ahead, which is why we set an ambitious General Election Founding Donor Goal. Will you chip in a split donation of $10 between my campaign and Jacky Rosen’s to make sure we hit it?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85657565/475473345/-2022918936?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=10&refcode=jtk3836-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTU4Yjk5Ni02NzFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I-ZwVPMTBs_905lDgrwhGmoR1q8Mj0Yz-SO1xcdlYEw=)**

Hogan’s victory is a win for the MAGA agenda, friend.

Mitch McConnell got his guy, and now he sees an opportunity to flip this seat red, retake the Senate, and pass a national abortion ban.

_But if we win in November, we’ve got a shot at defending our narrow Senate majority, which means we could restore and expand abortion rights, lower costs for families, and empower workers and unions._
It’s going to take all of the grassroots supporters who got us here — plus we need to bring even more folks into our nationwide coalition of support — to make sure we put Larry Hogan on blast.

[**Hitting our General Election Founding Donor Goal will give us the boost we need right out of the gate to spread our campaign message and set the record straight on Hogan. My Democrat opponent Tammy Baldwin was just caught red-handed campaigning with the head of a radical anti-Cop Leftist group that has called for the "Defunding of the Police."

Baldwin claims to support our men and women in blue, but behind closed doors, she eagerly courts the support of anti-cop extremists.

Wisconsin voters deserve a Senator who won’t waver in their support for Law Enforcement and Public Safety officials.

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: answers to your questions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter,
Our team recently reached out to ask what questions you have about me or this campaign we’re building together. **This week, I sat down to answer a few:**
_What guarantee do your constituents have that you will be a Senator that truly represents them and not lobbyists or just votes along party lines?_
_– Theresa, Clinton County_
You probably won’t hear this from other politicians, but I know that how a candidate chooses to fund their campaign has a real impact on who they actually serve in office.
That’s why, since the first day we launched this campaign to take on Josh Hawley, I’ve been committed to fundraising the right way — without a single cent from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil and Big Pharma execs.
The only people I want to serve in the U.S. Senate are everyday Missourians like the ones who took care of my family after we were bankrupted by medical bills — not the shady corporate elites and mega-donors who’ve made it their business to strip communities across our state, like the one I grew up in, for parts.
In the Senate, I’ll fight for investment in Missouri, to rebuild our forgotten communities, and to finally put everyday Missourians in charge of their own bodies, families, and lives again. And I’ll work with anyone, of any party, to get those things done. That’s my promise to you, and to every Missourian, this year.
_How will you support unions and/or fight against Right to Work for our hard-working Missourians in union jobs?_
_– Krista, Cape Girardeau County_
Labor built this country, and labor will build our future. I’m proud of the truly worker-led coalition we’ve built to take back this Senate seat, with endorsements from dozens of statewide and local unions in every corner of Missouri.
The Missouri AFL-CIO and the Missouri Fire Fighters made their earliest endorsements for a Senate challenger ever in our race because they know there’s only one candidate who will actually fight for workers — and it’s not Josh Hawley.
They know that I’ll pass the PRO Act, so that we can end the threat of “Right to Work” scams across the country and empower workers in their workplaces.
And beyond those protections, I want to build the next generation of energy right here in America — creating generations of good jobs in essential industries, strengthening our national security, and rebuilding communities across our state and nation.
_Do you support protecting social security and Medicare?_
_– Judith, St. Charles County_
I’ll always protect every dollar people like you spend their lives working to earn. And I’ll stand up against any and all attempts to “privatize” or “sunset” Social Security — like Rick Scott, who Hawley wants to make his leader in the U.S. Senate, has been threatening for years.
Social Security Works PAC was the first national organization to endorse our campaign because they know I’ll fight to get you every dollar you’re owed from these critical benefits, and that I won’t let anyone get in my way. It’s that simple.
_BONUS QUESTION: What is the most influential, simple, easy, cost effective way for people to help you in your campaign?_
_– Tyler, Clay County_
There are a few ways you can help.
**Sign up to volunteer.** Later this summer, we’ll have volunteer opportunities available in-person and online for supporters like you to get involved. Use the button below to sign up, and our team will reach out when we have opportunities online or in your area.
**[SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/volunteer?t=1&akid=5609%2E614464%2EJNp2Bz)**
**Spread the word.** Tell your friends and family about our campaign. Share our message on your own social media, and spread the reach of our movement. It’s going to be a real fight to take back this Senate seat, and we’re going to need your help to do it every step of the way.
**Make a donation.** Like I mentioned before, I’m not taking a cent from corporate PACs in this race. I’m counting on real people like you to fuel this movement forward. It could be $3, $30, or $3,300 — every donation, no matter the amount, gives our campaign the resources to communicate our message to voters between now and November 5. And that’s exactly what it’ll take to win this race.
**[MAKE A DONATION NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51020?refcode=em20240526-5609&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5609%2E614464%2EJNp2Bz)**
Thanks for reading along, Peter.
I hope you’re having a good weekend.
— Lucas
P.S. If you have a question you’d like me to answer, **[submit it here:](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20240526-1?t=3&akid=5609%2E614464%2EJNp2Bz)**
**[SUBMIT A QUESTION](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20240526-1?t=4&akid=5609%2E614464%2EJNp2Bz)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240526-5609-footer&t=5&refcode2=5609_614464_JNp2Bz&akid=5609%2E614464%2EJNp2Bz)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=5609%2E614464%2EJNp2Bz). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

subject: Top conservative group spends millions to beat Elissa
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1467%2E135344%2ErPEw2P)

Friend,
DC Republicans have opened the floodgates. It has begun, and it won’t stop here!
We just got word that a dark-money conservative group with ties to Mitch McConnell is spending nearly _$10 million_ here in Michigan to beat us, starting right after the primary election in August. It will be a barrage of digital, TV, and radio ads flooding the state.
And they’re just getting started.
While the ads haven’t been released publicly yet, their history gives us very good reason to believe that they will attack Elissa directly.
This isn’t the first time this year that out-of-state Republicans have torn into Elissa, and it won’t be the last.
With less than 6 months until Election Day, we’re gearing up to make our own big decisions, around ads, staff, field operations, and more. Attacks like these from outside forces influence our decisions, and make it all the more important that we’re able to reach voters with Elissa’s positive message.
[**Will you chip in $3 to help us fight back against attacks from dark-money conservative groups?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-may24.waY6cu&refcode=em240526-1-sma&t=2&akid=1467%2E135344%2ErPEw2P)

clean_body: Friend, DC Republicans have opened the floodgates. It has begun, and it won’t stop here! We just got word that a dark-money conservative group with ties to Mitch McConnell is spending nearly $10 million here in Michigan to beat us, starting right after the primary election in August. It will be a barrage of digital, TV, and radio ads flooding the state. And they’re just getting started. While the ads haven’t been released publicly yet, their history gives us very good reason to believe that they will attack Elissa directly. This isn’t the first time this year that out-of-state Republicans have torn into Elissa, and it won’t be the last. With less than 6 months until Election Day, we’re gearing up to make our own big decisions, around ads, staff, field operations, and more. Attacks like these from outside forces influence our decisions, and make it all the more important that we’re able to reach voters with Elissa’s positive message. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you. Team Slotkin PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

body:

I wanted to personally share the big news, friend: I’m officially launching my first reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Nevada!
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split $25 between my campaign and Serve America today to become a Founding Donor and help fuel our grassroots movement to victory [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen] . But first, let me explain why your support – right now – is so important:

say
that
Nevada
could

again
decide
Senate
control,
which
means
so
many
Democratic
priorities
hinge
on
whether
we’re
able
to
defend
this
crucial
battleground
seat.

2.
Races
in
Nevada
are
won
and
lost
by
razor-thin
margins.
The
last

race
here
came
down
to
just
7,928

–

it
the

in

entire

Meanwhile,
we

3.

reports
that

up

in
2024.
Now,

a
TOP
target
for
defeat
–
and
national
Republicans
have

ads
against
me.
With the GOP setting its sights on Nevada, we need to fight back as early as possible to win. And that means showing we have a strong team of grassroots supporters with us. That’s why we set a goal to reach 10,000 Reelection Founding Donors – and I’m counting on you to be one of them, friend:
So please, will you split $25 between my campaign and Serve America to become a Founding Donor of our first reelection campaign, win in Nevada, and defend the Senate for Democrats? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
Thank you so much, friend. Your support today is absolutely crucial. I’m grateful.
– Jacky Rosen

clean_body: [] I wanted to personally share the big news, friend: I’m officially launching my first reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Nevada! In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split $25 between my campaign and Serve America today to become a Founding Donor and help fuel our grassroots movement to victory [] . But first, let me explain why your support – right now – is so important: 1. Experts at FiveThirtyEight say that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, which means so many Democratic priorities hinge on whether we’re able to defend this crucial battleground seat. 2. Races in Nevada are won and lost by razor-thin margins. The last Senate race here came down to just 7,928 votes – making it the closest in the entire country. Meanwhile, we lost Nevada’s governorship by only 1.5 points. 3. The Washington Post reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024. Now, the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat – and national Republicans have already launched their first wave of attack ads against me. With the GOP setting its sights on Nevada, we need to fight back as early as possible to win. And that means showing we have a strong team of grassroots supporters with us. That’s why we set a goal to reach 10,000 Reelection Founding Donors – and I’m counting on you to be one of them, friend: So please, will you split $25 between my campaign and Serve America to become a Founding Donor of our first reelection campaign, win in Nevada, and defend the Senate for Democrats? clean_body: I’m reaching out to Democrats like you, who will give us the best chance of not only reaching our end-of-month goal but exceeding it. | | Derek, As the Chair of the DNC, I wanted to personally reach out to folks who haven’t donated this year to ask: Not only is it almost the end of the month, but we have fewer than six months until Election Day. Your generosity is essential in supporting our mission of electing Democrats across the country. This mission is only possible through donations from supporters like you. Contributions from this grassroots team allow us to prioritize our campaigns and state parties, fund innovative organizing efforts, expand our voter protection work, and support our data and technology infrastructure. So, Derek, we’re counting on a surge of support from supporters like you who will give us the best chance of not only reaching our goal but exceeding it. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | ---|--- | | Every dollar you pitch in ensures we have the resources we need to fight back against MAGA extremists’ deep pockets and relentless attacks on the values and freedoms that are the backbone of our country. name: Your Donor Record (via DLCC.org)
subject: $7 to represent your community...
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund
body:
We’re facing hundreds of elections across the map this November, and Republicans have already dumped huge sums of money into battleground states this year. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**21,000.** That’s how many grassroots Democrats have committed to defending our democracy against Republican voter suppression. **21,000** Democrats have taken a meaningful step to elect leaders who will protect abortion access in our statehouses. **21,000** Democrats have joined a movement larger than themselves to fight against Republican extremism. **Grassroots supporters from every state in the country have donated to our movement to elect state Dems. But you still haven’t joined them.** We’re facing hundreds of elections across the map this November, and Republicans have already dumped over _$47 million_ into battleground states this year. subject: Re: Sign to demand university administrators stop criminalizing student protests
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Students are putting their bodies on the line to demand their universities divest from genocide. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWhE3KUtd-3AvUmQV2eqr7CHryyWVclUo1yCFKY-LgdkA5BJ4VJuww08zTzT7SFX4GFWeu4f2CHFHMbmJRgUdlw58RInbWI3TLcZ-U0hBsGNtgUkLmFXwg4J0ZUjp7z8wShH_r-efmo4wlqDJV34y4SVERL-jGSATheEKK6ELbEGeq1xr75rZtbx6PmmlvoklJ0HyCRFIp6wCVCRq8hMPncv4vHiz-eE-EKzq8NtedYhmtWwLDWn1GTx3TbBNiGmJQS7TvHTcFar4VuPFbrlCooSf8SIsFSn8MlaDLThVGga8/46o/s5LaQiU_RReRzbKpCFIgDw/h0/h001.2vS51HNgGLZ--gmRI0U9hQGm66KlGLX_4kRdtoJDjW0)
---
Friend, We are witnessing the Israeli apartheid government carry out genocide in Gaza, with support from our government. Students are putting their bodies on the line to demand their universities divest from weapons manufacturers that are sending bombs to murder innocent children in Gaza. They’re joined by movements of people of all ages and backgrounds coming together to say: Palestinians deserve to live. **Why are lawmakers and the mainstream media more outraged by students opposing genocide and apartheid than they are about the over 35,000 Palestinians killed in Gaza?** Why aren’t they outraged about how many U.S. colleges and universities are financially invested in weapons manufacturers and war profiteers? Instead of listening to students who are non-violently protesting for peace, school administrators are instigating brutal arrests to silence students and take away their First Amendment rights. It is outrageous that police officers are now entering college campuses across our nation with their guns drawn, targeting students with pepper spray, tear gas, rubber bullets, tasers, and beatings. [**Sign now to tell school administrators and university and college boards: Listen to your students demanding you divest from genocide, rather than criminalizing them. Academic institutions are places for learning and discussion, not violent crackdowns on our First Amendment right to free speech.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38Rl0EAMX48IJgQ7iCSWsbbcudTzsjCJEadn461GaJZ-4WszxwX2xShkrxHO7jctc0T3vT5eShmvXZJR8E9_CLgxHtoF4FksuNjOSbHladUMzcTKALvVrEVVQUs4m4jrf87E9Omny5y0RSnP0S354IfG-xYWs0BOIxHc4TcbkYfI4Ox69JwJxh4uJHAw8fCweqDIb0G5oel0IGPYNTPNrTUzAC-1VM_GsHe6ClhrNeVFm2v56_SpUkLzTKU3SYkgtzcC5G5Hy7Sbiv8WCoaP_pedj_K607Td2kSv125RSmCl194Ah1005k6q44_zDmpyvi98XptVFkI4lJa6jZDNKht7KXoadvgaV7O5eu_QyvbGwgTji4d12JKsXW6oL18Mia0ORHHvIr1DGRlWVlmn0-qGN-zRwD_aRkT8BUa-rNMMqxggARisZTOyPy2_SR1LfXTDuETvgO7heW4LZTcw47Y3bV3m_8w8Odq7IvYoAqND5zSvbb652dgk4FpPVjgjnFUET7o0C7U1xk_mj-Iaam8/46o/s5LaQiU_RReRzbKpCFIgDw/h1/h001.yH8DJVGLd-xG2KA3JtnsLQzwvEWfvSCY6wk0nlOEJVQ) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38Rl0EAMX48IJgQ7iCSWsbbcudTzsjCJEadn461GaJZ-4WszxwX2xShkrxHO7jctc0T3vT5eShmvXZJR8E9_CLgxHtoF4FksuNjOSbHladUMzcTKALvVrEVVQUs4m4jrf87E9Omny5y0RSnP0S354IfG-xYWs0BOIxHc4TcbkYfI54RbH-TnJ7xjYpMz-O0Lp9KTfzh0SkLFmcfKmwIEcjn7OjKfxhInritUhKrgh3HEcyUQSM3CpXpvyx52OmpkA6Qpmi0qjlm25bzB4paEeKq761onKJ7NbaXRcMCBVTuFh62Tf6tMOKhNoJS9ftFWvZbxgXQQGi3Vew8mupWW0YZTNUqPx5sQd-vAPUy4i9biIlu-V_o9ev0YEXUf9j1V7AR2jVJkXc2sNzPnW2V8mHJgTyb7M8ELgf2DDmXdCnFxeF4zgPTS0Yrib8AFc4lVAylcwofYlKsx62JpatpUH5PXpWAKP0CaxUZ8Chy5hQ8wyadIiZAslYgXqCqiBk0_T7tTshIz7DFO-BhiJdsed_a/46o/s5LaQiU_RReRzbKpCFIgDw/h2/h001.7ooNrlnA8sgVUdNr9G1JtH2eDCD9DrGJhQJjBMxsMB0)
---
I’ve met with many students in recent weeks, including from George Washington University in DC and from the University of Michigan in Ann Arbor. Their energy and commitment is inspiring, and they build on a long history of student dissent.
From the civil rights movement to the anti-apartheid movement in South Africa, students have always been at the forefront of progress.
Already due to this year’s student protests, multiple U.S. institutions of higher education have agreed to divest or explore divesting from companies connected with Israel’s oppression of Palestinians. Graduate student workers at University of California campuses are beginning to strike, demanding divestment and demanding that the public university system stop cracking down on pro-Palestine protests.
We cannot stand by while our government enables mass slaughter and war crimes. And we cannot stand by as we watch escalating police repression against students protesting that violence by exercising their constitutional rights.
Even the United Nations’ Special Rapporteur on the right to education is concerned. She said, _“I am deeply troubled by the violent crackdown on peaceful demonstrators, arrests, detentions, police violence, surveillance and disciplinary measures and sanctions against members of the educational community exercising their right to peaceful assembly and freedom of expression.”_
[**Sign on now to U.S. college and university administrators: Protect your students and their First Amendment rights. From the civil rights movement and beyond, our country has a long history of student activists winning progress.
A few weeks ago I had the opportunity to visit the University of Michigan’s Gaza solidarity encampment on the Diag, an area of campus historically used for student protests. In the 1980s, following student protests for divestment, the state of Michigan passed legislation pushing public colleges and universities to divest from South Africa.
Now, students are peacefully protesting for an end to U.S.-backed atrocities in Palestine, including the destruction of all universities in Gaza.**** Some students are even renaming buildings after Palestinian children that have been killed.
These students should be listened to and praised for standing up for what they believe in, not vilified, silenced, or made homeless after being banned from campus. No student should be met with academic repercussions or police brutality on their own campuses for peacefully exercising their right to free speech and assembly.
**For speaking up about our country’s complicity in human rights violations, more than 3,000 students and faculty have been arrested at Gaza solidarity protests in recent weeks.**
Many have been injured and hospitalized from rubber bullets, tear gas, tasing, and brutal beatings from police—including police choking them and wrestling them to the ground. One professor heard from his doctor that he was lucky to be alive.
[**Please add your name to join the call to U.S. colleges and universities: End the repressive tactics and violent crackdowns on Gaza solidarity encampments. clean_body: Students are putting their bodies on the line to demand their universities divest from genocide. | | | Friend, We are witnessing the Israeli apartheid government carry out genocide in Gaza, with support from our government. Students are putting their bodies on the line to demand their universities divest from weapons manufacturers that are sending bombs to murder innocent children in Gaza. They’re joined by movements of people of all ages and backgrounds coming together to say: Palestinians deserve to live. Why are lawmakers and the mainstream media more outraged by students opposing genocide and apartheid than they are about the over 35,000 Palestinians killed in Gaza? Why aren’t they outraged about how many U.S. colleges and universities are financially invested in weapons manufacturers and war profiteers? Instead of listening to students who are non-violently protesting for peace, school administrators are instigating brutal arrests to silence students and take away their First Amendment rights. It is outrageous that police officers are now entering college campuses across our nation with their guns drawn, targeting students with pepper spray, tear gas, rubber bullets, tasers, and beatings. | I’ve met with many students in recent weeks, including from George Washington University in DC and from the University of Michigan in Ann Arbor. Their energy and commitment is inspiring, and they build on a long history of student dissent. From the civil rights movement to the anti-apartheid movement in South Africa, students have always been at the forefront of progress. Already due to this year’s student protests, multiple U.S. institutions of higher education have agreed to divest or explore divesting from companies connected with Israel’s oppression of Palestinians. Graduate student workers at University of California campuses are beginning to strike, demanding divestment and demanding that the public university system stop cracking down on pro-Palestine protests. We cannot stand by while our government enables mass slaughter and war crimes. And we cannot stand by as we watch escalating police repression against students protesting that violence by exercising their constitutional rights. Even the United Nations’ Special Rapporteur on the right to education is concerned. She said, “I am deeply troubled by the violent crackdown on peaceful demonstrators, arrests, detentions, police violence, surveillance and disciplinary measures and sanctions against members of the educational community exercising their right to peaceful assembly and freedom of expression.” Thank you for standing up for our rights and for the rights of all people. name: Joe Biden
subject: My dad had a saying
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I am asking you to make a donation to my reelection campaign to help protect the values we hold dear from Donald Trump. | | |
---
My dad had a saying, Peter. He would say, _"Don't tell me what you value, Joey, show me your budget and I'll tell you what you value."_ Today, I am asking you to make a donation to my reelection campaign to help protect the values we hold dear from Donald Trump. Use this link: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-bfp-may-2024](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0n_-PX9mL8yHKUav8QI_tXOWTXTlcEuCWQZF1EWvBkk5XZgpNqq529X5gzREOMnjjRs2TXCv75pZy160cBTreztf-26lhoafLgPDywIVDkNyoyFTxgXrlT6R_kodhMYDQhUXY9BYIj81zsJMRIUFpgoqi8g1FywtEhYKhIvCMTDnvT7XexFdREosFoC07r7ImJ7A0pInEa2evOVZ1sAhy2hngsubTqHf-GpoK7vmSCPVWIg_pO-fokpSwEnO-FvTMGgJ2GbVsV6TMDstFBpDVZEQtJrwc6a9jCcUqrDJ5ho3tjSwQKtEMsdTgwdeH18RT6CjgnFodZXunTXtyBb9j-zK-_Gdz7YnZVizzdM3U7YRqBBspIcqw6NYfeQmB8NPtdWidn11wmeyTJDU_Uw2-/46o/VoH7P99mS5OgCWaUlXZyaQ/h0/h001.kJo9BONWW1OR_Ls-NKbhE-xealmeKpAesK2eHvTyonI) This election will answer an important question: _Is democracy still America's sacred cause?_ This is not hypothetical. You remember Donald Trump’s claims of a stolen election and you remember January 6. Whether democracy is still America's sacred cause is the most urgent question of our time. That's what the 2024 election is all about. And there is no winning this election without help from people like you. In just a few days, we close the books on the most important FEC fundraising deadline of our campaign to date. When it ends, we're legally required to report our fundraising numbers. Everyone will be watching: the press, our opponent, and the MAGA-right super PACs looking to see how vulnerable we are to attacks. So I am asking if you’ll set aside a few dollars from your budget and make a donation to our campaign today. [Can I count on you to chip in $25 to my reelection campaign today? clean_body: I am asking you to make a donation to my reelection campaign to help protect the values we hold dear from Donald Trump. | | | My dad had a saying, Peter. He would say, "Don't tell me what you value, Joey, show me your budget and I'll tell you what you value." Today, I am asking you to make a donation to my reelection campaign to help protect the values we hold dear from Donald Trump. Use this link: This election will answer an important question: Is democracy still America's sacred cause? This is not hypothetical. You remember Donald Trump’s claims of a stolen election and you remember January 6. Whether democracy is still America's sacred cause is the most urgent question of our time. That's what the 2024 election is all about. And there is no winning this election without help from people like you. In just a few days, we close the books on the most important FEC fundraising deadline of our campaign to date. When it ends, we're legally required to report our fundraising numbers. Everyone will be watching: the press, our opponent, and the MAGA-right super PACs looking to see how vulnerable we are to attacks. So I am asking if you’ll set aside a few dollars from your budget and make a donation to our campaign today. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | We have never, ever, ever failed in America when we have acted together. If we're going to defeat Trump, it will take that kind of effort again. Joe Joe Biden President of the United States

name: GIFFORDS
subject: We are failing our children
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Our gun violence epidemic fails us all—but especially our children.
#

Friends -
Our gun violence epidemic fails us all—but especially our children.
The other day marked exactly two years since the tragic shooting at Robb Elementary School in Uvalde, TX. This serves as a somber reminder that children are dying in our nation, simply by going to school.
Gun violence is the NUMBER ONE cause of death for children and teens in the US. Not car crashes. Not cancer.
It’s guns.
Our children deserve so much more. Schools should be safe havens and sites of learning for our kids, not centers of carnage. That’s why Gabby and all of us here at GIFFORDS won’t rest until we see a future in our nation free from gun violence.
[**Please, keep standing with us in the fight to end gun violence in our nation by making a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may24.vNbcqy&refcode=em240526-1-30&t=1&akid=8165%2E3935704%2EX6fP3F)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Ted Budd
subject: A fighter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
I'm proud to endorse Bernie Moreno

|
---

[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=a41670408d97405b935f6ec5f51e0fe9&_e=OIBavxdSyALZXsgVR4j4sA8FEn7lfN7_gAE1gvpGvKYIyeUaMXCTojZ_c-HqoGLQe-z9XQynY7rhak8SEXDrgFdsMiXsF6fQ7abslK9i-rZMxb3xFEfzFGTcOCNdthCFNKuoNoijE27q1kPhOAuPQhYS8nEsa5H6PsGucjUtr-UcgIOsjuu38Th1_ANgcFg_GXvoxD-hQO9GOAQ461TH5SYPqgnWRWM-azhs-ax3fxk8RVmIwYbRhVk8T-n-oco9G-m1xZLq_tZI0AG6SnYu5bd_KQprKj2F-ihS0QTIvIOhjILeXUDmS9PaSl-tmAmD4Hf_KYZIVylIlEPmNpu69CKGrecaXFoGrzead69qrME%3D)
Friend

I'm proud to endorse my friend Bernie Moreno for the U.S. Senate. Bernie is a conservative, a fighter, and an America First Patriot. He will fight hard to flip the Senate and Keep Ohio Red. _This is one of the closest Senate races of the year — your support is CRUCIAL, and it could be the difference between victory and defeat!_

body:
it's pretty big

|

Patriot,

There is a lot at stake this November, which is why I am running. I see the pivotal point we are at, and I can't just sit back. There needs to be a change ASAP.

America has been overcome by the Woke MOB and the Radical Left. Most Republicans are cowering to the Democrats and no longer serving the American people.

[**> > HELP ME PUT AMERICA FIRST - CHIP IN $10 <<**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e9b9c5677284402ebe90507a477c0fa2&_e=s_DsElTcQzEAdmOw4C4xhgdgCmodzAbhBh297RfmuIJuUffUB_2fufsfixZTjcSWscYmvhRPUweOnI3NfmtSctV9JONga5WHFbFDQ93rKRw-TfH1ZqqV8z4_elhSN3nh__10zNd_CT65EHfPYwwNty7bjDYy-S6LmU-sSL2DFvh0xymUAOY7U1rePNEmFOQ7QfikyOiNCzvbuakKqbExDChy-VwL_s7M_0LtLCdiJuRJygJDO9-gjTRzFg_S26p1TbmsElQdfwj9hWx6pt8Oe65SDZrq0JiW02aUKTe5D4VChsgIO38P4oGgNRyAsJbFcozx_msLXYPXG7bnApUrNxiirnXE20jI6Jk_3u4qeX2VkhngwsPfj8mA7W8GMNGWjCqqkZQ5FybU6XL6OFrc_g%3D%3D)
As a result, American citizens are suffering, and Biden's America is NO LONGER BEARABLE.

[**THE WOKE LEFT IS OUT OF CONTROL

THE ECONOMY IS DOWN THE DRAIN

AMERICA IS NO LONGER SAFE FOR CONSERVATIVES**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e9b9c5677284402ebe90507a477c0fa2&_e=s_DsElTcQzEAdmOw4C4xhgdgCmodzAbhBh297RfmuIJuUffUB_2fufsfixZTjcSWscYmvhRPUweOnI3NfmtSctV9JONga5WHFbFDQ93rKRw-TfH1ZqqV8z4_elhSN3nh__10zNd_CT65EHfPYwwNty7bjDYy-S6LmU-sSL2DFvh0xymUAOY7U1rePNEmFOQ7QfikyOiNCzvbuakKqbExDEtpEurP8KqLlm5VS1Rmg4UhGIQe3A-TPx4kmQdmF1J5rZMaF3JPRnDUrZh89uQO5ybNUgulLKhxXRU9RSVW1UwWoujHoq6Mf9fk-C3Jt9QMRBkpVfC0F5_UIU-kEwVDiXZ58Q3edQBodx07KWAw-EBCJ3uJjeM3SLiz_R99z1ZiDIeDigGqH0Gqx1b_gMqp5w%3D%3D)
America is no longer recognizable, and something has to change. I see Trump's vision and want to stand by his side and align Wisconsin with America First Conservative Values. I believe in what Trump wants for America, and standing on the sideline is NOT an option for me.

Will you take a few seconds to soak this all in and RESPOND? There is a lot on the line, and you have the choice today to back a movement that is GOING TO CHANGE THE TIDE OF AMERICA.

There is a lot on the line, and you have the choice today to back a movement that is GOING TO CHANGE THE TIDE OF AMERICA. | -Tony Wied Trump Endorsed Candidate for Congress Paid for by Tony Wied for Congress

body:
we didn’t think we had to say that, but...

| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85663594/475490325/-312956818?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDA4ZThiMi03MDFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q1t6QQkKSCXAC5QzuirQs2hv8vsxMDCKrfAAHnxaE_0=&emci=1068ec93-ccbf-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=7d08e8b2-701b-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=6787172) Are you on other political email lists, team? If you are, you’ve probably seen dozens of gimmicky emails saying that if you don’t donate _right now_ our entire way of life will come to an end. Too many other politicians and organizations use scare tactics and pathetic entreaties to convince you to donate. We aren’t going to do that. **At NextGen, we treat our supporters with a little more respect than that. ** So instead of scaring you into getting out your wallet, we want to inspire you to take action. Instead of guilt trips and lies about 15X donation matches, we want to provide value and information to you in a world where misinformation runs rampant. But here’s the truth: Just like every other politician and organization out there, we do rely on your contributions to make a difference. NextGen is working hard to empower the youth vote to take a stand at the polls in November and fight for progress. But we’re not going to scare you or guilt trip you into making a donation. clean_body: we didn’t think we had to say that, but... | | Are you on other political email lists, team? If you are, you’ve probably seen dozens of gimmicky emails saying that if you don’t donate right now our entire way of life will come to an end. Too many other politicians and organizations use scare tactics and pathetic entreaties to convince you to donate. We aren’t going to do that. At NextGen, we treat our supporters with a little more respect than that. So instead of scaring you into getting out your wallet, we want to inspire you to take action. Instead of guilt trips and lies about 15X donation matches, we want to provide value and information to you in a world where misinformation runs rampant. But here’s the truth: Just like every other politician and organization out there, we do rely on your contributions to make a difference. NextGen is working hard to empower the youth vote to take a stand at the polls in November and fight for progress. But we’re not going to scare you or guilt trip you into making a donation. We’re going to tell you the truth and ask nicely. No matter what, we’re grateful to have you with us. Thanks for being part of our team. — NextGen PAC NextGen America 548 Market Street #98097 San Francisco, CA 94104 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; ; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. =

name: Dick Durbin
subject: We’re in trouble
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
I have always relied on science, data, and hard facts to make tough decisions. Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click **[here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85664122/475491910/889329980?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.05.26_B1_InTrouble_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODA1OTAxNS03MTFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LxYrP481xJ9PN38SnrfH2K3JXgkiQ-zZXoUw2ckF0H0=&emci=7c75fc91-1f19-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=88059015-711b-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=2727974)** If you want to unsubscribe, click **[here.](https://action.durbinforsenate.com/p/vDVgS6znzEiztuxYJdeQwA2?unsubscribedata=zFXKUnDPvjyRXkQn54BjzNLYpW%2BcSUCqIyDrQO0vJZpn3tjhCjFwjs8CwHBRYJct7McDcZ6Px5Zx3qdJOPSW1hkFUF2l9oyQnHwc2zHZImc3DBM9v%2FjBeD5GqQMOl1HzGph%2BUpIVB5zGJbElRywylXaCJQNLJyk%2F3gNueUEPYurEVPs%2By7Wqm32iBcD%2BoHIsHRmYod6jK%2BKpTYDsWpfGo1oSFmg9nCJHZw2TkTXqds1uLYrlBmO6bM%2FB%2FmgIkh7TzgzkefvCqzzuFlNPQt%2FPqblpFtssRa4AruJ95VL0xsoAc2vzjOTlaJj%2BBQLCFTU89fB02z6C7hnMpOgNiKjuBkYCCIy6oUJtF6%2BlMqJzaGLCkqytnUM1QGCmCNgjFalkml5mRIemI6yLL0z%2BJRoALSGqJmVMmqumI0F0%2B3As%2Fgo%3D)**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85664127/475491917/-1447414995?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.05.26_B1_InTrouble_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODA1OTAxNS03MTFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LxYrP481xJ9PN38SnrfH2K3JXgkiQ-zZXoUw2ckF0H0=)
Peter, I’ve been in politics a long time and no matter what task I’ve taken on – whipping the votes for the Affordable Care Act, spearheading immigration reform, or holding for-profit colleges accountable – I have always relied on science, data, and hard facts to make tough decisions.
**Right now, the facts tell me that Senate Democrats are facing one of the toughest electoral maps _in decades._**
Not only are we defending two-thirds of the seats up for election this November, but they also happen to be in several states that Trump won by a landslide in 2020.
National Republicans are already plotting to ban abortion nationwide, cut Social Security and Medicare, and roll back environmental protections.
[**And if they take back the Senate, nothing will stand in their way. I need your support to make sure we have the resources to fight back in this highly consequential election. Although they share the same birthday, they could not be more opposite. While Janelle will fight to ensure the protections guaranteed under _Roe_ , Perry has supported a national abortion ban every Congress since 2018. We deserve better than having an anti-choice MAGA insurrectionist represent us.
The good news is we have a chance to defeat Perry in November and make this the worst year of his life. Perry has less cash on hand than any Republican incumbent in a competitive general election campaign. If we outraise him this quarter, we can put this race in the spotlight as one of the most flippable seats in the country.
But we’ve set a May fundraising goal, and we’re currently behind. We don’t want to have to tell Janelle we’re behind on her birthday.
[That’s why we have to raise $5,000 by tonight at midnight to keep us on pace to reach our special birthday goal and show Perry how serious we are (even on his birthday). Can you contribute $25 or $10 right now to help us make Janelle’s birthday special? clean_body: You won’t believe this... Janelle Stelson has spent her career advocating for truth and integrity, and now she's running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = You won’t believe this, but tomorrow is BOTH pro-choice champion Janelle Stelson and MAGA extremist Scott Perry’s birthday. We want to rub Janelle’s grassroots power in Scott Perry’s face (especially on her birthday), so here’s what we’re trying to do: raise $5,000 before the end of the day — all in honor of Janelle’s happy day! | = Although they share the same birthday, they could not be more opposite. While Janelle will fight to ensure the protections guaranteed under Roe , Perry has supported a national abortion ban every Congress since 2018. We deserve better than having an anti-choice MAGA insurrectionist represent us. The good news is we have a chance to defeat Perry in November and make this the worst year of his life. Perry has less cash on hand than any Republican incumbent in a competitive general election campaign. If we outraise him this quarter, we can put this race in the spotlight as one of the most flippable seats in the country. But we’ve set a May fundraising goal, and we’re currently behind. We don’t want to have to tell Janelle we’re behind on her birthday. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for wishing Janelle a happy birthday and helping us give Scott Perry the worst year of his life by joining us in defeating him. —Team Stelson HQ | | | ---|---|--- = Janelle Stelson has been speaking directly to the people of Central Pennsylvania for more than three decades as an Emmy-award-winning journalist. name: Chris Coulombe | Chris to Congress
subject: Honor Them
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COMMITTEE TO ELECT CHRIS COULOMBE TO CONGRESS
body:
As Memorial Day approaches, I ask that you take a moment this weekend to honor our fallen servicemembers who gave their lives to this nation.

| | | [ ](https://nb.christocongress.com/r?u=vLzcBttMlHPwnhM1pQ23paEVimo0rylpeDdAmHdq2BQOez8xVc_0m3ce29vAJsJ7uRr3ZZbA38RLSzhL3eoivA&e=826a47930363a3c7550ba96ed32bd779&utm_source=christocongress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=honor_them&n=1)
---
---
Friend, As Memorial Day approaches, I ask that you take a moment this weekend to honor our fallen servicemembers who gave their lives to this nation. **My service began in 2000, straight out of high school, when I was 18. I served for 16 years. I lost friends; they will forever be my brothers. They were courageous beyond measure. For 12 generations, American heroes have died to protect the Republic.** So, we are duty-bound to live and fight for our shared values. We honor our fallen by providing for our families, investing time in our communities, and, yes, by participating in the political process. **We honor our fallen by working to make America a nation they would be proud of today. Semper Fidelis.** [](https://nb.christocongress.com/r?u=vLzcBttMlHPwnhM1pQ23paEVimo0rylpeDdAmHdq2BQOez8xVc_0m3ce29vAJsJ7uRr3ZZbA38RLSzhL3eoivA&e=826a47930363a3c7550ba96ed32bd779&utm_source=christocongress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=honor_them&n=2) Every day, I drive the district, walk the streets, and knock on doors with my team and volunteers. We speak with and hear the concerns of voters. One sentiment they consistently express, even in Sonoma and Marin: This can’t go on. **What is Jared Huffman doing while North Coast businesses and residents leave? Or when PG &E announces it will destroy Scott Dam, our water supply? Or when radicals put a measure on the ballot that would ban dairy, livestock, and poultry farms in Sonoma County?** Nothing. Business as usual. Huffman toes the party line. With summer approaching, it is vital that we keep reaching voters in person and online so that, when it’s time to vote, they fire Jared Huffman. **[We need to raise another $5,000 to reach our May fundraising goal](https://nb.christocongress.com/r?u=vLzcBttMlHPwnhM1pQ23paEVimo0rylpeDdAmHdq2BQOez8xVc_0m3ce29vAJsJ7uRr3ZZbA38RLSzhL3eoivA&e=826a47930363a3c7550ba96ed32bd779&utm_source=christocongress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=honor_them&n=3)**. Can I count on your support? Could you contribute [**$100**](https://nb.christocongress.com/r?u=vLzcBttMlHPwnhM1pQ23paEVimo0rylpeDdAmHdq2BQOez8xVc_0m3ce29vAJsJ7fqL9bW20ATm8lwyaEm8VjWRU9ZwLxG5SPCg25htFLGc&e=826a47930363a3c7550ba96ed32bd779&utm_source=christocongress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=honor_them&n=4), [**$500**](https://nb.christocongress.com/r?u=vLzcBttMlHPwnhM1pQ23paEVimo0rylpeDdAmHdq2BQOez8xVc_0m3ce29vAJsJ7YdUqEl0mMC6F2g4oPMpvoawuyAWsvU7JalQBt3ZseyA&e=826a47930363a3c7550ba96ed32bd779&utm_source=christocongress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=honor_them&n=5), **[$1,000](https://nb.christocongress.com/r?u=vLzcBttMlHPwnhM1pQ23paEVimo0rylpeDdAmHdq2BQOez8xVc_0m3ce29vAJsJ7fqL9bW20ATm8lwyaEm8VjUwEIPBVcHmeFkAgnNW48pY&e=826a47930363a3c7550ba96ed32bd779&utm_source=christocongress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=honor_them&n=6)** , or even the maximum of **[$3,300](https://nb.christocongress.com/r?u=vLzcBttMlHPwnhM1pQ23paEVimo0rylpeDdAmHdq2BQOez8xVc_0m3ce29vAJsJ7KPFlqz6DZPDJN4P_lt5uQHvosJJxrvvxjk9e6mnLJI8&e=826a47930363a3c7550ba96ed32bd779&utm_source=christocongress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=honor_them&n=7)** today? **[Every dollar you contribute goes towards voter engagement](https://nb.christocongress.com/r?u=vLzcBttMlHPwnhM1pQ23paEVimo0rylpeDdAmHdq2BQOez8xVc_0m3ce29vAJsJ7uRr3ZZbA38RLSzhL3eoivA&e=826a47930363a3c7550ba96ed32bd779&utm_source=christocongress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=honor_them&n=8)**. With your support, I will show voters a better vision for the North Coast. We are ready for it. For the Republic, **Chris Coulombe** Republican Nominee for California’s 2nd Congressional District
---
* * *
---
| | | | [ ](https://nb.christocongress.com/r?u=W_EnBhP2CxsnlNaDjpG8JzGlkC8HsXZIWg9ZSVe72UY&e=826a47930363a3c7550ba96ed32bd779&utm_source=christocongress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=honor_them&n=9)

name: Illinois Review
subject: 🚨ALERT: Grassroots Dominate IL GOP Convention
body:
The conservative grassroots base of the Illinois Republican Party scored major victories during the GOP State Convention in Collinsville.

view in browser (https://mailchi.mp/2c9b365871b3/exclusive-donald-trump-jr-draws-large-crowds-receives-lifetime-membership-10343923?e=1cb5fdae9e) | update preferences (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=339982d17b) | unsubscribe (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&t=b&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=339982d17b)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=339982d17b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
This IR e-Blast Powered By:
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=339982d17b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Dear Peter,

We thought you may be interested to receive this CONSERVATIVE NEWS ALERT from Illinois Review (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=339982d17b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

Grassroots Dominate IL GOP State Convention and Expand Influence as State Party Leaders Lose Their Cool (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/05/grassroots-dominate-il-gop-state-convention-and-expand-influence-as-state-party-leaders-lose-their-cool.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=339982d17b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

By Illinois Review

On Saturday, the influential conservative grassroots base of the Illinois Republican Party scored major victories during the GOP State Convention in Collinsville – as delegates from across the state elected Dean White as the new Republican national committeeman and Donald Trump-endorsed U.S. Rep. Mary Miller, (IL-15) as the Illinois Delegation Chair to nominate President Trump at the RNC Convention in Milwaukee.
CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/05/grassroots-dominate-il-gop-state-convention-and-expand-influence-as-state-party-leaders-lose-their-cool.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=339982d17b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

The state convention did not lack drama, as state party officials tried their best to maintain power and protect their own establishment-supported candidates. On Friday, this publication reported that the RNC Committeeman Nominating Committee voted 14-3 to keep Vince Kolber on the ballot despite failing to meet the candidacy requirements as outlined by the IL GOP’s own bylaws.
CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/05/grassroots-dominate-il-gop-state-convention-and-expand-influence-as-state-party-leaders-lose-their-cool.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=339982d17b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Late Friday and Saturday, more drama followed, as backroom deals and procedural gamesmanship were deployed to strike a deal within the RNC Committeeman Nominating Committee – a deal that meant that Mark Shaw – and not the grassroots-supported candidate Dean White, would be the committee’s official pick for national committeeman. But when word spread, a resolution was drafted by the grassroots that would force an open convention floor vote. In other words, an election, instead of a selection.
CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/05/grassroots-dominate-il-gop-state-convention-and-expand-influence-as-state-party-leaders-lose-their-cool.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=339982d17b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Many IL GOP officials continue to blame this publication for publishing articles critical of the establishment-base of the party – and that anger towards Illinois Review was on full display during the convention.
CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/05/grassroots-dominate-il-gop-state-convention-and-expand-influence-as-state-party-leaders-lose-their-cool.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=339982d17b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.mypillow.com/ir?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=339982d17b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.freedom2o.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=339982d17b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: I'm thinking of Roger.
body:
Many years ago, at a town hall event, Roger stood up and asked me why there wasn't a national World War II memorial. He had fought in the war and had lost countless friends; his question deserved an answer.
Team,
Every Memorial Day, I always think of Roger Durbin.
Many years ago, at a town hall event, Roger stood up and asked me why there wasn't a national World War II memorial. He had fought in the war and had lost countless friends; his question deserved an answer. More than that, it deserved action.
Over the next 17 years, I worked with Roger to make his dream a reality. And although he never got to see it, his vision will stand on our National Mall for generations to come.
**Friend, the brave Americans who've made the ultimate sacrifice to defend our freedoms and our way of life deserve nothing less.**
It was an honor to champion Roger's dream for 17 years and finally achieve it, and it's an honor to go to work every day for all of the servicemembers who have returned home.
Since my very first day in Congress, I've been taking care of those who've served in uniform. I've worked across the aisle to help pass the largest increase in veterans' health care in history, secured funding for new state-of-the-art VA clinics throughout Ohio, and spearheaded major federal investments in Ohio's defense bases.
As long as I have a voice, I'll never turn my back on our heroes in uniform. That's a promise.
— Marcy

Trump wants to** end Medicare, cut Social Security benefits and enact tax cuts for the wealthy 1%.** But that's not all: He's been vocal about his plan to pass a **nationwide abortion ban** — and he proudly takes credit for overturning Roe v. Wade.

clean_body: Democrats must stand united | | | : You have been selected to represent 43614 Democrats on May 26, 2024. Please submit your response by 11:59 p.m. to be counted in our dataset. Despite all of the progress that President Biden has made for our country since taking office, polls show him and Donald Trump locked in a DEAD HEAT. Now that we're entering the full swing of the election year, we need to know where grassroots supporters in 43614 stand. We're still waiting on 725 responses before midnight tonight — including yours. So we have to ask: WHO WILL YOU VOTE FOR? | | | | LIVE POLL CLOSES AT MIDNIGHT TONIGHT Listen: Election Day is less than six months away, and the polls are showing that President Biden is neck and neck with Donald Trump. Though they're polling closely, their policies couldn't be more different. At Team Gillibrand, we're proud to stand with Biden. He's reduced health care costs, created more than 15 million jobs, protected Medicare and Social Security benefits and is working to defend reproductive rights. Trump wants to end Medicare, cut Social Security benefits and enact tax cuts for the wealthy 1%. But that's not all: He's been vocal about his plan to pass a nationwide abortion ban — and he proudly takes credit for overturning Roe v. Wade. That's why Democrats must stand united in the fight to prevent another Trump presidency, but we still need another 725 responses from 43614 before midnight, friend — and yours is still missing. So please, tell us now: WHO WILL YOU VOTE FOR? | | | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Hello,
Adam Frisch here, humbly asking if you can make a donation to my campaign for Colorado's 3rd congressional district.
In 2022, the race between Lauren Boebert and me went to a recount, but ultimately, after all of the ballots were counted, we came just 546 votes short.
It was the closest race in the entire country.
We've now scared off Boebert, and I know we can win this seat in November – but this race just got a lot harder, so I am counting on your continued support to be able to build a campaign strong enough to take on the Super PACs and win this critical House seat.
[**Please, click here and make a donation now to our campaign. name: VoteVets.org
subject: ☀️ To all VoteVets supporters - please don’t click away 🫡
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
#
Derek -
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
Like you, Derek.

Your support, voice, and participation have helped us run some of the most powerful and impactful ads out there and have made a real difference in people's lives.
Your support helps us win races that otherwise wouldn't be competitive.
It’s helped us fight for things that matter most to Veterans. It stopped Trump and the MAGA-right, and got huge results in the House and Senate. It got the PACT Act done and forced Tommy Tuberville to back down. It got Ukraine aid passed. Right now, it’s correcting the record on dishonorable attacks from the MAGA GOP against Veterans who served our country.

But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have made a donation online to support our work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that select group.

Our average donation is $25. Some give more, many give less. But with tensions escalating every day and with Trump ready to tear the Constitution we swore to protect to shreds, all that matters is that you’re choosing to power our work with a donation.
We’ll put it right to work fighting and defeating these liars and hypocrites in the most important moment in modern American political history — the one we’re in right now.
[**If helping VoteVets run some of the most effective ads in politics, ads that make a real difference, seems worth $5 to you, we’re humbly asking you to make a donation before our deadline today. We really need you. Thank you.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-may24.RUuZX0&refcode=em240526-1-30&t=1&akid=25139%2E3013755%2EUWUfTw)

name: Rep. Adam Schiff
subject: 24-year-old me would not have imagined this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
| | |
---
Hi friend, can I tell you a quick story about this photo?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85674134/475517958/-1984759417?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1280-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWVjZTBmMDYtODAxYi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uzhNu_AIzdabml0f40JmMgIluJhMR5frnDYMtPF8EEw=)
That's me in 1985 — just 24 years old at my law school graduation, fresh off a student research assistant job for Professor Laurence Tribe, thinking that I had just completed the toughest challenge of my academic career. Well, up to that point, anyway. (The bar exam was still a few weeks away).
Some years later, I would become an Assistant United States Attorney, and successfully prosecute the first FBI agent charged with espionage, Richard Miller, for spying for the Soviet Union.
As a new graduate of law school, I could never have imagined I would handle a case like that.
Or that I would later investigate a president who also betrayed our country...
...lead his impeachment and Senate trial...
...serve on the January 6 Committee...
...get kicked off the Intelligence Committee by a craven Speaker of the House for doing the above...
...and get censured by extreme partisan MAGA House Republicans under the personal threat of that corrupt president.
Life leads us in uncertain and fortuitous ways. I’m fortunate that at a time when our country has been in trouble, and our democracy at risk, I have been in a position to help do something about it.
In the Senate, I hope to do even more.
**[If you're able to, will you contribute a split donation of $5 between Debbie Mucarsel-Powell’s and my campaign to help me reach the Senate, defend our majority, and defeat Trump? I would be grateful for your help in continuing my service.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85674135/475517959/-1984759417?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1280-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWVjZTBmMDYtODAxYi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uzhNu_AIzdabml0f40JmMgIluJhMR5frnDYMtPF8EEw=)**

name: Tax the Rich Alert via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Bernie - "We must have the guts to take on and defeat a powerful and greedy ruling class"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis — Bernie
isn’t giving up the fight to tax the rich and take on billionaires. In
fact, he says now is the time to redouble our push to take on the
ultra-wealthy: “We must have the guts to take on and defeat a powerful and
greedy ruling class.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17888?t=1011&akid=6065%2E5885482%2EUD4u_W ][IMG]

Trump’s tax cuts made millionaires, billionaires, and corporations *even
richer* to the tune of billions of dollars. Wealth inequality is
skyrocketing — working people are just trying to scrape by while health
insurance executives, Wall Street high rollers, and fossil fuel CEOs bring
in big profits. We need our movement to stand with Bernie.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17887?source=email-20240526&t=1012&akid=6065%2E5885482%2EUD4u_W ]Add your name: Tax the rich and tax big corporations! End Trump’s tax
cuts and force the ultra-wealthy to pay their fair share in taxes.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17887?source=email-20240526&t=1013&akid=6065%2E5885482%2EUD4u_W ]ADD YOUR NAME

34% of big corporations paid nothing in federal income taxes in the first
year of the Trump tax cuts. Trump’s tax cuts slashed capital gains taxes,
so that wealthy shareholders can make more money off of their millions and
billions. The ultra-rich like Elon Musk and Jeff Bezos are benefitting at
every turn.

Republicans and their right-wing billionaire donors want to protect their
bounty of tax loopholes while trying to cut Medicare, Social Security, and
Medicaid. In fact, the Social Security Board just reported that taxing the
rich is desperately needed in order to keep Social Security funded. It’s
the only way forward.

Until we raise taxes on the ultra-wealthy, billionaires will continue
exerting a tremendous amount of power over our political system and
wreaking havoc on our social safety net.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17887?source=email-20240526&t=1014&akid=6065%2E5885482%2EUD4u_W ]Stand with Bernie: Tax the rich and big corporations now! No more
loopholes for Musk and Bezos.

When we organize, we win.
