clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Peter Willis — Bernie isn’t giving up the fight to tax the rich and take on billionaires. In fact, he says now is the time to redouble our push to take on the ultra-wealthy: “We must have the guts to take on and defeat a powerful and greedy ruling class.” [ ][IMG] Trump’s tax cuts made millionaires, billionaires, and corporations even richer to the tune of billions of dollars. Wealth inequality is skyrocketing — working people are just trying to scrape by while health insurance executives, Wall Street high rollers, and fossil fuel CEOs bring in big profits. We need our movement to stand with Bernie. [ ]Add your name: Tax the rich and tax big corporations! End Trump’s tax cuts and force the ultra-wealthy to pay their fair share in taxes. [ ]ADD YOUR NAME 34% of big corporations paid nothing in federal income taxes in the first year of the Trump tax cuts. Trump’s tax cuts slashed capital gains taxes, so that wealthy shareholders can make more money off of their millions and billions. The ultra-rich like Elon Musk and Jeff Bezos are benefitting at every turn. Republicans and their right-wing billionaire donors want to protect their bounty of tax loopholes while trying to cut Medicare, Social Security, and Medicaid. In fact, the Social Security Board just reported that taxing the rich is desperately needed in order to keep Social Security funded. It’s the only way forward. Until we raise taxes on the ultra-wealthy, billionaires will continue exerting a tremendous amount of power over our political system and wreaking havoc on our social safety net. [ ]Stand with Bernie: Tax the rich and big corporations now! No more loopholes for Musk and Bezos. When we organize, we win. In 2022 Tesla accumulated profits of $4.4 billion without paying any federal income taxes. Elon Musk saw his wealth increase dramatically, making him one of the world’ richest people with a fortune valued at $190 billion!
Thanks to his enormous amount of wealth, he has become a non-state kingmaker with an enormous amount of influence over everything from space travel to social media to warfare.
**Wealthy executives grew richer and more powerful as the rest of us fell behind while Republicans use the decline in tax revenue as an excuse to cut funding for vital public services.**
****[**Please sign on now and urge your congressperson to end corporate tax dodging and excess executive pay. name: David Hogg (Leaders We Deserve)
subject: I take this job pretty seriously
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
I spend a lot of time thinking about how to help every single one of the candidates we endorse win their elections.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240526-1&t=1&akid=728%2E587540%2E1GWyBM)
Peter, I take this job pretty seriously.
I spend a lot of time thinking about how to help every single one of the candidates we endorse win their elections. And you want to know one thing that helps me sleep at night?
It’s knowing that, since our launch last summer, **over 5,000 of our grassroots supporters** have signed up to make monthly recurring donations to Leaders We Deserve.
**[These donations are crucial to sustaining a movement like ours, so today I wanted to reach out and ask if you would set up a monthly recurring donation too.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240526-1?refcode=em20240526-1&amount=5&recurring=1&refcode2=728_587540_1GWyBM&akid=728%2E587540%2E1GWyBM)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240526-1?recurring=1&amount=5&refcode=em20240526-1-728&refcode2=728_587540_1GWyBM&akid=728%2E587540%2E1GWyBM)**
Here’s why these recurring donations are so helpful:
* **They allow us to set a baseline** for what we’ll bring in in a given month so that we can budget that money toward our most pressing priorities.
* **They help us get to work well before Election Day.** A month before the election is too late to hire and train organizers, buy TV ads, and compete with more established, well-financed campaigns.
* **They help create a snowball effect for our candidates.** A lot of donors and organizations look at how much early money candidates raise to inform whether they should get involved, and recurring donations let us back young, progressive candidates early on to show their credibility.

We scored a big win last November when we elected our first endorsed candidate, Nadarius Clark, to the Virginia legislature. Now we have **13 more** endorsed candidates to elect this year — but we can’t do it without you!
_Please use the links in this email to start a recurring contribution to Leaders We Deserve._
**[So Peter, if you’re ready to elect more of the Leaders We Deserve, please sign up to make a monthly recurring donation of any amount that works for you today. It will help more than you know!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240526-1?refcode=em20240526-1&amount=5&recurring=1&refcode2=728_587540_1GWyBM&akid=728%2E587540%2E1GWyBM)**
Thanks again for all your support,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20240526-1&t=2&refcode2=728_587540_1GWyBM&akid=728%2E587540%2E1GWyBM)**

My #1 priority is defending and expanding our Republican Majority, and that means stamping out any attempt by Democrats to use dirty tricks to sway the November election in their favor. Marc’s extremely narrow victory in 2022 played a CRITICAL role in Republicans retaking the Majority. If they get a fake candidate on the ballot against Marc, they could flip this seat and the House Majority with it. Thank you, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | | Paid for by Marc for US

I’ll be honest — asking for money isn't my favorite thing. It feels awkward, especially knowing your inbox is probably flooded with requests from other campaigns and organizations. But here’s the thing: Marsha Blackburn has scores of corporate PACs, CEOs, and politicians lining up to fund her re-election campaign. I know I can’t defeat them alone, so I’m counting on YOU to help me take Marsha on. **_[We’ve set a $200,000 goal to close out the month, and I’m hoping your contribution will bring us there! Can you spare a few dollars to help us hit our goal and defeat Marsha? >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85678024/475526275/209297649?refcode=ea.4d34b99f-851b-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.4d34b99f-851b-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDM0Yjk5Zi04NTFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ki4xGjRPjYPue24JDzwZnvY_PKo5yhFeBYgwzH5SkWs=)_** Let me be clear, your donation isn’t just a donation. It’s an investment to defeat one of the most extreme Republican senators in the country. It’s a chance to help protect our fundamental rights like reproductive healthcare, the freedom to vote, and our democracy itself. Your support today helps me send a strong message to Marsha’s special interest pals that this U.S. Senate seat isn’t for sale — it belongs to us, the people! So what do you say? clean_body: This is a pretty big deal. | I’ll be honest — asking for money isn't my favorite thing. It feels awkward, especially knowing your inbox is probably flooded with requests from other campaigns and organizations. But here’s the thing: Marsha Blackburn has scores of corporate PACs, CEOs, and politicians lining up to fund her re-election campaign. I know I can’t defeat them alone, so I’m counting on YOU to help me take Marsha on. = Let me be clear, your donation isn’t just a donation. It’s an investment to defeat one of the most extreme Republican senators in the country. It’s a chance to help protect our fundamental rights like reproductive healthcare, the freedom to vote, and our democracy itself. Your support today helps me send a strong message to Marsha’s special interest pals that this U.S. Senate seat isn’t for sale — it belongs to us, the people! So what do you say? Are you with me in this fight? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I can’t thank you enough. Gloria Johnson = | = Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Send donations via check to: Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

name: Scott Jensen
subject: Lawsuit Update - The FIGHT Ahead
body:
Don't miss this | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/lawsuit-update-memorandum?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

The next fight is ahead in my lawsuit against the Minnesota Board of Medical Practice and Keith Ellison. Professionals from all walks of life need a voice to not be politically punished for their free speech. A judge has dismissed our suit, but we're not done with this fight... not even close. We have filed a memorandum opposing the dismissal and will take this as far as it needs to go! Please read our full release by [clicking here](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=41eb18a8d5&e=9828080a05) or the graphic below:
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=ea060f6494&e=9828080a05)
---
| We will continue this fight! As a physician who spoke out early about the lock downs, COVID death counts, locking our kids out of school, and robbing parents of their rights, I was punished by the Minnesota Board of Medical Practice for not conforming to the narrative. So many people lost their livelihoods for the exact same reason.

They want us to forget. They want us to move us on without any reconciliation. We will _not_ do that. We will never forget the heavy-handed tyranny of big tech, big government and big pharma.

If you support us continuing to fight in the courts, please consider [making a donation to our legal fund](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=081125e6ca&e=9828080a05). We need you - and [every dollar counts](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=7ec6f28503&e=9828080a05).

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor
---

name: Mike Soboleski
subject: Memorial Day Tribute
body:
Honor and Remember
| | |
---
| [](https://eqbp6ugbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_quuHNTA5aBmk1t9dAQEwqjepFd42hJJa_btgqcAcmJLZdCtmNA3_29Wj29WUePHSzZ8QxMWiTsTcLe9KXIIRejP6gxk9nF3LzEaZslRixU-6O3ociqAFk4NR6NOlU0zi_RT4P3-6f5FaOYNA2UA1ik5sRBvx_uX&c=8JBMFHTKBqO5EdsjrFkIu3Ti4zWrLUaDeSsXX9OVixYKE5TU9ypdcg==&ch=XVl0u9u2qtGVwG6HPCn7PLn6Nz-GU_gVq68T8LJ0RhF0tnFac_KxWA==)
---
---
|
# ONE OF US - FIGHTING FOR US!
---
---
| [](https://eqbp6ugbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_quuHNTA5aBmk1t9dAQEwqjepFd42hJJa_btgqcAcmJLZdCtmNA3_w1iLsDcslp2ckoJVDL3dVU7HB-KxEMzb8PFTEzEdAQVGh4zyQu0DRN6Z5EMGw2Zmb013XuBuktWOCQ_5Uo72UY40DwZ0-22ixG70V_9hXAASoe5okBbrgg57VQXaPz-GA==&c=8JBMFHTKBqO5EdsjrFkIu3Ti4zWrLUaDeSsXX9OVixYKE5TU9ypdcg==&ch=XVl0u9u2qtGVwG6HPCn7PLn6Nz-GU_gVq68T8LJ0RhF0tnFac_KxWA==)
---
| Peter,
This Memorial Day we put politics aside and come together to remember our fallen. We honor the brave men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedom. We mourn for the families that lost loved ones at home and abroad. It is a time for gratitude for their sacrifice. We live in the land of the free and the home of the brave because of them.
Your loyalty and courage will never be forgotten.
We salute our fallen heroes and vow to uphold the ideals they fought for.
May their sacrifice never be in vain.
I hope everyone has a wonderful Memorial Day and takes the time to remember what this day is really all about.
\- Mike
---
|
---
| | | Mike Soboleski is a born and raised Mainer and a lifelong conservative with Maine values. He's running for Congress in Maine's Second Congressional District because he knows our state and country are going in the wrong direction.
Please help spread the word by forwarding our email to friends and family.
---

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Tikkun Olam...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85678662/475527586/18334046?refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240526_2_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwN2M5YjZkLTg3MWItZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TjYh7dkGfd5wCzmrwWfsIJEA1UWMDj17L91xl3MObTI=)
Hey Peter, it's Jacky Rosen.
My faith has _always_ been a core part of my values and my work in the Senate. I'm guided and motivated by the Jewish principle of "Tikkun Olam," which means to repair the world and leave it in a better place than how we found it.
It’s why I ran for office, becoming the first former synagogue president and third Jewish woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. And it’s why I'm proudly fighting to bring positive change to communities in Nevada and across the country. **But right now, I need your help.**
National Republicans are doing everything in their power to flip my seat red: **Mitch McConnell handpicked my opponent to run against me, and he's being propped up by a shady GOP billionaire. Now, polling shows me 2 points down in a race that experts say could decide Senate control.**
_**[I'm relying on your immediate grassroots support to defend this seat so I can keep up the fight for our shared values. That's why I'm humbly asking: Please, will you chip in $3 or more today, split between my campaign and Upset the Setup to help me win in Nevada, defend the Senate, and continue this critical work?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85678663/475527587/-1746793467?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240526_2_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwN2M5YjZkLTg3MWItZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TjYh7dkGfd5wCzmrwWfsIJEA1UWMDj17L91xl3MObTI=)**_

clean_body: = Hey Peter, it's Jacky Rosen. My faith has always been a core part of my values and my work in the Senate. I'm guided and motivated by the Jewish principle of "Tikkun Olam," which means to repair the world and leave it in a better place than how we found it. It’s why I ran for office, becoming the first former synagogue president and third Jewish woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. And it’s why I'm proudly fighting to bring positive change to communities in Nevada and across the country. But right now, I need your help. National Republicans are doing everything in their power to flip my seat red: Mitch McConnell handpicked my opponent to run against me, and he's being propped up by a shady GOP billionaire. Now, polling shows me 2 points down in a race that experts say could decide Senate control. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Thank you for your support. **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85679688/475530220/-148782828?amount=10&refcode=DOTL_20240526_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxN2ZlNWNkLTg5MWItZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UZKdpQ0TvJg-3nDabeQPXI8k8yFRtoUOKxK3_zkPyTM=)** Hey, it’s Al Franken.

[I’m writing because I want you to split $10 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between Democracy On The Line and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85679693/475530225/-148782828?amount=10&refcode=DOTL_20240526_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxN2ZlNWNkLTg5MWItZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UZKdpQ0TvJg-3nDabeQPXI8k8yFRtoUOKxK3_zkPyTM=)

Josh is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District, a key district to taking back the House. Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too!

Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence.

In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. **And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law.**

Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that _funded the police!_ Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations.

_**Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them.**_

Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know.

And finally, NY-19 is considered a tossup and one of the most competitive in the nation.

[So, what do you say? Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Democracy On The Line and Josh’s campaign today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85679697/475530230/-148782828?amount=10&refcode=DOTL_20240526_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxN2ZlNWNkLTg5MWItZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UZKdpQ0TvJg-3nDabeQPXI8k8yFRtoUOKxK3_zkPyTM=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Riley and Democracy on the Line will go through immediately: | ****[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85679705/475530234/-148782828?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&refcode=DOTL_20240526_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxN2ZlNWNkLTg5MWItZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UZKdpQ0TvJg-3nDabeQPXI8k8yFRtoUOKxK3_zkPyTM=)****

clean_body: | = Hey, it’s Al Franken. = Josh is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District, a key district to taking back the House. Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too! Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence. In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law. Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that funded the police! Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations. Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them. Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know. And finally, NY-19 is considered a tossup and one of the most competitive in the nation. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Riley and Democracy on the Line will go through immediately: | **= = = = This is important to me. And to our nation. Thanks, Al P.S. I always add a P.S to these letters to make another ask. It’s a cheap tactic but for some reason it works! = | | Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001 Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and protect our fragile Democracy, make a=.**

name: Kurt Kroemer
subject: My opponent has spent more in legal fees than any other member of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kroemer for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Peter,
Throughout my career, I’ve been proudly dedicated to leadership and service, holding senior positions at organizations like the Make-A-Wish Foundation and the American Red Cross.
More than anything else, my deep passion for helping others has driven me as I’ve navigated through life. From being on the ground coordinating first-response efforts after natural disasters to supporting families during their most difficult times of crisis, I’ve been able to cross paths with so many people and play a small role in lifting them up when they need it most.
Now, I’m running for Congress because our Democracy is in peril. Can I count on you to help fuel our people-powered campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Our representative in Congress has held office for over 10 years, yet there have been no improvements made in our district. Instead of working for the great people he’s been elected to serve, David Schweikert has disrespected us by succumbing to special interests and extremist agendas.
I know my experience, along with my dedication to helping others, will allow me to be an effective voice for Arizonans in Congress. Our residents deserve better than career politicians like David Schweikert, so it’s time for us to come together to flip this seat from red to blue.
Peter, will you join our team by making a grassroots contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]

body:
May has been full of noteworthy news – help us cover it for our readers.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85679828/475530381/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGI3ZmU1Y2QtODkxYi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AEoNRlgerQRl6MWN6zA09CGRkVtjSmeAnfJUBpxALU8=&emci=530ffa16-d919-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=0b7fe5cd-891b-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
We’re nearing the end of May in a pivotal election year, and it’s been a wild month:
* **Kristi Noem went viral for sharing a horrifying story about shooting her puppy and goat** in her bid for the GOP Vice Presidential nod from Trump.
* Donald Trump refused to rule out political violence in a disturbing _Time Magazine_ interview where he didn’t even try and hide his authoritarian ambitions.
* And now, the first 2024 Presidential debate has been booked for one month from today.

**This is the most important election of our lifetime, and trustworthy sources of news and information have never been more important. That’s why we’re so worried about our fundraising numbers right now – just take a look at our Act Blue trend since the end of April: **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85679833/475530385/-593472309?refcode=20240526-EM-Data&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGI3ZmU1Y2QtODkxYi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AEoNRlgerQRl6MWN6zA09CGRkVtjSmeAnfJUBpxALU8=)
**[Can you help our fundraising get back on track and do your part to stop right-wing misinformation by chipping in $15 today? With your support, we can provide trustworthy news to the 2024 battleground communities who need it most. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85679840/475530390/-593472309?refcode=20240526-EM-Data&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGI3ZmU1Y2QtODkxYi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AEoNRlgerQRl6MWN6zA09CGRkVtjSmeAnfJUBpxALU8=)**
**We’ll admit we set an ambitious goal for May: $25,000 raised to support our ten battleground newsrooms.**
With only four days left in the month, we’re about $10,000 away from that goal.
Our goals aren’t arbitrary, at COURIER, we make all of our news available for free – no subscriptions, no paywalls.
We do that because too many American communities are stuck in news deserts. Without access to trustworthy news and information, these communities become vulnerable to right-wing lies, hate, and misinformation.
**Research has shown factual, local news is the best way to reverse that trend, but we can’t keep the lights on without your support.**
**[So, Peter, can you help us out? This is a critical year for the future of our democracy, and any donation gets us a little bit closer to our goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85679850/475530397/-593472309?refcode=20240526-EM-Data&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGI3ZmU1Y2QtODkxYi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AEoNRlgerQRl6MWN6zA09CGRkVtjSmeAnfJUBpxALU8=)**

That’s why we’re so worried about our fundraising numbers right now – just take a look at our Act Blue trend since the end of April: = = We’ll admit we set an ambitious goal for May: $25,000 raised to support our ten battleground newsrooms. With only four days left in the month, we’re about $10,000 away from that goal. Our goals aren’t arbitrary, at COURIER, we make all of our news available for free – no subscriptions, no paywalls. We do that because too many American communities are stuck in news deserts. Without access to trustworthy news and information, these communities become vulnerable to right-wing lies, hate, and misinformation. Research has shown factual, local news is the best way to reverse that trend, but we can’t keep the lights on without your support. = Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- Thanks, COURIER Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

| Peter,

We’ve had a terrific start to 2024, thanks to supporters like you. Building momentum early is one of the best ways we can ensure we run the strongest campaign possible as we inch closer to 2025.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85679962/475530608/-735451230?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-05-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTFhYjU4ZjAtODkxYi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Prkf_CyokaLow4ccWlkFPCi6e0IWl2BOu-NJA1PH5gs=)
The first few months of 2024 have been busy. I’ve been traveling around Virginia, meeting with community leaders, talking to local business owners, and continuing my service to Virginia’s Seventh District in Congress.

While I’ve been hard at work, I’m happy to know that my campaign team is here, making sure that we have the necessary resources to drive this campaign into our election year.

**Our grassroots support is proof that our message is resonating with voters across the Commonwealth. We need a Governor who brings people together to solve problems and address the urgent needs of Virginians, not leaders who stoke division and hate.**

I know with your support, we’ll flip this Governor’s seat in 2025, and believe it or not, we’re already almost halfway through 2024. clean_body: While I’ve been hard at work, I’m happy to know that my campaign team is here, making sure that we have the necessary resources to drive this campaign into our election year. | = | Peter, We’ve had a terrific start to 2024, thanks to supporters like you. Building momentum early is one of the best ways we can ensure we run the strongest campaign possible as we inch closer to 2025. = The first few months of 2024 have been busy. I’ve been traveling around Virginia, meeting with community leaders, talking to local business owners, and continuing my service to Virginia’s Seventh District in Congress. While I’ve been hard at work, I’m happy to know that my campaign team is here, making sure that we have the necessary resources to drive this campaign into our election year. Our grassroots support is proof that our message is resonating with voters across the Commonwealth. We need a Governor who brings people together to solve problems and address the urgent needs of Virginians, not leaders who stoke division and hate. I know with your support, we’ll flip this Governor’s seat in 2025, and believe it or not, we’re already almost halfway through 2024. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: My focus: delivering results to WA-08
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Last week, I joined my Democratic colleagues in Congress to push for better access to rural maternal healthcare. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85680728/475532745/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTI1ZjJjOC04YTFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cdzZZDIY_mnz8p9vCX5XCC4ORYdykOLAdO4_66AvHYE=&emci=85e6e121-eb19-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=c925f2c8-8a1b-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Last week, I joined my Democratic colleagues in Congress to push for better access to rural maternal healthcare. As a physician and a mother who experienced a high-risk pregnancy, I know how critical it is to get families access to the care they need when they need it.

That's why, even as election season begins to heat up, I remain laser-focused on using my time in Congress to better the lives of every family in WA-08.

But national Republicans want nothing more than to tear down the progress we've made to please MAGA extremists. They’re targeting my seat again, hoping to replace me with someone who will do their party's bidding - and we know what that means. I refuse to let that happen.

Our work is not yet done, Peter. **That's why I need your help before my end-of-month fundraising deadline.** We’ve set a goal to raise $20,000 by midnight Friday, and I need your support to get there.

**[Will you commit to chipping in $5, or whatever you can, to help me reach this month's fundraising goal? This will give me the resources I need to defend WA-08 and take back the House in November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85680729/475532746/1506767040?refcode=em24_240526_eom1_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240526_eom1_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=c925f2c8-8a1b-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTI1ZjJjOC04YTFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cdzZZDIY_mnz8p9vCX5XCC4ORYdykOLAdO4_66AvHYE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85680730/475532747/1506767040?refcode=em24_240526_eom1_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240526_eom1_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=c925f2c8-8a1b-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096

clean_body: Last week, I joined my Democratic colleagues in Congress to push for better access to rural maternal healthcare. Peter, Last week, I joined my Democratic colleagues in Congress to push for better access to rural maternal healthcare. As a physician and a mother who experienced a high-risk pregnancy, I know how critical it is to get families access to the care they need when they need it. That's why, even as election season begins to heat up, I remain laser-focused on using my time in Congress to better the lives of every family in WA-08. But national Republicans want nothing more than to tear down the progress we've made to please MAGA extremists. They’re targeting my seat again, hoping to replace me with someone who will do their party's bidding - and we know what that means. I refuse to let that happen. Our work is not yet done, Peter. That's why I need your help before my end-of-month fundraising deadline. We’ve set a goal to raise $20,000 by midnight Friday, and I need your support to get there. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: As much as I hate asking you to spend your hard-earned dollars on our campaign, grassroots support from folks like you is the only way we'll have a shot at winning in November.

If you want to receive fewer emails, click If you want to unsubscribe, click | = Sorry in advance, folks. We're nearing our end-of-month fundraising deadline and we're going to be reaching out more than we usually do. But here's the deal: we're in a crunch to raise every last dollar of our goal, and I don't want you to receive more emails from me than you have to. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = These end-of-month emails matter because reaching our fundraising goals matters, plain and simple. Falling short of our goal could spell out bad news for our campaign, and the last thing we want is for a fundraising deficit to snowball out of our control. Donald Trump and the six MAGA Republicans running against me would love nothing more than to sense a sign of weakness in our campaign. As much as I hate asking you to spend your hard-earned dollars on our campaign, grassroots support from folks like you is the only way we'll have a shot at winning in November. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks for stepping up. \- Jared | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. clean_body: I need your help. I missed my fundraising deadline, and without your help, I’m in deep trouble again this month. | **I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP! WILL YOU ANSWER? Fellow American, There’s no other way to put this: My next fundraising deadline is RIGHT around the corner, I’m losing donors, and I need your help. We can’t afford to let the Left outraise us in our race to keep the House Majority. | Look, the Radical Left is bound and determined to unseat Republicans and push Biden’s Socialist Agenda down the American people’s throats. We can’t have a Left-of-Lenin Neo-Socialist putting the greatest country in human history in danger. It’s make-it-or-break time right now, and I know you’ve done so much to make sure we maintain the House majority, but I’ve got to have your help RIGHT NOW. Thank you for all your help in advance. I promise that all your support will go directly to saving our beautiful country. In liberty, Wesley Hunt Changing Washington won’t be easy, but graduating from West Point and serving in the United States Army, being deployed to combat zones, and flying Apache helicopters over Iraq has prepared me for tough fights and big challenges. I truly believe nothing is more worth fighting for than our great country and our way of life in the Houston area. Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Please, sign now »__](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/alito-recuse?source=FFR_20240526_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=21446%2E4449941%2EccyB1z)** | [50,000 SIGNATURE GOAL: DEMAND JUSTICE SAMUEL ALITO RECUSE HIMSELF »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/alito-recuse?source=FFR_20240526_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=21446%2E4449941%2EccyB1z)

**Here’s the bad news:** Justice Alito is biased and should absolutely recuse himself from any and every 2020 Election or January 6‐related case.

**__But here’s the worst news:__** If he doesn’t recuse himself, he could let Trump off SCOT-FREE. We CAN’T let that happen!

**[__So here’s what you can do: Sign our petition to demand that Justice Samuel Alito recuse himself »__](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/alito-recuse?source=FFR_20240526_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=10&akid=21446%2E4449941%2EccyB1z)**

name: Jill Stein for President
subject: Breaking News: Jill Secures Green Nomination!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
Next stop - the White House

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gp_nomination_fr_email&n=1)
---
Peter, Good news is hard to come by these days, but we do have a fantastic update for you today! As of yesterday, Jill received enough delegates to clinch the Green Party presidential nomination. _**She has swept 21 states’ delegate selection conventions, bringing her total delegate count to 219.**_
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gp_nomination_fr_email&n=2)
---
The Green Party is a vehicle for challenging empire and oligarchy in the United States. That’s why Jill has worked hard to grow the party and support Green candidates running for local positions. Across the country, voters are clamoring for alternatives to the politicians representing the parties of genocide, War and Wall Street. People want someone in the White House that has their best interests in mind: not the interests of AIPAC, corporations, or billionaires. And 2024 is the year to achieve that. But, Peter, she can’t continue this fight without your help! Jill doesn’t take money from super PACs so she relies on super supporters like you! **_Can you donate today in honor of Jill clinching the nomination?_**
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gp_nomination_fr_email&n=3 "DONATE NOW") [DONATE NOW](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gp_nomination_fr_email&n=3)
---
Thank you for being in this fight with us! -The Jill Stein 2024 team

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: It’s personal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
I’d like to share why I fight so hard in Congress for education funding; you see, for me, it’s personal.

While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=499DIAh%2FdBlqRCvFwHEHHPI1PYZR%2BwMFg5XzipmGrUtrt7CoiWfe6vJasFH0WH71H%2FG%2FDyoZ7m%2BXwRqeXp17%2BmnptLxUYzLXK8VraBVjTeV9em%2FH%2FyW0X7SpNMfuePU1a6WQF1uz%2Fe3Nncl7whuR7n9b3f5E1mUerRZLqdT7QjMOVMdJU%2BcDu2kw7YYtRCJ9oj6VhbUQylR%2BkTwDy0kXnZxk03QXgW6J7yDEFg20HwvODgSDbmlPNlHHVnuZyaeiF8h%2F2zWeNAyLFR7JGN20rgjfauZzjwuap266Qbbs3Jq%2FNUt7zn4GirU9ftP5c%2BlV79Q%2B%2B1fbuFdn1ah%2FuDZVED1iGWQjmrE342rUsn0rfGr9ob9ks5U8ss3Hdjs7XyBcScfgqrhAL7saJ8nvJ6G5AnvOtFyY4qFRU%2FNeT0a2632NcC214m%2FrOwRg%2FSF5nbfd)
---
| |
---
If you have a moment, I’d like to share why I fight so hard in Congress for education funding; you see, for me, it’s personal. I was raised in Coachella, where my mother and father were farmworkers. We didn’t have much, but we got by — as my mom always said, we were “poor in money, but rich in love.” It was honest, hard work. **But my mom didn’t want her children to have to break their backs in the desert sun — she always wanted me to go to college so I could have a professional career.** My grandma loved this idea — she dreamed of seeing me in a white-collar shirt. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85682542/475535930/-1463469016?amount=10&source=SBD_EM_FR_30DO_052624_1_1_EDUCATION&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTRhZWM2MmEtOGUxYi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UTNOolZ3tRO89H_9P5U8VHqf1SXqQfq4zuE7PhxwyGE=) So when I was accepted to UCLA but we didn’t have the money to afford the tuition and books, there was nothing that was going to stop me. **I put on the one suit I owned** — a god awful, itchy, blue suit that I’d bought two sizes too big (I thought I’d grow into it, but no one told me a 17-year-old boy is practically done growing!). I borrowed a suitcase. And **I walked the streets of Coachella and the Coachella Valley in the 120-degree summer heat, going business to business, asking my neighbors if they’d be able to chip in a few dollars so I could become a doctor and come back home to serve our communities.** And because they invested in me, I was able to go to UCLA, and then Harvard Medical School. And then just like I’d promised and always planned, I came back home, where I helped open the first and only free clinic, took care of many in the emergency room, and served patients who worked the same fields my parents had. I share this with you because it informs _why_ I fight so hard in Congress to make college affordable for _all_ families. I don’t think our children should have to do what I did to get an education — they should work hard, yes, but **we can also help break down the financial barriers holding generations of families back from moving up financially.** This is why I voted _against_ legislation to increase student loan interest rates, helped secure millions in funding for programs like Riverside County’s YouthBuild project to get at-risk youth into skilled jobs and educational programs, and sponsored legislation to expand access to early college high school programs. [Higher education changed my life. I want that opportunity to be available for any students willing to put in the work. I’m proud to be fighting in Congress for our children to have more opportunities than we did, but the work isn’t done. I am on the ballot again this November and need your help to keep doing this work: if you are able, can I count on you to chip in $10 or $25 today to help me win reelection?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85682543/475535931/-1463469016?amount=10&source=SBD_EM_FR_30DO_052624_1_1_EDUCATION&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTRhZWM2MmEtOGUxYi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UTNOolZ3tRO89H_9P5U8VHqf1SXqQfq4zuE7PhxwyGE=) _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately._ | | **[DONATE $10 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85682544/475535932/-1463469016?amount=10&express_lane=true&source=SBD_EM_FR_30DO_052624_1_1_EDUCATION&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTRhZWM2MmEtOGUxYi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UTNOolZ3tRO89H_9P5U8VHqf1SXqQfq4zuE7PhxwyGE=)**

I was raised in Coachella, where my mother and father were farmworkers. We didn’t have much, but we got by — as my mom always said, we were “poor in money, but rich in love.” It was honest, hard work. But my mom didn’t want her children to have to break their backs in the desert sun — she always wanted me to go to college so I could have a professional career. My grandma loved this idea — she dreamed of seeing me in a white-collar shirt. = So when I was accepted to UCLA but we didn’t have the money to afford the tuition and books, there was nothing that was going to stop me. I put on the one suit I owned — a god awful, itchy, blue suit that I’d bought two sizes too big (I thought I’d grow into it, but no one told me a 17-year-old boy is practically done growing!). body:
We’ve set an end-of-month fundraising goal to raise $25,000 by Friday night to help us close the gap with Mike Lawler’s war chest.
**ICYMI:_Roll Call_ named Mike Lawler one of the most vulnerable Republican Congressmembers**
Team,

Earlier this month, _Roll Call_ named Mike Lawler one of the _most vulnerable_ Republicans in Congress. This is our chance to flip NY-17 and take back the House majority.

_But it won’t be easy._ **_Roll Call_ noted that Lawler has “built a war chest that he’ll need to hold on to the seat against former Rep. Mondaire Jones.”** We can’t afford to miss our opportunity to defeat Lawler and retake the House, so we need to ensure that we have the resources to fight back against his massive war chest.

That’s why we’re reaching out to you today. **We’ve set an end-of-month fundraising goal to raise $25,000 by Friday night to help us take on Mike Lawler’s war chest.** Every dollar you contribute will help us reach voters across NY-17 and avoid being drowned out by the millions that will be spent against us.

ICYMI:Roll Call named Mike Lawler one of the most vulnerable Republican Congressmembers Team, Earlier this month, Roll Call named Mike Lawler one of the most vulnerable Republicans in Congress. This is our chance to flip NY-17 and take back the House majority. But it won’t be easy. Roll Call noted that Lawler has “built a war chest that he’ll need to hold on to the seat against former Rep. Mondaire Jones.” We can’t afford to miss our opportunity to defeat Lawler and retake the House, so we need to ensure that we have the resources to fight back against his massive war chest. That’s why we’re reaching out to you today. We’ve set an end-of-month fundraising goal to raise $25,000 by Friday night to help us take on Mike Lawler’s war chest. clean_body: We're going to make them regret it | = Peter, I mean every word I'm about to say: I watched the U.S. Supreme Court take a disastrous vote to decimate Roe v. Wade. I watched anti-choice Republicans launch an assault on reproductive rights like we've never seen. I watched them steal our right to choose and put millions of Americans in danger all across the country. Now, we're going to make them regret it — by kicking anti-choice Republicans out of office for what they've done. If Republicans think we're going to sit back and let them rip reproductive rights away from millions of Americans without consequence, they're dead wrong. This is our moment to replace these dangerous Republicans with strong Democratic pro-choice women who will protect our rights.** = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for taking a stand, Christina Reynolds (she/her/hers) Senior Vice President of Communications & Content, EMILYs List EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. = = Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | MANAKIN SABOT, VA \-- 100% Pro-Trump 5th Congressional District candidate, former Navy SEAL, Virginia Senator, and business owner John McGuire today announced that he has been endorsed by former Danville police chief T. Neal Morris.
Chief Morris served 44 distinguished years with the Danville Police Dept., beginning October 19, 1959 as a patrol officer, and eventually rising to the position of Police Chief in May, '71, where he served in that capacity for 32 years until his retirement in June, '03.
---
| Endorsement: 44-year police officer and former Danville police chief Neal Morris
---
| | |
---|---
|
"I wholeheartedly endorse John McGuire due to his sincere and honest approach to life and his outstanding commitment to service. John has a relentless work ethic and the leadership skills needed to bring people together so we can get our country back on track. As Navy SEAL, we know John's top priority is keeping Americans safe. We need more people like John in public service."

\-- T. Neal Morris, former Danville police chief

Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia
| McGuire said: "Thank you to Chief Morris for your support and for your distinguished 40+ year career in law enforcement. I back the blue 100% and with your support, I will continue my fight in Congress. We must win in June and give President Trump a Congress that 100% supports his America First Agenda."
McGuire is running against Never Trumper Bob Good in the VA-05 primary. McGuire has been seeing significant momentum during the race for the Republican Primary on June 18th.
McGuire has been endorsed by Republican Jewish Coalition (RJC) [Click here.](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001euyeD4HhN54ar_MpXiDftY3CYpjI7JffE8VK2S-iASwy1g-qMEqkDy9k63OgDt1u3ZuluwVbbvtUGiEiws72FyX4UKUUgi60wEYeW-H5WBQqJrilTCQxjGyfyIehrtUxMvfiGATGGt9TMKJm6wHF7YvGCburlaTuwg06TpT8Jo4eAiRfgP3fbMlFhPza6SiLXJPwVkJU3VmxhfoSTz3Lcu9GTihS54tasGiRUGAUOjF_chHwCA9fnLvaLnfscchRSixAaXNEjw9izIoyK1KnXuELAlk5OHGf3fkqwZjYzEw=&c=0_0WpMFFyGF6jo4KBzHPgCUNd7sbue29ic9t0fSk0rex6y3VcLU33g==&ch=xfyLeYUhL02mNGYDoBYTiyKMdh6kA5nOofa_5ZHjwNtOiVoeJ_hj-w==)

John has a relentless work ethic and the leadership skills needed to bring people together so we can get our country back on track. As Navy SEAL, we know John's top priority is keeping Americans safe. We need more people like John in public service." \-- T. Neal Morris, former Danville police chief Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | McGuire said: "Thank you to Chief Morris for your support and for your distinguished 40+ year career in law enforcement. I back the blue 100% and with your support, I will continue my fight in Congress. We must win in June and give President Trump a Congress that 100% supports his America First Agenda." McGuire is running against Never Trumper Bob Good in the VA-05 primary. McGuire has been seeing significant momentum during the race for the Republican Primary on June 18th. Ruben Gallego (thanks to his Democrat dark money) is beating me in the polls by 2%. His propaganda campaign finally moved the needle. If we don't do something now, this will only get worse.

2% may seem like nothing, but we can't afford to trail behind Ruben. 2% can become 3%, which can become 5%, you get the picture. The further ahead in the polls he is, the more money the left will throw at him, and the more ads he will run depicting himself as a "moderate" despite his 100% radical record in Congress.

This is why my midnight deadline is so important. I want to launch a HUGE ad campaign that will show the people of Arizona the TRUTH about radical Ruben Gallego. [**If we can take back the narrative and bounce back in the polls, we can solidify ourselves as the undisputed frontrunner in Arizona.**](https://click.stateofliberty.org/u/click?_t=90324dc351b64918b7f3f34135ac5f96&_m=d4ac4bdf07724a2baed0a7a818976eeb&_e=5RTlRrpOPCUM5mqKlLQkN50snZqM1brAJFKypUPh4MX6qgblxbZv-Mz3KgVWSXdtokVROP69xGYpgmpOwsEsP1EnsDeoYu4vlzUXTjQPAj078kCQiX2JBzzvwINdOYvY8VFxca2vR-60peKD8g6hKDynuos_TKkl50cELu3gPUvAdvklDfR5NPzt55p1_jiJSpceXYOti8fnrqIacn43SaSc0Yl1vbFiwXs-CfSbMmzD_EbJSiKikf6j9P78cKuG6DN9X2j3gmIiGMYrEOi8BPURlBdPKiinLsYeLE0aQOYNaJ1blrOSkcV85lt03dYJfZ5EbgUUOciT5jYxyvd1F9Xcaskq3fLgSEop7P4TvSplf55oZSAD3I-hY2EGFgYl0Yni_N80QivbCQJ3EUgIrw%3D%3D)

We can't afford to let Joe Biden keep the Senate and give him another radical ally in Ruben Gallego. They would destroy this country and sell YOU out to the Liberal Establishment in a heartbeat.

The road to the Senate Majority and the Presidency runs right through Arizona.

**I'm counting on your support.**

Anything and EVERYTHING you could spare makes a HUGE difference in the fight to Take Back America and SAVE ARIZONA!

subject: A deep dive on our TV ads
body:
There’s a lot that goes into it!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85686988/475544335/-1463099547?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTZmZGZmYjAtOTUxYi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dcDMeWAuY9mmfs_rSplTgvwkKq4IjEbp_tZYiopnF4s=) | Peter, This week, we learned the GOP is reserving more than $1.6 million of TV ads in our media market ahead of the November election. So I want to give you an in-depth look at our TV strategy and how we’re planning to fight back. [_**By the time you’re done with this email, I hope you’ll chip in $25 to help us make our first round of TV reservations this year!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85686989/475544336/-1900545477?&refcode=E8691-20240525-AdDeepDive-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTZmZGZmYjAtOTUxYi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dcDMeWAuY9mmfs_rSplTgvwkKq4IjEbp_tZYiopnF4s=) Josh says it all the time - we have to meet voters where they are. That means knocking on neighbors doors, shaking hands at taco trucks, and yes, advertising to families as they watch America’s Got Talent. We know TV ads work, however there are some real challenges with getting them up on air. Our first challenge is to get the TV ads filmed with the right message. That means testing our message in polling and then, actually shooting the commercial. We’re scheduling our first TV shoot this summer. The next stage of this process is incredibly daunting. Our ads play in the Sacramento media market, one of the most expensive places to run ads in the entire country! In the next few months, we will have to lock in our budget with the TV channels on a weekly basis. And we’re competing for the best price against not just the Republicans, but also other advertisers who want to sell their products. Stick with me here - we’re moving into some math. It costs $565 to earn 1 point on TV (or $252,000 for 500 points), which is how we track our penetration levels. In other words, we want to buy as much ad space as we can afford to earn more “points” than the Republicans (who are going to spend millions of dollars to attack Josh...) **What this means is that we need to know how much money we can put behind our ads _now_ , or else Republicans will beat us to the punch.** Our end-of-month deadline is incredibly important because it’s going to determine how much we can put towards our TV ads budget. We need your help to raise $15,000 by May 31st and we’re falling short right now. [_**So, now that you know how your contribution will make a difference, will you please send in a generous donation right now to help us launch our ads and stay competitive with all the GOP Super PAC spending?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85686990/475544337/-1900545477?&refcode=E8691-20240525-AdDeepDive-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTZmZGZmYjAtOTUxYi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dcDMeWAuY9mmfs_rSplTgvwkKq4IjEbp_tZYiopnF4s=) _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately:_ | **[**DONATE $5 →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85686991/475544338/1287215685?refcode=E8691-20240525-AdDeepDive-EG-CampaignNews&amount=5&express=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTZmZGZmYjAtOTUxYi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dcDMeWAuY9mmfs_rSplTgvwkKq4IjEbp_tZYiopnF4s=)** | **[DONATE $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85686992/475544339/1287215685?refcode=E8691-20240525-AdDeepDive-EG-CampaignNews&amount=10&express=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTZmZGZmYjAtOTUxYi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dcDMeWAuY9mmfs_rSplTgvwkKq4IjEbp_tZYiopnF4s=)**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Roger Stone, Tucker Carlson, Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend,

Never did I imagine that I would become the right-wing’s favorite punching bag for insults and attacks. Never.

But if investigating Donald Trump and holding him accountable for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, **so be it.**

If Roger Stone wants to call me a congenital liar and despicable huckster, **so be it** (a pretty rich insult coming from him if I do say so myself).

And if Donald Trump himself wants to call me, as he did in all caps on his social media, “SLIMEBALL ADAM ‘SHIFTY’ SCHIFF, ONE OF THE TRUE LOWLIFES IN THE HISTORY OF POLITICS IN AMERICA” for holding him to account over and over and over again, **so be it.**

They are going after me because they know I am effective. Those that don’t concern them — they ignore. The last place Roger Stone or Donald Trump want me to be is in the United States Senate — because they know I will continue to hold their feet to the fire.

[Please, help me take our work to the United States Senate by splitting $10 or any amount you can spare between VPP and my campaign ahead of our end-of-month deadline.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/69069?t=6&akid=14787%2E878179%2EkwxkD7) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/69070?t=7&akid=14787%2E878179%2EkwxkD7)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. clean_body: | Friend, Never did I imagine that I would become the right-wing’s favorite punching bag for insults and attacks. Never. But if investigating Donald Trump and holding him accountable for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, so be it. If Roger Stone wants to call me a congenital liar and despicable huckster, so be it (a pretty rich insult coming from him if I do say so myself). And if Donald Trump himself wants to call me, as he did in all caps on his social media, “SLIMEBALL ADAM ‘SHIFTY’ SCHIFF, ONE OF THE TRUE LOWLIFES IN THE HISTORY OF POLITICS IN AMERICA” for holding him to account over and over and over again, so be it. They are going after me because they know I am effective. Those that don’t concern them — they ignore. The last place Roger Stone or Donald Trump want me to be is in the United States Senate — because they know I will continue to hold their feet to the fire. name: Brandon Herrera
subject: You can do it! (-68,838.52)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee
body:
Patriot,

We're getting close to the end, nearing the final 48 hours before polls close on Tuesday evening, and we still have a budget deficit of $68,838.52.

I don't want to get to the end and see we've lost by just a tiny sliver of votes because we couldn't close this budget gap to pay for our final text message, phone calls, and digital ads.

I'm sure you're busy with family stuff this weekend—and you should be. But please take a moment to help me finish strong.

In my heart of hearts, I believe we're going to win—but that it's going to be close, decided by our final campaign effort.

Give what you can afford (and win a chance for a trip for two to San Antonio to fire the AK-50 and appear in a future video to boot) at https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate.

Thank you and God Bless.

Brandon Herrera

 

 

 

 

 

Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee
Unsubscribe here

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. name: Mark Pukita, GFI Ohio
subject: ⏰ Crucial Info Awaits You This Week
body:
Unearth this week's most significant insights immediately. | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=154ed106b9&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| This week's 3 most important things you need to know or actions you need to take to help us recapture our cities, state, and nation.

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=73e27cbc6f&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | | **
CONCERNED ABOUT MEDICAL FREEDOM?
WANT TO PROTECT YOU RIGHT TO
CHOOSE OR REFUSE ANY
MEDICAL TREATMENT OR PROCEDURE?
ESPECIALLY AFTER COVID?**

---
|
If you are concerned about medical freedom and you are not aware of [**Ohioans for Medical Freedom (OAMF)**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=ee26162b3c&e=5c740fa3e2), you should be. OAMF is a non-partisan organization advocating for your right to choose or refuse any medical treatment or procedure. OAMF especially needs your help NOW.

Why?

Ohio House Bill (HB) 73, the "[**Dave and Angie Patient and Health Provider Protection Act**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=675a765236&e=5c740fa3e2)", is working it's way through the legislative process in Columbus. Last week, OAMF supporters and volunteers testified in favor of the legislation to the Senate subcommittee debating the bill. You can find links to their in-person testimony by going [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=cbc3d4977f&e=5c740fa3e2). It's impressive!

NOW is the time to be calling, writing, texting, and visiting your representatives in Columbus to get this bill approved and made into Ohio law!

There is a "Call to Action" at the middle of [**THIS**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=123058da6c&e=5c740fa3e2) web page on the OAMF website. Please go [**THERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=eb3c524bf3&e=5c740fa3e2) and do as asked. It will only take a few minutes to email the Ohio Senators who must vote YES on this extremely important legislation!

Also be sure to register on the OAMF site to get regular updates on the legislation's progress! You can visit the OAMF web site by clicking [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=12c3c17832&e=5c740fa3e2) or on the image below.

THANK YOU!

---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6020b2b447&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
---
| |
**"MUST READ" & "CAN'T MISS"
SUBSTACKS TO HELP PEOPLE
BETTER UNDERSTAND
SELF-GOVERNANCE IN OHIO**

---
|
Here are 4 "must read" and "must subscribe" Substacks focused on government, politics, and self-governance in Ohio. They are in alphabetical order by title because it's impossible to rank these by value & importance. They are all valuable & important. Every Ohioan should be subscribed to these web publications. They are required basic reading to understand the state of our state without mainstream media and party insider "spin". In other words, they are: _**the rest of the story**_.

[**Ken McEntee**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f7798b66e9&e=5c740fa3e2)

[**The Patriot Mind Newsletter**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=8268e213de&e=5c740fa3e2)

[**The Republican Reformist**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=1a49a8904c&e=5c740fa3e2)

[**Update from Jess Franz ORP SCC 5**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0fa1810318&e=5c740fa3e2)

If you have suggestions on any additions to this list, feel free to call or text Mark Pukita at 614-499-0599 (c) and make a recommendation. You can email him too: [mark@mark4ohio.com](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=7e0793ec64&e=5c740fa3e2)

THANK YOU!
---
|
---
| |
**KEEP AMERICA FOR AMERICANS!
CHINA'S SILENT WAR ON AMERICA!**

---
|
This week we sent out a one-time special message about a new initiative called "**America for Americans** " designed to wake up more Ohioans to the threat China poses to our communities, state, and nation. If you haven't seen that message, you can access a copy of it on the web [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=844308990b&e=5c740fa3e2).

As you'll read, part of this initiative is an Ohio-developed, 10-week "course" titled, “**China’s Silent War on America** ”. A lesson will be released on Wednesdays every week for 10 weeks. To remind you, we'll highlight each new lesson in this email.

How did this initiative come about?

Recently, grassroots leaders in Ohio became acutely aware of the many national security threats posed by Communist China as Communist China attempts to embed itself into every aspect of America’s economy, politics, society (including our schools), and sovereignty. China’s major goal is to establish itself as the dominant force on the globe thereby establishing a new world order. This will require the takeover of the United States.

Communist China is currently waging war with America; a war they plan on winning. It is a war where the weapons do not have physical bullets but it’s a war nonetheless. If America is to survive this war we must first arm ourselves with knowledge so we may mobilize our forces to push back against this silent invasion.

We must never forget America was founded on freedom and that Communist China was founded on the suppression of freedom. These two ideologies cannot co-exist. We have an important decision to make or it will be made for us by Communist China.

That said, **America for Americans** will provide a short lesson each of the next ten weeks to educate the reader on the many strategies China is using to undermine America’s power at home and abroad, while enriching its own homeland. The reader will also be guided towards action items to help reduce China’s influence in the state of Ohio.

Click [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=72cbaed39b&e=5c740fa3e2) or on the image below to access **Lesson 1** of “**China’s Silent War on America** ”.

_Next week's lesson, Lesson 2: China’s Goal of World Domination Using the Belt and Road Initiative._

THANK YOU!

---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=8a4304691d&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|
[May 19, 2024 - 📢 Your Voice Needed for Election Integrity TODAY!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9afbca8bc6&e=5c740fa3e2 "📢 Your Voice Needed for Election Integrity TODAY!")

[April 28, 2024 - ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=075419f8ae&e=5c740fa3e2)[👥 ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=07e2fab906&e=5c740fa3e2 "👥 Urgent: Safeguard our Kids, Elections, and Party!")[Urgent: Safeguard our Kids, Elections, and Party!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=a4312f388c&e=5c740fa3e2)

[April 21, 2024 - 📣 Breaking: Election Integrity Lawsuit](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=1244459018&e=5c740fa3e2)

[April 14, 2024 - This Week's Must-Know Trio!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=7f964e3914&e=5c740fa3e2)

[April 7, 2024 - Secure American Freedoms This Week!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c9be37b3f8&e=5c740fa3e2)

[February 18, 2024 - Vote on or before March 19th!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=1e3582a53e&e=5c740fa3e2)

[January 14, 2024 - ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f92842e890&e=5c740fa3e2)[Ohio Liberator List!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=713615202e&e=5c740fa3e2 "URGENT! Ohio Liberator List!")

[November 9, 2023 - What now?

October 15, 2023 - Critical Volunteer Needs!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=30c07c8d17&e=5c740fa3e2)

[August 12, 2023 - Download Our FREE App!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=2425735659&e=5c740fa3e2)

[July 30, 2023 - Select Better Candidates

July 23, 2023 - Help Trevor Cain](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=2458e09939&e=5c740fa3e2)

[**CLICK HERE for access to all past issues!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=199c5ca63b&e=5c740fa3e2)

|

You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=3a4a020910) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&t=b&e=5c740fa3e2&c=3a4a020910).

name: Bob Casey
subject: My anniversary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=3079%2E552475%2Ei6kPi_)
Hi Peter,
Today, Terese and I are celebrating 39 years of marriage. That’s an accomplishment I’m proud of.
I’m often asked about the secret to a successful marriage. I believe that the combination of humor, understanding, forgiveness, and love is what has made my marriage with Terese so happy and strong.
Our first date was actually a blind date for a dormitory dance. If you had told me that a blind date would lead to a beautiful marriage, four amazing daughters, and two wonderful grandchildren, I wouldn’t have believed you — especially because I showed up an hour late.
But here we are, 39 years later, with so much love and good fortune in our lives.
**[Now, before I log off to spend the rest of the day with my wonderful wife, I need to quickly ask if you can make a donation to my re-election campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240526-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240526-1&refcode2=3079_552475_i6kPi_&akid=3079%2E552475%2Ei6kPi_) **
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._

clean_body: Hi Peter, Today, Terese and I are celebrating 39 years of marriage. That’s an accomplishment I’m proud of. I’m often asked about the secret to a successful marriage. I believe that the combination of humor, understanding, forgiveness, and love is what has made my marriage with Terese so happy and strong. Our first date was actually a blind date for a dormitory dance. If you had told me that a blind date would lead to a beautiful marriage, four amazing daughters, and two wonderful grandchildren, I wouldn’t have believed you — especially because I showed up an hour late. But here we are, 39 years later, with so much love and good fortune in our lives. Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. I couldn’t do any of this without Terese — or without the support of folks like you chipping in when they can, so thank you in advance. With gratitude, Bob Casey

name: Dr. Ami Bera
subject: Celebrating the AANHPI community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Peter,

May is Asian American, Native Hawaiian, and Pacific Islanders Heritage Month. I’m proud to pay homage to the vibrant cultures of the AANHPI community.

As we are coming to the end of the month, I want to take a moment to recognize the numerous ways our AANHPI neighbors impact the world around us and acknowledge all the work they do.

In Sacramento County, our AANHPI community enhances our lives everyday. From enterprising small business owners and educators to dedicated first responders and health care professionals, they are supporting our region every step of the way.

As an Executive Board Member for the Congressional Asian Pacific American Caucus and Ranking Member of the Subcommittee on the Indo-Pacific, I am proud that Congress has come together to address violent hate crimes.

Let’s continue to celebrate our AANHPI community this month, and every month after.

Be well,
Dr. Ami Bera
---

I need your help. I missed my fundraising deadline, and without your help, I'm in deep trouble again this month.

| [](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=fe5909ea7d3b4426a68cd2d214bdc733&_e=SKFtiFFNVM6yb_6q1AXbZC7wBPkIk5iCYhvfrx3vJiQtazKCY6ho5Thdxcl6mBs0imwdfOQb6zwu0d2G8Zbz79QVeAWkJwE1QqVsPcK2a--SJgWDRreq2DvkT4a81fayhEUrdzrAm5nIdQBjZrgSMdd0sOs4PBRrOlFBrcSQoqFsmuqtFAFNZjndTj2YvGdewyom_HD23GM45diIbSRRbn9KDgkIgXlQdd9uN9sDUDMk2RRsr0b6kC8XHMtnFF9Q356NrV_uTT3Td2_umfdUZtQkx7idEfiXBLt_yh3N7xSkgg3kXDP408lTWnNy38CuAoywZq4Ek98IdAiS0munYQ%3D%3D)

This November, voters will have to choose between freedom or extremism. And here in Montana, that choice is stark. **_Here are just a few of Greg Gianforte’s greatest misses:_**
❌ He taxes retirees out of the homes they have lived in for most of their lives.
❌ He sues Montana Fish, Wildlife and Parks to block public river access.
❌ He restricts, then promises to end, a woman's right to privacy and abortions.
❌ He gives giant tax breaks to big corporations and raises property taxes on working people.
❌ He watches as critical school levies fail because his tax increases prevent voters from being able to afford them.
---
We must fight like our freedom is on the line... **because it is.** And the only way to do that is to continue hitting our fundraising goals and show Gianforte that we’re not backing down.
[We are going to win this race but we need your help, Peter. Please donate $10 or anything you can before our May deadline this Friday at midnight and help us reach our $33,000 goal:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85688842/475550894/1311613515?amount=10&source=SBD_RB_EM_FR_30DO_052624_1_1_Misses&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNDciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODdkZDE3ZTktOWUxYi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oqZ2Sj2-DYhINihdDTMedOJMkyIYjef3cfe-fj_jadM=)

For more than 25 years, Ryan was a successful gun industry executive. But he also saw how unchecked extremism could take away American freedoms and even jeopardize our democracy. Ryan sees the same thing happening to Montana: wealthy extremist Greg Gianforte bought his seat with his own millions, and now he’s raising our taxes in order to give tax breaks to corporations, making Montana unaffordable, defunding our public schools, locking up our public lands, hijacking our freedoms, and rigging the system for the rich.

Ryan chose Raph Graybill as his running mate because no Montanan has done more to protect constitutional rights and freedoms from Greg Gianforte. Since Gianforte became governor, Raph has blocked more than a dozen different unconstitutional laws that invaded Montanans’ constitutional rights.

**Ryan and Raph are running as champions for ALL Montanans and to Get Our Montana Back!**

clean_body: I’m getting comments on the regular about how fired up folks are about our race Ryan Busse puts principles over politics. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hey Peter, it’s Ryan. I’m getting comments on the regular about how fired up folks are about our race — take a look at this one from Facebook last week: = This campaign is about winning. Because when we win we will ensure people can afford to live in the towns they grew up in. We will make sure every child in Montana receives a quality education. We will make sure women are able to make health care decisions privately and without fear of consequences. This campaign is about getting YOUR Montana back. = | | = | = This November, voters will have to choose between freedom or extremism. And here in Montana, that choice is stark. Here are just a few of Greg Gianforte’s greatest misses: ❌ He taxes retirees out of the homes they have lived in for most of their lives. ❌ He sues Montana Fish, Wildlife and Parks to block public river access. ❌ He restricts, then promises to end, a woman's right to privacy and abortions. ❌ He gives giant tax breaks to big corporations and raises property taxes on working people. ❌ He watches as critical school levies fail because his tax increases prevent voters from being able to afford them. We must fight like our freedom is on the line... because it is. And the only way to do that is to continue hitting our fundraising goals and show Gianforte that we’re not backing down. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = LFG! — Ryan | | | ---|---|--- = For more than 25 years, Ryan was a successful gun industry executive. But he also saw how unchecked extremism could take away American freedoms and even jeopardize our democracy. Ryan sees the same thing happening to Montana: wealthy extremist Greg Gianforte bought his seat with his own millions, and now he’s raising our taxes in order to give tax breaks to corporations, making Montana unaffordable, defunding our public schools, locking up our public lands, hijacking our freedoms, and rigging the system for the rich. Ryan chose Raph Graybill as his running mate because no Montanan has done more to protect constitutional rights and freedoms from Greg Gianforte. subject: Can you help my father in Texas?

body:
Ted is a proven America First warrior who FIGHTS for our MAGA values in the U.S. Senate. Read more >>>
Ted is a proven America First warrior who FIGHTS for our MAGA values in the U.S. Senate. Read more >>>

| | | Fellow Conservative, Donald Trump, Jr. here - As you know, my father is under attack from the Biden White House and numerous absolutely unhinged persons using and abusing the American legal system to try and take him down. We also have Biden and the Democrats spending millions on ads falsely smearing us all and working to register as many far-left voters as possible before November. **But** _**we have another huge problem**_**you haven't heard about. We have an extremely close Senate race in Texas, and****Senator Ted Cruz needs urgent help****. We saw** _**Chuck Schumer**_**boasting just this week that the Democrats will win Texas and keep the U.S. Senate... ** Fellow Conservative, we can't let that happen. If the Democrats take Texas, they'll keep the Senate and use senatorial power to stop the MAGA movement and block everything my father wants to accomplish-_including a full investigation of the
