clean_body: Ted is a proven America First warrior who FIGHTS for our MAGA values in the U.S. Senate. Read more >>> Ted is a proven America First warrior who FIGHTS for our MAGA values in the U.S. Senate. Read more >>> | | | Fellow Conservative, Donald Trump, Jr. here - As you know, my father is under attack from the Biden White House and numerous absolutely unhinged persons using and abusing the American legal system to try and take him down. We also have Biden and the Democrats spending millions on ads falsely smearing us all and working to register as many far-left voters as possible before November. But we have another huge problemyou haven't heard about. We have an extremely close Senate race in Texas, andSenator Ted Cruz needs urgent help. We saw Chuck Schumerboasting just this week that the Democrats will win Texas and keep the U.S. Senate... Fellow Conservative, we can't let that happen. If the Democrats take Texas, they'll keep the Senate and use senatorial power to stop the MAGA movement and block everything my father wants to accomplish-including a full investigation of the Washington Swamp! Ted Cruz is a proven America First warrior, and we need him in the Senate fighting for us all. As I said, Texas is a TOP TARGET for Democrats in 2024. They know the path to victory runs through the Lone Star State. And they're pumping an estimated $100 million into Texas to beat Cruz and hold the Senate for the radical left. I'm calling on MAGA patriots like YOU to FIGHT BACK with a generous contribution today! Make no mistake - Ted Cruz will work non-stop alongside the Trump White House to BUILD THE WALL, DRAIN THE SWAMP, and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. So don't wait, Fellow Conservative. Rush in your best gift to send Ted Cruz back to the Senate and save Texas from the Democrats! Thanks in advance for pitching in your powerful support today! -Donald Trump, Jr. | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | |

| | |

**In case you missed my update from earlier this week, friend, I had to make sure you heard the news:**
| | **🎉💞 Planned Parenthood Action Fund 💞🎉**
**ENDORSED my campaign for Senate! **
---
**In order to capitalize on this new energy, I want YOU to be one of the 100,000 supporters I need to help me show the sheer strength of our campaign.**

---
| | [SIGN NOW: I Endorse Debbie for Florida >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85688899/475551177/224621434?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&refcode=jtk1277-su-nd&code=jtk1277-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTYwNmZhNzItOWYxYi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4qQESHk8Yw5VZWW-m2SQkvhkHCUBEyfcEqyVtttA4gE=&emci=7182f6d8-4b19-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=9606fa72-9f1b-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=3969733)
---
Earning a big-time endorsement like this isn’t just proof that we have what it takes to flip Florida blue. It proves the work we’re doing to restore abortion rights, at home and across the country, _is so worth it._
**And up against an opponent like Rick Scott, it's no wonder why I'm the only candidate in this race endorsed by Planned Parenthood:**
* As governor, Scott took the first steps toward limiting abortion by forcing women to undergo costly, time-consuming hurdles to obtain them;

* He celebrated the reversal of _Roe,_ which he'd fought for since 2010;

* He's filed briefs urging the courts to uphold baseless restrictions to medication abortion, and even blocked bills to protect IVF;

* He’s endorsed candidates who have opposed IVF _and_ contraceptives;

* In the Senate, he co-sponsored a national abortion ban at 20 weeks that would put __ doctors in prison;

* And he endorsed Florida's six-week abortion ban, saying, **"I _am 100% pro-life and if I was still governor, I would sign this bill._ " **

**With a record like that, it's no wonder why a new poll shows me ahead of him by four points!** It's simply because the tides are turning in Florida — I know it, so does Planned Parenthood, and so do you.
But while earning Planned Parenthood’s stamp of approval is one of my proudest accomplishments so far, I can’t lose sight of what’s most important — because on Election day, they won’t decide who wins this race. **It's the grassroots supporters like** _you, _**friend, who will.**
**So I’m personally asking:[Will you add your name to endorse my campaign? Even if you’ve signed on before, it would mean so much as I work to hit my rapid-response, 100,000-signature goal tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85688900/475551178/224621434?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&refcode=jtk1277-su-nd&code=jtk1277-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTYwNmZhNzItOWYxYi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4qQESHk8Yw5VZWW-m2SQkvhkHCUBEyfcEqyVtttA4gE=&emci=7182f6d8-4b19-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=9606fa72-9f1b-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=3969733)**
| | [SIGN NOW: I Endorse Debbie for Florida >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85688901/475551179/224621434?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&refcode=jtk1277-su-nd&code=jtk1277-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTYwNmZhNzItOWYxYi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4qQESHk8Yw5VZWW-m2SQkvhkHCUBEyfcEqyVtttA4gE=&emci=7182f6d8-4b19-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=9606fa72-9f1b-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=3969733)

Thank you so much for being on this team,

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
|
* * *

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. The MTA announced that they’ll be throwing a few crumbs towards New Jersey in exchange for their outrageous proposal to clog North Jersey roads. This plan would saddle Jersey families with a $15-a-day, $4,000-a-year Congestion Tax while polluting our communities. Fortunately, we’ve got Josh Gottheimer in our corner, fighting back. **_“The MTA ignored the tens of thousands of families who begged them not to pollute our children. It’s only right that the federal government ensures there is a full environmental review before they whack Jersey families with the cancer-causing Congestion Tax.”
— Josh Gottheimer_** [We can count on Josh Gottheimer to always do right by our Jersey communities — can we count on you to support our campaign with a donation of $10 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85689020/475551565/-2103086625?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_202526_FR_CongestionTax_0_3MO_TeamGottheimer_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWE4YWVjNC05ZjFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wz-uFSNHprydI9prfjKKwwIhR4DmrQAKw132oKZPrcU=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: By the time you finish reading this message, a lot of other Democrats will have stepped up. Can we count on you to join them? | | Derek -- Our end-of-month goal is just five days away , and we cannot afford to fall behind. We’ve crunched the numbers, and here’s what we’ve worked out: If 22 more supporters from Manassas step up today, we’ll reach our end-of-month goal in no time. If 22 more supporters from Manassas step up today, we’ll have the tools to keep building our Party infrastructure and invest in on-the-ground organizing, voter protection efforts, and state-of-the-art data and technology. If 22 more supporters from Manassas step up today, we’ll have the resources to reelect President Biden and Vice President Harris and elect Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide. By the time you finish reading this message, a lot of other Democrats will have stepped up. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | ---|--- | | Thank you for being on this team, The Democrats Text JOIN to 43367 Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85689610/475553678/-1755529737?amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240526_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjkzZTVmNS1hMjFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8lp05IDL_dkm2YD92LI5rrojHqelxxDGWj4mUuCAPi4=) Hi Peter, it’s Sherrod Brown. I’m personally reaching out to ask you to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue. My team and I have set an ambitious goal to raise $350,000 before the end of the month, and right now, we're falling way short, so we need all the help we can get. I’m counting on folks like you to donate $10 (or more) so we can win what has become the toughest reelection battle of my life. **The time to act is now, so I’m asking you to please give again to help me defend my seat in Ohio and keep the Senate blue.[Please, will you split $10 or more between my campaign and Mazie’s to help me defend my seat in Ohio and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85689611/475553679/-1755529737?amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240526_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjkzZTVmNS1hMjFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8lp05IDL_dkm2YD92LI5rrojHqelxxDGWj4mUuCAPi4=)** | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85689612/475553680/-1755529737?amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240526_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjkzZTVmNS1hMjFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8lp05IDL_dkm2YD92LI5rrojHqelxxDGWj4mUuCAPi4=)

Hitting our goal is more important now than ever before. Why? Because the odds are stacked against me:
* The GOP named me one of their top targets for defeat, and _CNN_ says I’m one of the most vulnerable senators in the entire country.
* My opponent, Bernie Moreno, is spending millions of his own dollars to fund his campaign and flood the airways with his pro-Trump message.
* Mitch McConnell-aligned super PACs made a record-breaking ad reservation in Ohio – all in an attempt to take me down and flip the Senate red.

**The polls show me neck and neck with my opponent, which is why every dollar is absolutely critical. It won’t be easy, but we CAN pull ahead IF folks like you chip in to help us get the resources we need to spread our pro-worker message.**
[**Will you please split $10 between my campaign and Mazie’s? Your donation could mean the difference between winning or losing Ohio.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85689613/475553681/-1755529737?amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240526_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjkzZTVmNS1hMjFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8lp05IDL_dkm2YD92LI5rrojHqelxxDGWj4mUuCAPi4=)
Thank you for standing with me,

# Experts Agree: Rural Votes Key to 2024
---
| Team Dems— More and more pollsters and experts are coming to the same conclusion: Democrats cannot win in 2024 without carrying more of the rural vote. Just take a look at this study showing the decline of the party with rural voters since 1996.
---
| [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndlbwinningruralamerica?refcode=e_rural1)
---
| **Across the heartland,****progressive voices and ideals are muzzled behind the Republican blockade on messaging and dominant media ownership.******

No Dem Left Behind exists to turn the tides and win the crucial rural votes that we need to secure victory in battleground states while reshaping the Electoral Map over the years to come.

[**Chip in now to give the support we need to expand our rural ground-game ahead of next year's critical election.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndlbwinningruralamerica?refcode=e_rural1)

Initial statistics show that Speaker Johnson’s ad has already been viewed over 1,400,000 times — and that’s growing by the second. The sole goal of his ads is to flip swing seats from blue to red and EXPAND the Republican Majority. That’s why we need to fight back. = = = Last month, we learned that Mike Johnson cut big checks for Republicans in tossup seats in California.Why? Because election forecasters and data analysts have determined that control of the U.S. House will be decided right here in California. His big checks coupled with this massive advertising buy could spell trouble for our hopes of taking back the House of Representatives. = = = = = = Thank you! \- CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. name: Maxwell Frost
subject: 🖇️ survey inside for Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter – Since emailing you about Governor Ron DeSantis, I’ve had people tell me to stop using the word fascist.

But I won’t stop. This is what’s going on, and we need to call DeSantis’ abuse of power for what it is: fascism.

I won’t tone down my language when WEEK AFTER WEEK, communities in Florida are actively being oppressed and scapegoated for DeSantis’ own political gain.

But I can’t be the only one calling out DeSantis’ fascism. They’re already trying to silence me. So I need a huge surge of support behind me to prepare for whatever attacks they launch against our movement. Can you stand with me by chipping in $27 now? >> (http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/IueT3U8nvv1Utuwy87gGkg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRoNi69P0RgaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTEwNF9lbV9mcl9iMV9kZXNhbnRpczJfY2wtcnMmYW1vdW50PTI3VwNzcGNCCmZGvalTZjhuMkdSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp)

Peter – In just the past few months, DeSantis has doubled-down on his fascist attacks against Floridians:

❌A new bill was passed to expand the “Don’t Say Gay” law in schools up to 12th grade, furthering far-right efforts to legislate LGBTQ+ youth out of existence,

❌He’s cracking down on his opposition with a proposed law that would require bloggers and independent journalists who write about him or other officials to register with the state or face fines,

❌And while this is all underway, he’s touring the country and collecting checks from GOP mega-donors to fund his Presidential campaign launch.

I’m telling you this because we can’t let these fascists takeover our state. We can’t stand for it. And we can’t stay quiet.

So Peter, that’s where you come in. If we’re going to defeat fascism in Florida, we need strength in numbers to show DeSantis and his far-right henchmen that we’re not going anywhere.

clean_body: Peter – Since emailing you about Governor Ron DeSantis, I’ve had people tell me to stop using the word fascist. But I won’t stop. This is what’s going on, and we need to call DeSantis’ abuse of power for what it is: fascism. I won’t tone down my language when WEEK AFTER WEEK, communities in Florida are actively being oppressed and scapegoated for DeSantis’ own political gain. But I can’t be the only one calling out DeSantis’ fascism. They’re already trying to silence me. So I need a huge surge of support behind me to prepare for whatever attacks they launch against our movement. Can you stand with me by chipping in $27 now? >> () Peter – In just the past few months, DeSantis has doubled-down on his fascist attacks against Floridians: ❌A new bill was passed to expand the “Don’t Say Gay” law in schools up to 12th grade, furthering far-right efforts to legislate LGBTQ+ youth out of existence, ❌He’s cracking down on his opposition with a proposed law that would require bloggers and independent journalists who write about him or other officials to register with the state or face fines, ❌And while this is all underway, he’s touring the country and collecting checks from GOP mega-donors to fund his Presidential campaign launch. I’m telling you this because we can’t let these fascists takeover our state. We can’t stand for it. And we can’t stay quiet. So Peter, that’s where you come in. If we’re going to defeat fascism in Florida, we need strength in numbers to show DeSantis and his far-right henchmen that we’re not going anywhere. I’m urging 545 supporters to join me by chipping in with a donation before midnight. If you’re ready to help me fight against fascism, rush anything you can now >> () Donate $10 () Donate $27 () Donate $50 () Donate $100 (~~) Donate $250 (~~) Other Amount (~~) Stronger together, Rep. name: Tina Smith
subject: If you haven’t heard of this legislation, you should read this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hi folks, Last month, I wrote an op-ed in the _New York Times_ about the _Comstock Act_ — a 150-year-old law that the GOP is scheming to use to limit reproductive freedom for women nationwide — and how I’m planning to fight back against its implementation. **[You can read the piece here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85690320/475556163/-2002289327?refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240526_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDQ4YWZmZC1hNzFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qJ7vFRympAeeIiza80-sOAPimR4QM-9Ypywtja4bvEg=&emci=7348affd-a71b-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=7d48affd-a71b-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=6227932)** The _Comstock Act_ is an absurd, outdated piece of legislation that has not been broadly enforced for nearly a century. But Trump and his right-wing policy advisors are planning to use this legislation to make it illegal to send medication abortion and other tools to help with reproductive health care through the mail. And recently, Trump signaled a willingness to ban contraception too. **This would make it _significantly harder_ for women to access reproductive care — _even_ in states where abortion is legal. ** As I wrote in my op-ed, “We can’t let anyone — not the Supreme Court, not Donald Trump and certainly not a random busybody from the 19th century — take away Americans’ right to access medication abortion. We must protect the ability of doctors, pharmacies and patients to receive in the mail the supplies they need to exercise their right to reproductive care.” **[Please support my work to defend reproductive freedom in the U.S. Senate. I’m leading the charge to repeal the _Comstock Act_ , and I’m supporting pro-choice candidates across the country. Chip in to help today >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85690321/475556164/-956013409?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240526_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDQ4YWZmZC1hNzFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qJ7vFRympAeeIiza80-sOAPimR4QM-9Ypywtja4bvEg=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85690322/475556165/-956013409?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240526_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDQ4YWZmZC1hNzFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qJ7vFRympAeeIiza80-sOAPimR4QM-9Ypywtja4bvEg=)

clean_body: | Hi folks, Last month, I wrote an op-ed in the New York Times about the Comstock Act — a 150-year-old law that the GOP is scheming to use to limit reproductive freedom for women nationwide — and how I’m planning to fight back against its implementation. The Comstock Act is an absurd, outdated piece of legislation that has not been broadly enforced for nearly a century. But Trump and his right-wing policy advisors are planning to use this legislation to make it illegal to send medication abortion and other tools to help with reproductive health care through the mail. And recently, Trump signaled a willingness to ban contraception too. This would make it significantly harder for women to access reproductive care — even in states where abortion is legal. As I wrote in my op-ed, “We can’t let anyone — not the Supreme Court, not Donald Trump and certainly not a random busybody from the 19th century — take away Americans’ right to access medication abortion. We must protect the ability of doctors, pharmacies and patients to receive in the mail the supplies they need to exercise their right to reproductive care.” = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for supporting me in this work. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Ryan
subject: Remembering the Fallen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mackenzie For Congress]()
body:
I wanted to pass on this quick story about a veteran from our community | | | | |
---
| Friends,
Tomorrow, we remember the servicemembers who have made the ultimate sacrifice to protect the freedoms that we all enjoy.
Yesterday, I was invited by family of Private Earl E.R. Seibert to attend his funeral service. After over 80 years, the remains of PV2 Seibert were finally brought back to Allentown and laid to rest.
PV2 Seibert was a member of the 803rd Army Air Force Engineer Aviation Battalion in World War II. Their unit was sent to Luzon in the Philippines, arriving in October 1941. PV2 Seibert and the noncombatant 803rd Battalion were called upon to help defend the Bataan Peninsula from the invading Japanese troops after December 22 1941, until forced to surrender on April 9, 1942. The wounded POWs were forced to walk 65 miles to the Cabanatuan POW Camp. This became known as “The Bataan Death March”.
PV2 Seibert became one of the 1,006 POWs from the camp not accounted for at war's end. He was memorialized on the marble “Wall of Missing” for the Army and Army Air Force of the Cabanatuan POW Camp at the Manila American Cemetery.
The POW/MIA Accounting Agency and their partners, following over seventy years of investigative efforts, have worked with PV2 Seibert's family to properly identify him and bring him home.
Recently a rosette was placed before his name to signify that he is now accounted for, and his remains have been returned to Allentown.
At the memorial one participant put it simply, “They gave up their tomorrow for our today.” While we enjoy some time with family, let us remember all those who gave their life for us to be able to enjoy the freedoms we have today.
All the Best,
Ryan
---
| | | |

body:
I'm hoping you'll support him alongside me

| Fellow American,

My name is Jo Bishop, and I wanted to pass this email along to you that Dan, my husband, may have already sent you. You don't know me, but you may know him, Dan Bishop.

I know how important it is to Dan that he wins this Attorney General race to bring Law and Order back to North Carolina. He's the best man I've ever met, from being a loving husband to a prominent father to a distinguished public servant. **[So before you read Dan's original email, I wanted to ask you to chip in a few bucks to his campaign. I know he'll appreciate it!](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=812c590cb04849c2b92754858b4ba6cc&_e=f_xJBzeWMoGGmMRXYnlILduB3B01LXhroRyCcypA8SI2AeB8G99S6ocjDkZDc9n3i3eYSPcsLrK4ZIqss4ud17Nsg_Y2S7iFuZcXVoHFQspxmAseIuFCbFxS9MFqQvHkv7aH8rjW_K6PFIIKNb_5IeLW0RBOgoIzZfKiH8278k_p-rwZ67lDSB-XidDHPxv0Q0pfUdsxgSQxDguYxEy0E3rAAC0BKwV9fvL9TJkp3BGZ3QqyReAgDWdzIy94eZZjs5608rGsE5b40u7yX5OnxHfIREJDuJQwttqpc2mVOyx_ZaeDyZ1sSqQsbP6ffs5wBQ03eNWAIZOYqxPcB3uxmbxLe2p55rSwn34b4SUwi6qP-6aQXlv5i8gUFrY8JAMOie8o9PHrfHXSOsxuSTWNMqmZtxH3VPphViQdN-dPkhY%3D)**

| [ ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=812c590cb04849c2b92754858b4ba6cc&_e=f_xJBzeWMoGGmMRXYnlILduB3B01LXhroRyCcypA8SI2AeB8G99S6ocjDkZDc9n3i3eYSPcsLrK4ZIqss4ud17Nsg_Y2S7iFuZcXVoHFQspxmAseIuFCbFxS9MFqQvHkv7aH8rjW_K6PFIIKNb_5IeLW0RBOgoIzZfKiH8278k_p-rwZ67lDSB-XidDHPxv0Q0pfUdsxgSQxDguYxEy0Ez2yXv3EzG3YszJuTzo5kajxwoYn0W0ub3ytBxGKAnZHfIs86ASCVn--HST0frLgSxT6Z0HkNoUiAd5d936oKYqZPBL_7q430_fJbsS9hWIPG0BnIu4HpixrXojP7E1xWgXrXMoeKRe8IyN0ij-7b6m2VpJ0xwalKjtdvrynYVjT7_GEM1XYEBI-CoNMrT2nEA%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

You may already know who I am from my time in Congress serving North Carolina's 8th District. Or you may be coming across me for the first time. Either way, I'm glad to be reaching out to you, and I think this could be the beginning of a great relationship. My name is Dan Bishop, and I'm running for Attorney General for North Carolina with the intention of bringing Law and Order back to the Tar Heel State.

**[This email is a bit longer and I hope you'll read through it. I'm going to ask you for a donation to my campaign at the end of this email, but let me explain why it's so crucial you join my team first.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=812c590cb04849c2b92754858b4ba6cc&_e=f_xJBzeWMoGGmMRXYnlILduB3B01LXhroRyCcypA8SI2AeB8G99S6ocjDkZDc9n3i3eYSPcsLrK4ZIqss4ud17Nsg_Y2S7iFuZcXVoHFQspxmAseIuFCbFxS9MFqQvHkv7aH8rjW_K6PFIIKNb_5IeLW0RBOgoIzZfKiH8278k_p-rwZ67lDSB-XidDHPxv0Q0pfUdsxgSQxDguYxEy0E3rAAC0BKwV9fvL9TJkp3BGZ3QqyReAgDWdzIy94eZZjVaWRsLYB0tldkS1YUtr0Tc3ROPVaJTDBqZjtCYcLLj8FZZpmip2VATBqNISYSaRXiqqUZ501tEWhgdXZPXlG427INjIZZ-iBz0-6U5NlyNMzBJrRzTrx_dWfTuKDUjlcZcY1VdsBJLoqXH_YJgd_jyL7CiFPBldPpPibAglFZ6M%3D)**

[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=812c590cb04849c2b92754858b4ba6cc&_e=f_xJBzeWMoGGmMRXYnlILduB3B01LXhroRyCcypA8SI2AeB8G99S6ocjDkZDc9n3i3eYSPcsLrK4ZIqss4ud17Nsg_Y2S7iFuZcXVoHFQspxmAseIuFCbFxS9MFqQvHkv7aH8rjW_K6PFIIKNb_5IeLW0RBOgoIzZfKiH8278k_p-rwZ67lDSB-XidDHPxv0Q0pfUdsxgSQxDguYxEy0E3rAAC0BKwV9fvL9TJkp3BGZ3QqyReAgDWdzIy94eZZjBJ-3y7hNUZ7FC8RrJnWwAKvCrhcL3fW8R-yHHShYsx271VgS1W44-XSOPWJ3YxhT1gIEr5eyttzwj4yPDKtevwjTn2tY0jtFYJ0D28SWo6VBqjhkelVcfPYWlrzBJcvSzcPbMa_7TwBOUpAh59oM1LV57RjIQCT-8lNPg8D3isY%3D)
I was born and raised with my four siblings in North Carolina by my parents, Kaytee and Bud. They didn't come from much, but they pushed me towards an education and instilled a hard work ethic. With a passion for law and justice, I earned my JD at UNC Chapel Hill. I then went on to marry my wife of 25 years (and going), Jo; we raised our son, Jack, who's currently following in his dad's footsteps as he's working to attain his law degree.

As a lawyer, I'm very proud of my track record. I was a commercial litigator for nearly three decades, where I was voted 10 times to Business NC's "Legal Elite" and was selected 7 times by "Super Lawyers." I was tenacious as a litigator and handled complex cases. But, I finally felt that it was time to help a broader scope of North Carolinians and decided to run for Congress.

In Congress, I've been one of the toughest and most outspoken conservatives, challenging the radical left and holding my fellow Republicans accountable. As a member of the judiciary committee and the subcommittee on the weaponization of the federal government, I fought the Biden administration's dangerous policies and exposed the federal government's abuses against the Trump presidency.

Now, I'm running for Attorney General to defend the rule of law and protect North Carolina. I believe Democrats like Roy Cooper and Josh Stein have abused the state's top law enforcement office by turning it into a stepping stone for higher office and a platform to spread liberal propaganda. I'm putting my foot down, demanding respect for the office of Attorney General, and bringing Law and Order back to our great state.

**All that to say, I have a track record of fighting the good fight. And I hope you'll join my team. The good fight is not free; running a campaign gets expensive, having to reach voters across the state, taking care of campaign staffers with food and gas, and running ads on TV.** **[That's why I'm humbly asking you for a donation of whatever you can afford.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=812c590cb04849c2b92754858b4ba6cc&_e=f_xJBzeWMoGGmMRXYnlILduB3B01LXhroRyCcypA8SI2AeB8G99S6ocjDkZDc9n3i3eYSPcsLrK4ZIqss4ud17Nsg_Y2S7iFuZcXVoHFQspxmAseIuFCbFxS9MFqQvHkv7aH8rjW_K6PFIIKNb_5IeLW0RBOgoIzZfKiH8278k_p-rwZ67lDSB-XidDHPxv0Q0pfUdsxgSQxDguYxEy0E3rAAC0BKwV9fvL9TJkp3BGZ3QqyReAgDWdzIy94eZZjHDg8gtXmAZXTzRWY3a2fFeILVvEMfv_lWUackWohx-ghI2r4cl9LCkpvgaSb5MQH9pWwVhXX2G6-8PpedMoCMd_YDCIro8aEO3PIBUBeCzX7QUM5VBThnt_jxW3Fe5ho4er6cjJkyoPKbY_fn9kl2-7WvhNqmzShTB1XLNFJtnI%3D)**

If you've gotten this far, I want to personally thank you for reading this email. Maybe it means you've been a supporter for quite some time. Or maybe it means you're intrigued by my story and also believe in Law and Order over Chaos and Disorder. **[Either way, can you send my campaign just $1 or more to help me out?](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=812c590cb04849c2b92754858b4ba6cc&_e=f_xJBzeWMoGGmMRXYnlILduB3B01LXhroRyCcypA8SI2AeB8G99S6ocjDkZDc9n3i3eYSPcsLrK4ZIqss4ud17Nsg_Y2S7iFuZcXVoHFQspxmAseIuFCbFxS9MFqQvHkv7aH8rjW_K6PFIIKNb_5IeLW0RBOgoIzZfKiH8278k_p-rwZ67lDSB-XidDHPxv0Q0pfUdsxgSQxDguYxEy0E3rAAC0BKwV9fvL9TJkp3BGZ3QqyReAgDWdzIy94eZZjSzUNg08bRLzgyG78k_UrSTdCVXRJTYfuEilzG4jLel6-EkcpuWaOzcWE3DCpZtzRIEJtK6IUaSH4Gnrh3PfTh_agfgoZlSXnbyJlZ6p5aFr8XIlXcASxZyCnTGHdMUMh3FUSlQoYX5kth_IY-6T_KARdOQ-vQW-B3C01UkaVXGw%3D)**

Thank you,
[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=812c590cb04849c2b92754858b4ba6cc&_e=f_xJBzeWMoGGmMRXYnlILduB3B01LXhroRyCcypA8SI2AeB8G99S6ocjDkZDc9n3i3eYSPcsLrK4ZIqss4ud17Nsg_Y2S7iFuZcXVoHFQspxmAseIuFCbFxS9MFqQvHkv7aH8rjW_K6PFIIKNb_5IeLW0RBOgoIzZfKiH8278k_p-rwZ67lDSB-XidDHPxv0Q0pfUdsxgSQxDguYxEy0E3rAAC0BKwV9fvL9TJkp3BGZ3QqyReAgDWdzIy94eZZj4b6tPqVpaDWdXEG75EqpL9Q9sAHv5iKLi_ui8ev4kZuso41SQxqZCQIjSe5YhFy_YcLIgDhP3x8lPA4-rUQvY0xn5xSbJB5uSNzdDPG2p7i-elBwrr9lRwScU6OjsGoMH7wSehgrFenc-5CDeIpzEfIprLPTsOmgYj1vCbEwJrQ%3D)
Dan Bishop

subject: $1 makes a HUGE difference
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS

Look, friend: I know you already know the stakes of this race. OR-05 is one of Democrats’ best pickup opportunities, and I’ve defeated Lori Chavez-DeRemer twice before.
We all know we have a tough fight ahead of us, so I’m sure some of you are confused why I’m only asking for $1.
I know $1 might not seem like much – but if you join the hundreds of grassroots folks who've already given $1 this week, we'll have the resources it takes to win.
**That’s what this campaign is all about. A grassroots team who believes in a better future for Oregon families, chipping in here and there, when they can. **
**[So please, friend, will you chip in $1 – or whatever you can – so we can win this toss-up race, and flip this seat blue in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85690635/475557309/476240567?refcode=em_fr_2024.05.26_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWE0OTcwNTItYWIxYi1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4rB5dKmWROL4O5-N6nBzm9xfNptvpo9QA9FOIbH9RK8=)**

It’s important for Americans to see us put aside our political differences and come together to honor those who served our country" Watch the entire clip . WALTZ ON US MARITIME SECURITY "This is a bipartisan ringing the alarm bells of how much our maritime power, our shipbuilding, our ship repair has declined, and laying out a strategy to start rebuilding that... Last year, China received 1,500 orders for new ships in their shipyards. You know how many we received? Five." Watch the entire clip . Read op-ed . WALTZ ON STATE DEPT OFFERING CONDOLENCES FOR IRAN "Under a Trump Admin, America would keep the murderous Iranian regime under extreme economic pressure while supporting the Iranian people’s fight for their own freedom. And, we would NOT be offering “condolences” for the butcher of Tehran." Watch the entire clip . WALTZ ON MICHAEL COHEN CROSS-EXAMINATION "This is a dark moment in American history. What I still can't get over, is seeing Joe Biden's number 3 official from the Department of Justice sitting right there next to the prosecutor just feet from President Trump who is leading Joe Biden in the polls." Watch the entire clip . WALTZ ON NY V. TRUMP TRIAL "We must raise the cost for Iran’s militias attacking Israel. President Trump put maximum pressure on the head of the snake and dried up their money. Biden MUST reverse course to do the same or these attacks will NEVER stop." Watch the entire clip . WALTZ ON THE CURRENT STATE OF THE US MILITARY "China is cranking out ships at a rate of six of theirs to one of ours, while ours are getting old and dilapidated. They're on track to have a 400 ship navy, meanwhile we're retiring more ships than we're building. They're tripling their nuclear arsenal. Just by sheer numbers, we're getting into a bad spot." name: Team Kennedy
subject: Help Us Vanquish the Deep State
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Restoring our government to where it serves you will be our highest priority!

|
---
| | | [Restoring our government to where it serves you will be our highest priority!](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=deep_state_5_25_24_nd1&n=1)

---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=deep_state_5_25_24_nd1&n=2)
|
---
Dear Peter,
Our Federal Government bureaucracy — sometimes called the Deep State — has been corrupted at the highest levels and it needs to be cleaned up.
That’s what President Trump was talking about when he said “Drain the Swamp.” But he didn’t know how. Instead he filled his administration with swamp creatures.
President Biden won’t do it either. Not only won’t they, but it seems they fear the Deep State.
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. the only candidate for President who knows exactly how to clean up the Deep State and he is the only candidate who is not afraid to clean up the Deep State.
He knows exactly what to do. He will do it one agency at a time. He has sued multiple government agencies and knows the players and the profiteers who have corrupted these agencies.
We will stop the profiteering (like royalties paid to NIH employees) and close the revolving doors that put corporate capture on steroids. We will clean house at the highest level, removing appointees and employees who have corrupted their agencies and no longer believe in our democratic institutions or the principles of our great country.
We will bring the government and its agencies back to their original purpose and culture of serving the public interest ... of serving you.
As President, he will make sure the federal government serves the American people, not the other way around. With your support we will restore our government to where it works for the American people... The future of our great country depends on it.
This election is critical, and we need your help to get this done. Restoring our government to where it _serves you_ will be our highest priority!
[To do this, Team Kennedy needs your help and support. Please donate what you can, be it $5, $10, $25, whatever you can afford so we can continue to get our message out.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=deep_state_5_25_24_nd1&n=3)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I had to reach out to you personally, Derek
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=6503%2E5257348%2EAqJOyU)
Derek, I have some troubling news — our fundraising has taken a hit. And at the same time, my opponent is raising record sums, around $5 million just last quarter.
So with my May fundraising deadline approaching at the end of the week, **[I am respectfully asking if you can contribute $3 to help give us a boost.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2024_abs_em.HG8rlH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240526_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=4&akid=6503%2E5257348%2EAqJOyU)**
Donald Trump is touting his campaign’s competitiveness in solidly Democratic states.
While the idea of Trump winning California may seem ridiculous, the effect it could have on down-ballot races could be disastrous to the balance of power in Congress.
**[That’s why we cannot fall short of this month’s fundraising goal. Can you pitch in $3 to help us catch up?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2024_abs_em.HG8rlH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240526_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=5&akid=6503%2E5257348%2EAqJOyU)**

I hope you don’t find this message too alarming. After all, this team has come up big for me time and again. But it has to start now.
— Adam

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: It can happen here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
If we’re going to win, if we’re going to defeat Kari Lake, and if we’re going to stop Trump from winning back the White House, I need your help. |
---
Peter, when I joined the Marines I signed up to serve my country.

I’m the child of immigrants, the first generation. This country gave me everything, and I felt like I needed to give back. I swore to defend our Constitution, our democracy, from all enemies — foreign and domestic.

But when I signed up, I never thought this was how things would end up.

Over the last several years the most insidious threats to our Constitution have emerged at home. It’s people like Donald Trump and his “MAGA Queen” Kari Lake — openly advocating for violence and repression, tearing down our elections, laying the groundwork for dictatorship and authoritarian rule.

If they win, it could mean the end of our Republic. I’m sorry to say this, but it can happen here. We can stop them, but it’s going to take a ton of hard work. And Arizona will be the frontline in the fight for our democracy.

**If we’re going to win, if we’re going to defeat Kari Lake, and if we’re going to stop Trump from winning back the White House, I need your help.**

clean_body: If we’re going to win, if we’re going to defeat Kari Lake, and if we’re going to stop Trump from winning back the White House, I need your help. | Peter, when I joined the Marines I signed up to serve my country. I’m the child of immigrants, the first generation. This country gave me everything, and I felt like I needed to give back. I swore to defend our Constitution, our democracy, from all enemies — foreign and domestic. But when I signed up, I never thought this was how things would end up. Over the last several years the most insidious threats to our Constitution have emerged at home. It’s people like Donald Trump and his “MAGA Queen” Kari Lake — openly advocating for violence and repression, tearing down our elections, laying the groundwork for dictatorship and authoritarian rule. If they win, it could mean the end of our Republic. I’m sorry to say this, but it can happen here. We can stop them, but it’s going to take a ton of hard work. And Arizona will be the frontline in the fight for our democracy. If we’re going to win, if we’re going to defeat Kari Lake, and if we’re going to stop Trump from winning back the White House, I need your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. | = = = = Thank you for having my back, Ruben ****** **** **** **** **** ****** Defeat Republicans | Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www.DefeatRepublicans.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | | Hi, it’s Dylan, Gabe’s campaign manager. Nearly $3 million in ads is about to flood this district. The Congressional Leadership Fund (CLF) plans to spend more than ANY previous election cycle to date. This is the dark money group who endorsed Gabe’s MAGA opponent Yvette Herrell last month and raised $16 million for Mike Johnson less than ten days after his election to Speaker of the House. Now? CLF is spending MILLIONS to attack key Democrats like Gabe nationwide. Gabe put it best in yesterday’s email: MAGA Republicans are running scared. Gabe’s end-of-month fundraising deadline is just 5 days away, and it’s crucial that we hit our $15,000 fundraising goal before the month ends — it’ll make or break the results of Election Day. I’m forwarding Gabe’s email below. [Give it a read and consider chipping in $10 or more to support Gabe today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85691184/475559459/211358138?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_30DO_052624_1_2_EOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWNhYWY4OC1hZjFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJ_RCqzMtaKKgUjaFY6KRDY7KL2jsipjplsipil5Kmw=) | | [RUSH $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85691189/475559464/211358138?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_30DO_052624_1_2_EOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWNhYWY4OC1hZjFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJ_RCqzMtaKKgUjaFY6KRDY7KL2jsipjplsipil5Kmw=)

Forwarded message from Gabe Vasquez below:
Saludos, it’s Gabe Vasquez. This is the state of the race for NM-02 right now:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85691192/475559469/211358138?source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_30DO_052624_1_2_EOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWNhYWY4OC1hZjFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJ_RCqzMtaKKgUjaFY6KRDY7KL2jsipjplsipil5Kmw=)
You read that exactly right. National Republicans feel so threatened by pro-democracy, pro-choice, pro-progress campaigns like ours that they’re spending nearly THREE MILLION DOLLARS to flood the airwaves right here in our district.
The Congressional Leadership Fund — a dark money group supported by MAGA Speaker Mike Johnson — wants to intimidate Team Vasquez into giving up. But, let’s be honest, this just shows that MAGA Republicans are the ones running scared.
One thing we know is that when Republicans pour money into a race, that means they’re worried. They know how strong our team is, and they know how much the federal funding and common sense policies I have delivered resonates with voters.
Republicans want an edge over us, but we can’t let that happen. Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is coming up next Friday, and we’re at risk of being outspent. [My finance director tells me we need to raise $15K before the end of the month in order to remain competitive. Can I count on your support today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85691197/475559474/211358138?source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_30DO_052624_1_2_EOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWNhYWY4OC1hZjFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJ_RCqzMtaKKgUjaFY6KRDY7KL2jsipjplsipil5Kmw=)

clean_body: It’s never been more important for our supporters to step up and ensure women have a voice in Congress. | | Peter, I’m shooting you an email while Jessica and Chailuv are on the road heading to their next campaign stop. With Jessica now the only woman challenger left running in California, it’s never been more important for our supporters to step up and ensure women have a voice in Congress. Reproductive freedom is unquestionably on the ballot in November. It provides the sharpest contrast between anti-choice, anti-women Republicans and pro-choice, pro-reproductive health Democrats. That’s why it’s crucial women are elected to Congress so they can defend our reproductive freedoms and restore Roe. Now, Peter, it’s up to Jessica to be that powerful voice for women in Congress. As the only woman challenger still running in California, we must ensure she is elected in November. ~~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ~~ ~~ When it comes down to it, Peter, this election is about protecting our fundamental freedoms and ensuring we have strong, equitable, and effective representation in Washington. Hello — Alex Vindman here.
Just so you’re up to speed: On Wednesday, my brother Eugene faces his last official FEC fundraising deadline before Primary Election Day.
In order to stay on track, his campaign set an ambitious goal: Another 5,000 individual donations before our pre-primary FEC deadline, which is tomorrow at midnight.
**The bad news** is that our fundraising has slowed down in a big way over the last week, and we’re still about 1,230 donations short of our goal.
**The good news** is that 1,230 people is less than 0.1% of the folks who support this campaign and Eugene’s fight to defend our democracy. In fact, if everyone reading this chipped in right now, we’d smash that goal a day early and be in a position to file our best FEC fundraising report of the campaign so far.
So please. I’m humbly asking for your help today, John.
Our average donation is around $20. Some give more, many give less.
And the number itself is less important than the amount of people who chip in. Because it’s our job to prove that Eugene has the biggest, most enthusiastic grassroots campaign in this race.
That’s how we win this primary, take on the GOP here in Virginia, and win big in November.
**[Can I count on you to use this link to contribute to my brother Eugene Vindman's campaign for Congress? Be one of the incredible 1,230 people who step up for Eugene today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85692067/475561981/1582186816?refcode=em20240526pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=4ccaa1ba-b31b-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2NhYTFiYS1iMzFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SiwMIiq10CfPSwMLOqB1LAcwXlqksHtjBKCAGFVn6A4=)**

| | **To: President Donald Trump
From: Friend,

We the American People know that the crooked LAWFARE against you is nothing but a CORRUPT WITCH HUNT for the sole purpose of ELECTION INTERFERENCE!

We know that no President, perhaps in history, has been treated this unfairly.

The treatment you have endured is a NATIONAL DISGRACE!

And according to many legal scholars, also ILLEGAL!

President Trump, we know you didn't need to run for President, but you did anyway.

They said you couldn't win, but you did.

They said you wouldn't make America great again, but you did.

All because you love the people of this great country.

At every step of the way, they tried to thwart you. Whether it was the phony Russia Russia Russia hoax, or the perfect phone call impeachment hoax, you never gave up.

You would NOT surrender, despite their blatant and very disgusting attempts to take you down.

Furthermore, we know that you are the only one standing between us and the deranged lunatics who want to hurt our country.

We know that you represent the best of America, you represent us.

I, undersigned, add my name to this open letter to you, President Trump, as you head to the courtroom to hear yet ANOTHER phony "GET TRUMP" case against you.

And further, with God on your side, I have complete and total confidence that upon beating these phony charges, you will return to the White House and restore freedom and prosperity to this land once again. **

---

subject: In a serious predicament

body:
| | | Fellow Patriot, I hope this email finds you well. I urgently need to get in touch with you as my situation just became more serious.

My name is John James. I’m a Christian, conservative combat veteran with a mission to restore strong leadership to Washington, D.C.. Just as I volunteered to fly Apache helicopters in Iraq to defeat the enemy, I am now serving again to protect our country from the dangers of radical socialism.

I know you’re just like me. You want the best for this nation and to preserve a future for our children.

The Beltway's Democrat Machine is prepared to spend millions to silence my voice. They HATE that a black conservative is challenging their hypocritical narrative on race.[ **If I’m going to stay in the fight, I need to humbly ask for your support.** ](http://links.jjforcongress.com/u/click?_t=f784024d18db4d2d88c26e9627b85cc7&_m=23b6f6ab32a9406c853e4f2a7abb0ce4&_e=whvYYeJ59QTpJfQ4NSEjp-6-V5Lgd_vI94j0XsI4Z_g5Z0GpSFiMGQ7y0py3uLRPsLihxPYflinJeCnuwP3e3yKLNNPM7bajOZnFAlLacW3tDG4DPE54ZGZMLM37Nxccv03rJVd3bGnMsLaLRGOhx_DonP3g5IfLGR4MatQDPBopRtFVgtGLqub693gpixqaGu-Y2ZiboprS_ki2HpqAhb06vNnFilf00n6PT9d5HIC7V1KEjOrGmjzPGhjWLenT2SxLcCU-hMNWkt3xD-_NxtOqVKAyl8NcH07N2M0CB__vUWGNlTzMbYHAR1O7nYF_ZhR5ErllLz_CIECPJkLosoKrJYI-s3UYfa4Yalsp3u4%3D)

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: The reason you get so many emails from us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1471%2E135344%2Ebz_uGG)

Friend --
Sometimes it shocks me that anyone donates to fundraising emails from political campaigns.
If you're anything like me, you open your email in the morning and it's overflowing with emails from every Senate campaign, House campaign, the presidential campaign, party committees, and organizations you know and likely many you've never heard of. Most of the time I haven’t signed up for these lists.
I get why these emails happen: they are an increasingly important part of how campaigns and organizations are funded. Especially on the Democratic side. Our small dollar, online, and texting programs are light-years more productive than the GOP, and often account for a third of our monthly fundraising.
So in a sea of Democratic emails and texts, I do my best to differentiate our content, and edit every single one, including this one. The fact that you opened this email instead of deleting it and made it this far gives me hope there's a chance.
There is no winning the Senate without this race in Michigan. There is no winning the White House either. At the same time, this is going to be one of the most competitive (and expensive) races in the country. Poll after poll shows it razor tight.
Republicans know that too, that is why they'll put ridiculous amounts of money in to beat us. And since I don’t accept corporate PAC money, I have to rely on the generosity of individuals like you who understand the stakes of this race.
Hopefully that's a compelling case. It’s my job to make it. Because there's no winning this race without a significant response to emails like this by people like you.
[**Would you consider contributing $3 to my Senate campaign in Michigan to help me hold this seat, and the Senate, for Democrats in November? I can’t win without the help of people like you.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-may24.waY6cu&refcode=em240524-2-sa&t=2&akid=1471%2E135344%2Ebz_uGG)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-may24.3kMSc4&refcode=em240524-2-sa&t=22&akid=1471%2E135344%2Ebz_uGG)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-may24.y6Hs_e&refcode=em240524-2-sa&t=23&akid=1471%2E135344%2Ebz_uGG)**

name: GallegoForArizona.com
subject: Unfortunately, we have to ask…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
If Ruben’s going to take back Arizona’s seat, he needs you to make your first online donation to his campaign. It’s our only shot.
#

Peter, this isn’t the news we hoped we’d be sharing before Memorial Day.
Kari Lake and the NRSC just announced they were going to spend $10 million in ads propping up her campaign and attacking Ruben.
They’ve already run hundreds of thousands of dollars in airtime over the last week, and Ruben is getting hit all over Arizona.
And in the last couple days, we’ve heard that they just booked another $1.9 million.
With control of the Senate hanging by a thread and many pundits projecting that the GOP will retake the Senate, we can’t miss in Arizona.
This is as serious as it gets.
If Ruben’s going to take back Arizona’s seat, he needs you to make your first online donation to his campaign. It’s our only shot.
[**Please, please, please make a contribution to Ruben’s campaign for U.S. Senate before our deadline hits later this week. We need everybody right now, and no donation is too small.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may24.hD4hyN&refcode=em240526-2-160&t=1&akid=2384%2E734936%2E_dC1NT)

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: three quick reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter — here are three quick reasons why Missouri’s U.S. Senate race is our best chance to flip a seat in 2024:
1. **Josh Hawley is the least popular and most vulnerable GOP U.S. Senator running for re-election this year** — with approval numbers even lower than Ted Cruz in Texas and Rick Scott in Florida.
2. **Multiple polls have 13-year Marine veteran Lucas Kunce already in a dead heat with Hawley.** Lucas has built a record-breaking, worker-led movement to take back this Senate seat for real Missourians and his message is resonating with voters from across the state.
3. **This election will be a referendum on reproductive freedom — literally.** An initiative to end Missouri’s extreme abortion ban is going on the ballot and Josh Hawley, who has led a career-long crusade to criminalize reproductive healthcare in our country, is up for re-election.

**[CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51023?refcode=em20240526-5610&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5610%2E614464%2ExiV9bo)**
**Voters show up when their freedoms are under attack.** We’ve seen it happen in red states like Kentucky, Alabama, and Kansas since Roe was overturned in 2022 — and we’re going to see it happen again in Missouri this November.
But in order to take advantage of this historic moment, we need the resources to continue exposing Hawley’s record on reproductive freedom and communicating Lucas’ unifying vision for Missouri to voters all across the state. And since our campaign doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs, we’re counting on your help to make it happen. So we’re asking:
**[Will you please make a donation of any amount right now toward our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce and defeat Josh Hawley?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51023?refcode=em20240526-5610&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5610%2E614464%2ExiV9bo)**

end-of-month deadline approaching
| | |

Friend, I wanted to reach out to personally thank you.
I have so much to thank you for, so this message is a bit longer than usual. But in case you're short on time, I have to make sure that you see this first: **My end-of-month deadline is approaching, and we're still pacing dangerously short of my $125,000 goal.****[I hate that I have to ask, but this is incredibly important: If you have anything extra to spare, can you chip in $5 to help me hit this goal? We’ve made so much progress together already, but I need your help to make sure that we can continue this work for years to come.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85692558/475563773/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk5075-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOThjMjM5ZC1iODFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qR_MkgpmocsQSoMgzLCDj_yffthI2K1yy0SYBqi8lNU=)**
| | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85692560/475563775/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5075-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOThjMjM5ZC1iODFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qR_MkgpmocsQSoMgzLCDj_yffthI2K1yy0SYBqi8lNU=)
---
If you have the time to keep reading, I hope that you'll take a moment to celebrate our recent wins.
In 2023, we really got to work. I introduced legislation to create a national paid leave program — legislation that I first introduced 10 years ago and have continued to advocate for since then. You immediately rallied behind me, voicing your support for this long-overdue legislation. **And today, support for paid family leave is higher than ever before** — including 85% of all voters in battleground states! Thank you for making this possible.
I also**released my Strategic Plan on Aging to make sure that our seniors can retire with dignity and financial stability.** From expanding existing programs like Medicare to helping more seniors remain in their homes, these proposals would drastically improve the quality of life for millions of seniors. Thank you for supporting my work to make this happen.
I'm also incredibly grateful for the outpouring of support from this grassroots team after **I introduced a resolution to finally certify the Equal Rights Amendment.****** This amendment would establish protections against gender-based discrimination in our Constitution, once and for all, giving us a legal basis to restore reproductive rights. Activists have been fighting for the ERA for 100 years, and it is truly an honor to carry forward their work today. Thank you for standing beside me in the fight for gender equity and reproductive freedom.
Lastly, I fought tirelessly to make sure that the National Defense Authorization Act included a pay increase for service members, investments to clean up toxic PFAS contamination and funding for hundreds of spots in my cybersecurity academy at over 400 schools. Thank you for helping me ensure that our veterans and service members get the benefits they deserve.

There have been so many other moments when you've stood beside me, and I am grateful for every single one of them. But our fight for progress is far from over. And now, Democrats are in the most difficult election year in recent memory.
Here in New York, Republicans just had their best election cycle in years. Now, they're directly targeting my seat. With a narrow 51-49 majority, we cannot afford to show any signs of weakness. **Missing my end-of-month goal would be sending a crystal clear message to the GOP that this seat is up for grabs.** **[_So please, will you donate $5 or whatever you can spare before 11:59 p.m. to help me continue our fight for progress this year? Because I refuse to accept corporate PAC money, I'm counting on your help to make up the gap._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85692561/475563776/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5075-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOThjMjM5ZC1iODFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qR_MkgpmocsQSoMgzLCDj_yffthI2K1yy0SYBqi8lNU=)**

With love,

Kirsten

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. name: J. Rosen
subject: We can’t just stand by and let this happen, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend – I don’t like reaching out like this, but what would _you_ do in this situation?
**I’m officially the most vulnerable woman in the Senate, and experts predict that Nevada could deliver both the White House AND the Senate to Republicans this year. **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85692599/475563876/1514755465?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3837-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGQ1M2I1MC1iOTFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Unk3TUkSpCvoWZYRZHTjorVQAYJpRXUMOK4HqzySTQM=)
With so much riding on my critical battleground race in Nevada and polling showing me tied with my extreme GOP opponent – I have _**no choice**_ but to call on my top supporters like you for help.

name: Mark Takano

body:
As the first gay man of color elected to Congress

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85692643/475564036/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzU3MzNkNi1iYTFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7gq6YQH4hIhv0sBCCMQLBLWiWzoavZ-M-uDz7DW9U3Q=)
---
Peter, since becoming the first gay man of color elected to Congress, I have seen so much progress in the fight for LGBTQ+ rights.

Sadly, I’ve also seen the Republican Party take every step to decimate our progress.

That’s why I was horrified to see this: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85692644/475564037/649527246?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20240526_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzU3MzNkNi1iYTFiLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7gq6YQH4hIhv0sBCCMQLBLWiWzoavZ-M-uDz7DW9U3Q=) **Republicans are decimating our few protections as LGBTQ+ individuals.**

So, I’m taking the lead in Congress to fight for our rights. That means passing more legislation at the federal level (like the Equality Act), organizing support across the country, and fighting back against conservative Supreme Court rulings.

But I can’t do this without your support.
